name: History Facts
subject: Why they're called "Ivy League” schools
body:
“Ivy League” is a term that evokes images of the hallowed vine-covered walls of some of the most elite educational institutions in the world. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soepmm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Why Do We Call Them “Ivy League” Schools?](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soepmm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soepmm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soepmm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| “I vy League” is a term that evokes images of the hallowed vine-covered walls of some of the most elite educational institutions in the world. Everyone has an idea of what having an Ivy League education means, but what, exactly, is the origin of the name itself? Here’s how this group of prestigious institutions came to be called the Ivy League.
---
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soepmm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soepmm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: Elect Gabe Evans
subject: ICYMI: Prioritizing 3 Ways to Fix Our Immigration System
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend2.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxNDA1NjIzNTMxNzMzMDA4ODAsXCJyXCI6MTQwNTYyMzYzNzg4MDM1OTc4fSIsInMiOiI3NmEzMGYwY2FkMTM4MTBjIn0)
| |
---
|
---
|
---
# ICYMI: Prioritizing these 3 ways to fix our immigration system will help protect Coloradans
|
---
**Rep-elect Gabe Evans: Deport gangsters, not grandmas**
FORT LUPTON, CO — In his first op-ed since being elected, Congressman-elect Gabe Evans breaks down his priorities for addressing the immigration crisis. Congressman-elect Evans describes how prioritizing securing the border, streamlining the immigration system, and deporting illegal immigrants will help make Colorado a safer place to live.
Read the op-ed[ here](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend2.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxNDA1NjIzNTMxNzc0OTUxOTMsXCJyXCI6MTQwNTYyMzYzNzg4MDM1OTc4fSIsInMiOiIxMjU2OTVhNGQ3OGFmY2Y3In0) or below.
**Opinion: Prioritizing these 3 ways to fix our immigration system will help protect Coloradans** [Colorado Sun](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend2.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxNDA1NjIzNTMxODI3MzgwODUsXCJyXCI6MTQwNTYyMzYzNzg4MDM1OTc4fSIsInMiOiJiZDU2ZGQwNjI1Yjg1MDEzIn0) December 12, 2024
_In a recent viral moment, the mayor of Denver, Mike Johnston, threatened to deploy local cops and thousands of Coloradans for a “Tiananmen Square moment” to stop the next administration’s strong immigration policies._
_As a Coloradan, former Denver-area cop, grandson of an immigrant family and the next congressman for Colorado’s 8th Congressional District, I strongly support a secure border and strong immigration policies, including immediate deportation for criminals or freeloaders._
_For those who are contributing to our society, not causing problems, and want to legally join the American dream, I do not support immediate deportation or family separation. As the grandson of an immigrant from Chihuahua, I know that America must prioritize deporting gangsters, not grandmas._
_The Denver mayor’s politically motivated and inflammatory rhetoric kindles unnecessary fear and intentionally divides our communities. Immigrants with legal status are a critical part of our workforce; my family is a testament to the importance of immigrants in America. We should not build a new immigration system based on fear — rather, facts and commonsense priorities._
_When I was serving in the U.S. Army, we had a saying: “If everything is a priority, then nothing is.” Consequently, here are my top three priorities for addressing the immigration situation:_
_First, we must secure the border. Lawful commerce with Mexico is vital to our economy and must continue, but we must control what is moving across the physical border. Far too often, human and drug traffickers take advantage of the weak physical presence along the border, trafficking women and children or bringing fentanyl and cartel members into our communities. Cracking down on this is priority number one and until the physical border is under control, anything else is an exercise in futility. Deported individuals can come right back._
_Next, we must fix and streamline the current immigration system for folks who want to come to America the legal way. In my district, an immigrant from Brazil has been working to get his citizenship for 17 years. That’s entirely too long for someone who is dedicated to following the rules and entering our country the right way, and it’s unfair that people like him are being cut in line by illegal immigrants._
_Third, we must aggressively target and deport illegal immigrants who are committing other crimes. Time after time, we hear stories of illegal immigrants who have been repeatedly deported returning and torturing, raping and killing innocent Americans. Before we can even begin to think about deporting anyone else, we must crush the cartels, gangs and career criminals who are terrorising our communities._
_What is not a top priority is illegal immigrants who have been here for a long time, are working a job and aren’t causing problems. Under current federal law, illegally entering the U.S. is roughly equivalent to a Class 2 misdemeanor. In Colorado, and most places around the country, a first time Class 2 misdemeanor is punished with a fine and probation._
_America is a nation of laws, but also a nation of second chances. Someone living here illegally for years, but contributing to our society and not causing problems, should be treated like any other person who commits a first offense Class 2 misdemeanor: Pay a fine and be on probation until obtaining legal status. If they can’t or won’t obtain legal status, then they should be deported._
_For these same reasons, I support the “Remain in Mexico” policy for immigrants with asylum claims. Under guidance from the United Nations’ High Commissioner for Refugees, Mexico is fully capable of providing asylum. It doesn’t make sense for asylees to live off U.S. social services and on the taxpayers’ dime for years without a plan to gain citizenship. Mexico must be a partner, not merely a transit corridor that leaves the U.S. holding the bag._
_Until America addresses these three aspects of the broken immigration system first, it makes no sense to focus on anything else._
_As the Congressman-elect for Colorado’s 8th Congressional District, it is my mission to protect my constituents while also prioritizing the safety and well-being of our communities from those who seek to harm, and I look forward to doing just that starting Jan. 3._

|
---
|
---
|
---
|
##### Elect Gabe Evans
P.O. Box 350608, Westminster
United States of America |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom?
| | |
---
| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=872bc5722f164572a47654d5528e91c9&_t=u6EtoGvNp6l3i1uxflWiPf-no3VL83hrZK1d1UiV3GnNnKtekXihK3MeRotkuCv1XpQdJR4bKKaE75PsIKK7hEMXUxqjzQwLYi1BzPChTeSlc2q5xiifsG_hLhVLWxFe)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=872bc5722f164572a47654d5528e91c9&_e=S4bBl6zGcwbMgfa6LJqTLkAg4I_YUCdkHavwEA2L52BV9qAHPhTJtzybvjJaac0Gxl-rohBTaqCmmlBjsHl6_de-oKljwA6Nyd0xMdEpu0MgEuAbaLImppMepT_nJM_DcyahyeJWhd9nC31_ysJKujYqbCsQZ4T688GovxIm6M4GwqwC7lwV9Lvmsk7BWiolwTelxyVO92aKqjpg-Co6u_hPWx88oNLh7G1es3p21bffSCiaEUjtFp9Dkvr8X9ckPRb9eSxVl19slACP2Bz5NdAfJmMGbBdB6dcYdp_zUXrk3T3YRnHs3S-ASdY9ttUrodTXOO7eVlHSFFxzwQBE8GyQofzYsngQfiLiNonf2onEzcB7_Nrar55OCCJz3_sNFTdMzOEcmMDRyOB2G9kK5g%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=872bc5722f164572a47654d5528e91c9&_e=S4bBl6zGcwbMgfa6LJqTLkAg4I_YUCdkHavwEA2L52BV9qAHPhTJtzybvjJaac0Gxl-rohBTaqCmmlBjsHl6_de-oKljwA6Nyd0xMdEpu0MgEuAbaLImppMepT_nJM_DcyahyeJWhd9nC31_ysJKujYqbCsQZ4T688GovxIm6M4GwqwC7lwV9Lvmsk7BWiolwTelxyVO92aKqjpg-Co6u_hPWx88oNLh7G1es3p21bffSCiaEUjtFp9Dkvr8X9ckZrNqOeJFTZ8W5QX3uWbfyfzI_s_nDOuJwEOfOtum6KZf5oR47vwPuZFnnc7aYTLOVz8iFYE8NEEGvLTQKfZrzRBNbSVOT5eIWYiqrpbUJ2gT6lE30gm-VuHCvNkJHXAMMuibgPMnGJy26NoTE5v7GA%3D%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** **** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=872bc5722f164572a47654d5528e91c9&_e=S4bBl6zGcwbMgfa6LJqTLkAg4I_YUCdkHavwEA2L52BV9qAHPhTJtzybvjJaac0Gxl-rohBTaqCmmlBjsHl6_de-oKljwA6Nyd0xMdEpu0MgEuAbaLImppMepT_nJM_DcyahyeJWhd9nC31_ysJKujYqbCsQZ4T688GovxIm6M4GwqwC7lwV9Lvmsk7BWiolwTelxyVO92aKqjpg-Co6u_hPWx88oNLh7G1es3p21bffSCiaEUjtFp9Dkvr8X9ck7d0T6MrH3EYIODt7UnOzcIGst4Upr2cOPACKukHEupC67cCwvLVQ8BCbXf_azgeudAwq7BngLFZypKIRG-Gcr-rgNgHwh2RNBwklYrevDGYh80LqQHHuXAYw_hMBHbXl5tVC3vRlAUt09AZKVl7Baw%3D%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=872bc5722f164572a47654d5528e91c9&_e=S4bBl6zGcwbMgfa6LJqTLkAg4I_YUCdkHavwEA2L52BV9qAHPhTJtzybvjJaac0Gxl-rohBTaqCmmlBjsHl6_de-oKljwA6Nyd0xMdEpu0MgEuAbaLImppMepT_nJM_DcyahyeJWhd9nC31_ysJKujYqbCsQZ4T688GovxIm6M4GwqwC7lwV9Lvmsk7BWiolwTelxyVO92aKqjpg-Co6u_hPWx88oNLh7G1es3p21bffSCiaEUjtFp9Dkvr8X9cknT7s2UXCog9WnNvJi_HsnK4ZJeZNSvT6bVfC9RKEWqJm_uVXH-nE2Q7cFTpueYxpkc8xol6FASeZ28ggHuux8qKMR1IEB0fBZXE8i5PohtH7LPOUuDkrX1yuR94KG-_ocLOMWGeqP_6mBW45J2pQzw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? | | | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. ** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country. To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including Imprimis , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty. Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions. Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding. So please complete your National Referendum on the Administrative State and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution. Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work. name: Team Dexter
subject: Maxine wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98612298/517259328/577006200?amount=25&refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc4MzVjNTktZWViOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hqQKVhSPkdoavWN9dxMQ3w4tyvOrdV-gbVrCppBxbYA=)
I wanted to make sure you saw Maxine’s email. Your input is invaluable in shaping our path forward, and Maxine is here to listen. If you haven’t already, please take a moment to share what’s on your mind—your voice will help guide us in these critical times.

Thank you,
Team Dexter

\--------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dr. Maxine Dexter
Date: Wed, December 4, 2024
Subject: I promise to listen with empathy and resolve.

Hi Peter,

This election outcome is deeply painful, and the consequences we face will be real and far-reaching. We know what Right-wing extremists are determined to do and the lengths they’ll go to achieve it. But we will fight back.

The fight ahead won’t be easy, and we won’t win every battle. But we must try—because our neighbors are counting on us.

Over 1,173,064 Oregonians voted to protect the right to choose, for an economy that works for the middle class, and to defend our democracy. Those voices will not be ignored.

To move forward, passionate and engaged Americans like you are one of the last guardrails protecting our values. I was elected to Congress to be your advocate, and I promise to fight every day to deliver for you.

[**Today I want to give you a space to share. Please, Peter, tell me what you think. You can tell me what you think my legislative priorities should be, about problems in your communities, or just vent about the election. I promise to listen with empathy and resolve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98612299/517259329/445750432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc4MzVjNTktZWViOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hqQKVhSPkdoavWN9dxMQ3w4tyvOrdV-gbVrCppBxbYA=&emci=e73aa53d-d3b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a7835c59-eeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338)
****[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98612300/517259330/445750432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc4MzVjNTktZWViOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hqQKVhSPkdoavWN9dxMQ3w4tyvOrdV-gbVrCppBxbYA=&emci=e73aa53d-d3b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a7835c59-eeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338)****
---
Extremists want nothing more than to see us defeated, divided, or disheartened. They know that if we turn on each other or step away from this work, their path becomes easier. I won’t let that happen. Together, we can build a stronger, more connected community—one that proves what unites us is far more powerful than anything that seeks to divide us.

We’ve faced uphill battles before. When the odds seemed stacked against us, we came together and made history. Think of the grassroots movements that rose up to protect healthcare during Trump’s presidency or the record-breaking turnout that reclaimed the House in 2018. Those victories weren’t easy, but they showed the strength we have when we fight together.

Take the time you need to rest and process—lean on those who inspire and uplift you. When you’re ready, know that I’ll be standing with you, ready to keep fighting for justice, equity, and a better future.

Every day, I’ll fight for the values that matter to all of us. As your Congresswoman, I’ll stand as a strong defender of our democracy and a tireless advocate for the Oregon we know we can build together.

In solidarity,
Dr. Maxine Dexter
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98612301/517259331/829186069?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc4MzVjNTktZWViOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hqQKVhSPkdoavWN9dxMQ3w4tyvOrdV-gbVrCppBxbYA=&emci=e73aa53d-d3b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a7835c59-eeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98612302/517259332/-1852105559?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc4MzVjNTktZWViOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hqQKVhSPkdoavWN9dxMQ3w4tyvOrdV-gbVrCppBxbYA=&emci=e73aa53d-d3b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a7835c59-eeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98612303/517259333/-872485808?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTc4MzVjNTktZWViOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hqQKVhSPkdoavWN9dxMQ3w4tyvOrdV-gbVrCppBxbYA=&emci=e73aa53d-d3b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a7835c59-eeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338)

name: NRSC
subject: The most competitive races in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
#
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true]

Friend,

The Senate map is shaping up for the 2026 campaign to HOLD our Senate
majority so we can help President Trump Make America Great Again
during his entire four year term.

Mid-term elections are historically stacked against the political
party in power, so we must start planning TODAY.

THE SEVEN CRITICAL SEATS WE MUST SECURE TO HOLD THE MAJORITY ARE IN
MAINE, NORTH CAROLINA, GEORGIA, MICHIGAN, OHIO, NEW HAMPSHIRE, AND
TEXAS.

Some of these races do not have official candidates yet or even
rumored ones, but we can’t get buried by Democrats’ early
fundraising AGAIN in 2025. Otherwise, the campaign to SECURE the
Senate majority will be an uphill battle from the start, and we will
only have ourselves to blame.

PLEASE CHIP IN BY CLICKING ONE OF THE BUTTONS BELOW TO HELP OUR SENATE
INCUMBENTS AND 2026 SENATE NOMINEES. :ARROW_DOWN: :ARROW_DOWN:
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true]

CONTRIBUTE $35
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true]

CONTRIBUTE $50
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true]

CONTRIBUTE $75
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true]

CONTRIBUTE $100
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true]

CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true]

We’re counting on our top conservative leaders like you to step up
to support our candidates now so we don’t fall behind next year.

We know we have a winning message, BUT WE CAN’T RISK GETTING
OUTSPENT BY RATIOS OF 3, 4, OR EVEN 5 DOLLARS TO 1 AGAIN. IF WE
DON’T PICK UP THE PACE, _WE COULD LOSE THE SENATE MAJORITY THAT
PRESIDENT TRUMP NEEDS TO SAVE AMERICA._
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true4]

_Anything you can spare today will help us establish a solid financial
foundation in these key races so our Republican Senators and 2026
Senate Nominees do not have to fight from behind from day one of their
campaigns._

PLEASE DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE TO HELP US WIN THESE SEVEN
CRITICAL RACES. WE NEED TO SECURE THESE SEATS TO HOLD THE MAJORITY.
>>>
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/7-most-competitive-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama_nrsc_HERE&utm_campaign=20241211_na_7mostcompetitive2026-v1_HERE_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&utm_term=vbout&exitintent=true]

Thank you,

Senate Republicans

subject: Release the Jack Smith Report >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Running out of time...
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report?source=VPP_20241212_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z) | [TELL MERRICK GARLAND: RELEASE THE JACK SMITH REPORT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report?source=VPP_20241212_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z)
---
**HERE’S THE GOOD NEWS:** Jack Smith is required to submit a report to the Department of Justice detailing his case against Donald Trump.

**BUT HERE’S THE BAD NEWS:** Merrick Garland is NOT required to release the report publicly, and under immense pressure and MAGA threats, _he may decide to keep it hidden!_
[**We can’t let Trump get away with his crimes — the American people deserve to know the truth! THIS IS OUR LAST CHANCE: Sign our petition calling on Merrick Garland to release Jack Smith’s report! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report?source=VPP_20241212_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z)
[MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: TELL MERRICK GARLAND TO RELEASE THE JACK SMITH REPORT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report?source=VPP_20241212_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z)
---
This is urgent,

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18201%2E878179%2EnZox6z)

name: Andrea Hunley
subject: Hope You'll Join Me at Mass Ave Pub 12/16
body:
Join for a gathering and fundraiser to support Andrea Hunley. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=d9ebccf591&u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=b5539e403f)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| **THANK YOU! **

As the year draws to a close, I want to take a moment to personally thank you for your steadfast support for my work as your Indiana State Senator.

This marks the start of my third legislative session. Know that I continue to work hard for you and our community each day.
---
| **END OF YEAR PARTY** **MONDAY, DECEMBER 16
4:30-6:30pm
Mass Ave Pub | 745 Massachusetts Ave** Last month I was elected as the Assistant Leader of the Senate Democratic Caucus. This new leadership role presents an incredible opportunity to amplify our collective voice. As we look ahead to the coming year with a challenging national situation, **it will be critical to have a clear, strong strategy at the legislature. **I am also focused on the 2026 election cycle, my re-election, and how we can improve candidate recruitment and training to grow our caucus and elect more progressive leaders. **The next few weeks are especially important.** Your contribution before the end of the year will help us enter this critical budget session with the resources needed to effectively advocate for the issues that matter most. Every dollar raised will ensure we are prepared to face the challenges ahead. _**Note: **All contributions must be received prior to January 7. To honor our commitment to ethical leadership and the state budget process, we do not accept campaign contributions during session to avoid even the appearance of a conflict of interest._ **See you at Mass Ave Pub! **
---
| [DONATE](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=e79f153064&e=d9ebccf591 "DONATE")
---
|
---
| | **KNOW BEFORE YOU GO:**
**The more the merrier, invite friends and neighbors.**

**21+ Only:** Mass Ave Pub cannot admit folks under 21.

**Parking: **Parking is available on the street and in the Firefighter's Union Hall lot (corner of St. Clair and College)

**Attire:** Come as you are.

**Food & Drink Details: **We'll have appetizers and drinks to share. You can purchase more and the bar will be open for your business.
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | [](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=158365e93d&e=d9ebccf591)
---
[](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=76d8e142cd&e=d9ebccf591)
---
[](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=d283e339ca&e=d9ebccf591)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Andrea Hunley for IndyPO Box 44715Indianapolis, IN 46244-0715
[Add us to your address book](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f3c9603900)

You can purchase more and the bar will be open for your business. | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Andrea Hunley for Indy, All rights reserved.

This snippet from their article showcases just how impressive President Trump has been: _His sole debate with President Joe Biden in June led to his opponent’s eventual exit from the race. name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0sm99m3cnl9j6pela6m7g3jm79ujakg1pd4dsi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge0ob4c9h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zo34aujdl1bacgstdd0gfkpuk5gcrmv2mlcs615o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge0ob4c9h2bs) [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zot20tpkaqo9c9c9srvammeoldeebvubc3vck6d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge0ob4c9h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zk300gtuqi0m0q7ebsdved2do20qt3minc0j0cj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge0ob4c9h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zar6v0fd3u5sonj47oca3brjkaq1gqeiuruo6co0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge0ob4c9h2bs)
---

Update For America

name: Al Canata
subject: “America is in the fast lane to bankruptcy.”
body:
We’re facing a financial crisis of historic proportions.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrubaj4foefe5h5imi6iumphlho394sq0d03uqto_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)
Friend,

We’re facing a financial crisis of historic proportions. Our national debt is now over $35 trillion and growing every day.

That’s $106,538 owed per citizen!

The debt burden is so heavy that even just the interest payments are unmanageable.

**As Elon Musk recently tweeted,_“Interest payments on just federal government debt now exceed the entire Defense Department budget! America is in the fast lane to bankruptcy.”_**

I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships for the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). We are dedicated to holding Congress accountable and ensuring they prioritize fiscal responsibility over pet projects and pork-barrel spending.

We’re sounding the alarm, but we can’t do it alone.

We need Americans who are committed to our country’s future and who believe that responsible, limited government is key to long-term prosperity.

[Will you stand with us today to protect your hard-earned money? Please consider a donation of $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us put a stop to Washington’s reckless spending.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrad1o8irv73rlb124ep8gos4hp5mkqob37o47j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqe18753t2eqdt1t50rlhdr9gl4684in6b0v7b7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)
The danger isn’t just in our debt’s sheer size — it’s in the long-term costs that will weigh on our economy, threaten jobs, and limit future opportunities for our children and grandchildren.

**Just this year, American taxpayers will pay nearly $900 billion in interest payments alone.**

That’s money we’re sending straight to bondholders instead of investing in our people, our defense, or our infrastructure.

NTU is fighting back by:
* Advocating for spending reform to cut the waste and prioritize real needs.
* Pushing for transparency in federal budgets so you can see where every dollar goes.
* Building coalitions in Congress that stand for fiscal sanity and responsibility.

**This year, we have a chance to make a difference. Your support today could be the tipping point that helps us hold the line on reckless spending and change course before it’s too late. Can we count on you?**

Make a donation today of $15, $25, or even $50 to keep our voices loud and strong in Washington.
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zebagnb4fnduraht5bqvr6tdgo7u1k8q05vcefm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1a71660s3jer6av6r8eoen9p43vnue9j25ib95g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ssp54gc3d0name23ncsrhp7qisvtfelqvc7jgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0uv0su729ua0nu3a9rj4tpfqg51unbjand9rbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfkbblpu1klhu770u11v0smltralluv0ihm7lo5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z63uj132393pvffbio54b5d24m8vvnjkl67o48m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za2ns07ol9gcbu0febgeu8ikfgn23t77bcft2100_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztdrsphru8njnahj38vn56t5m90ib7nr1s49l6r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)
Billions that could be used to strengthen our economy, provide services, or secure our nation are instead wasted on servicing debt from years of reckless spending.

The fight won’t be easy, but the stakes are simply too high. Together, we can change the way Washington spends and hold politicians accountable for protecting your future.

_Thank you for standing with us in this critical moment_.

The National Taxpayers Union is the longest-serving organization in America fighting for taxpayers. Our mission is to achieve favorable, pro-taxpayer policy outcomes using the most effective team on Capitol Hill and in the states.

With your support, NTU can continue to achieve tangible results for taxpayers.

**Congress will be back in Washington in just a few weeks, ready to spend more out of an empty pocket. We have to be ready! Please click below to donate today.**
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z493qa4rpnkusqnm25gu5joehjl6rkncjcbnp0a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35chh2bs)
Thank you,

Al Canata
Vice President of Strategic Partnerships
National Taxpayers Union

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I’ve received threats... but I won’t stop
body:
This is where the madness needs to end because it’s not just sports where the radical gender ideology movement is dominating.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z451iep6fcu7a84sthlb4iaodh5bl182o9ue83f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

**This is a deeply personal email, but I want to tell you why it’s critical for us to take back our culture and education from the radical left... not just in sports, but even in children’s books. **

My story begins at the University of Kentucky. I was on the swim team. I am a 12-time NCAA all-American, 5x SEC champion, and SEC record holder in the butterfly.

But then it all changed for a photo-op.

In March of 2022, I and other female swimmers were forced to compete with a male, Lia Thomas. We watched as this male swam to a title, beating out Olympians and other record holders. Despite tying Lia to the 100th of a second, the NCAA denied me the trophy because the NCAA claimed it was necessary to have Lia Thomas hold the trophy while photos were being taken.

The radical left reduced everything I worked my entire life for down to a photo op.

But that’s not all...

I was forced to share locker rooms with a 6’4” man.

**_This is where the madness needs to end because it’s not just sports where the radical gender ideology movement is dominating_.**

Now, children’s literature is injected with this radical gender ideology movement.

[You can help me STOP this madness by making an urgent donation to SkyTree Book Fairs, which is combating Scholastic’s transgender woke propaganda, by creating a wholesome and age-appropriate book fair alternative for parents, students, and educators. Click here to donate ANY amount!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdg2k0h3vun80kjoho90dguat04fj4r1orogmam8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

Some of the books are too gross to even share with you on this email. But here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpm3tgtmojt3d45r5pgsohcjeqfrq2v5njrmi1d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)
Full stop: This needs to end. No compromising. No more excuses.

While Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs, one organization is fighting back, and I am urgently asking for you to support them as you have supported my fight to defend women’s sports.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

[Can you help me raise $50,000 in the next 48 hours toward SkyTree in order for them to host dozens of book fairs? Click here to chip in $35, $50, or even $100. >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8va4hdunmp81q1srk4jbebb2odcj07j9sa6s5v0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs) [Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6giesfpamoo512dr8dk7or65oe8esjflk8v2j9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)
**Why this matters:**

You may remember Scholastic book fairs. All the kids used to love it when they came to school. It was a catalog of all the stories I got to read. It used to be an innocent event.

Unfortunately, that’s all changed.

Scholastic now promotes woke, radical LGBT books. They promote a radical agenda over the well-being of kids.

And make no mistake, Scholastic is the nation’s leading hotbed. Ellie Berger, president of Scholastic’s trade publishing division, wrote, “We pledge to stand with you as we redouble our efforts to combat the laws restricting children’s access to books.”

With over 120,000 book fairs a year, Scholastic is the biggest pusher of transgender, woke propaganda to school children.

That’s why it’s urgent we create more SkyTree book fairs.

SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

However, SkyTree Book Fairs is a David VS. Goliath battle.

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more racially divisive storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $4,500 to host each book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. [Donate $10 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zto7j2goe67obeb006134jgu8k6fir0rhuvosquo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z724jge0371ihk0q26cj9m7s06j0n1cm7tbvb998_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd6p78bv151ovbiikh72h2m7dcgco9efra784spg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg70rumca5fn9vdbbu3rra5h8mdodeh782g019d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zafkhqd8qtau993bsnom76tidv88ts2d21g44mvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zotihjj25gsjhacai43qtg6pscorttnhko2hivuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi3u5vg8hnkgr00leg9hvtou6d7262mk5vo8tj10_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

[Sponsor a SkyTree book fair for $4,500 >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zur2961d36llp4pu6jpcgi73eqt4l5t4hjbmdoe8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z94b23btos96o991egh70b69m44m9m4iq01vhdm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2o35c9h2bs)
Since I began sharing my story, I’ve received death threats and ugly and twisted threatening messages on social media. The media has labeled me an extremist.

_I’ve even been physically assaulted by a mob of transgender activists_.

But I’m not afraid.

**Instead I think of what God tells us in _Romans 8:18:_**__I consider that our present sufferings are not worth comparing with the glory that will be revealed in us__.

You and I must take on this battle. We’re called to do so.

Let’s step up and provide children with a positive alternative to what’s happening in Scholastic book fairs by supporting SkyTree.

I hope you will join me in supporting SkyTree to ensure that children have access to high-quality literature that aligns with our most cherished values and principles.

Thank you,

Riley Gaines

SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023.

name: America First Coalition
subject: JD Vance goes NUCLEAR on the Democrats.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
“The effort to ruin Pete Hegseth is a coordinated smear campaign.”

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z44obpk0f0dl070albae9lb87uf1i4ee1dsmegn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2p72cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsnplu85uimt2cmkhsl2mf1n06fvfhvs8k14pcro_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2p72cjh2bs)
---
Vice President JD Vance has had **_ENOUGH_** of Democrats and deep-state puppets smearing Pete Hegseth’s good name.
“The effort to tank Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC.” - JD Vance.
The reason Dems want Pete Hegseth gone is because they’re **_TERRIFIED_** of a Defense Secretary who is strong, fearless, and would lead an America-First Military.
As we speak, deep-state bureaucrats are spreading heinous lies about Pete Hegseth; defaming his character and his family in an attempt to tear him **_DOWN_** and make him **_WITHDRAW_** his nomination.

If we let Pete Hegseth **_FALL_** to the **_WOKE MOB_** – they’ll be **_NOTHING_** stopping them from going after President Trump, his **_ENTIRE_** administration, and eventually **_YOU._**

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmmtf0ob5maa01ubpjqtt632bnu3brh12hn0vuog_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2p72c5h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4cirdofhrhbr7mkegvbdrl0gb432k45jtd6obi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2p72c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za3g4tf5v3qp437lm01h8okf85phvnpgvtm47mm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge2p72c5h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq1g8tsbk3f69grtgcl4pphg9avipq9m8q3ngr30_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdsgms6d577nlasikes5dfl92tfpbbsq08t8srd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlp74vthsnu6eu1h4ccot1sbnoca1kgalfe70jr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm3mqr9bgjsi7iti0v9e57062inicfvvu288rgv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg9d708b6autamco0qubq1gf4aaq6cissrb0bqc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpjm2p71cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zef93lbos608fd622rmut784dj18t6037ro379n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zoljv3ot31psgen2j4391fs697vjc0rnefs102fo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5g61pr3c9hm49fg)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I’ve received threats... but I won’t stop
body:
This is where the madness needs to end because it’s not just sports where the radical gender ideology movement is dominating.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zufj8mgb0hr2gpogva20gc8rg2sf5a005em7b8hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

**This is a deeply personal email, but I want to tell you why it’s critical for us to take back our culture and education from the radical left... not just in sports, but even in children’s books. **

My story begins at the University of Kentucky. I was on the swim team. I am a 12-time NCAA all-American, 5x SEC champion, and SEC record holder in the butterfly.

But then it all changed for a photo-op.

In March of 2022, I and other female swimmers were forced to compete with a male, Lia Thomas. We watched as this male swam to a title, beating out Olympians and other record holders. Despite tying Lia to the 100th of a second, the NCAA denied me the trophy because the NCAA claimed it was necessary to have Lia Thomas hold the trophy while photos were being taken.

The radical left reduced everything I worked my entire life for down to a photo op.

But that’s not all...

I was forced to share locker rooms with a 6’4” man.

**_This is where the madness needs to end because it’s not just sports where the radical gender ideology movement is dominating_.**

Now, children’s literature is injected with this radical gender ideology movement.

[You can help me STOP this madness by making an urgent donation to SkyTree Book Fairs, which is combating Scholastic’s transgender woke propaganda, by creating a wholesome and age-appropriate book fair alternative for parents, students, and educators. Click here to donate ANY amount!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0eblrhbd7ejrtfdc8vvkqnkfilgespc5t972c7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

Some of the books are too gross to even share with you on this email. But here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp62dvqn1afok75c112snb26osn7gih42huqvjs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)
Full stop: This needs to end. No compromising. No more excuses.

While Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs, one organization is fighting back, and I am urgently asking for you to support them as you have supported my fight to defend women’s sports.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

[Can you help me raise $50,000 in the next 48 hours toward SkyTree in order for them to host dozens of book fairs? Click here to chip in $35, $50, or even $100. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2ijm0arun49035lsgvgbolc4gliuuuhif4ouilo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs) [Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqf3lefvs5qiitjqro4eq8hde1h7hm5gt253dodg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)
**Why this matters:**

You may remember Scholastic book fairs. All the kids used to love it when they came to school. It was a catalog of all the stories I got to read. It used to be an innocent event.

Unfortunately, that’s all changed.

Scholastic now promotes woke, radical LGBT books. They promote a radical agenda over the well-being of kids.

And make no mistake, Scholastic is the nation’s leading hotbed. Ellie Berger, president of Scholastic’s trade publishing division, wrote, “We pledge to stand with you as we redouble our efforts to combat the laws restricting children’s access to books.”

With over 120,000 book fairs a year, Scholastic is the biggest pusher of transgender, woke propaganda to school children.

That’s why it’s urgent we create more SkyTree book fairs.

SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

However, SkyTree Book Fairs is a David VS. Goliath battle.

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more racially divisive storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $4,500 to host each book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. [Donate $10 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2pg19st819o4skdgk0k4ruo7011l368b6q6coc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgm0d6vkhhsoi8jtkk30so3nnkn3pp2g15ljmhj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zno7ropnfv7oqffsrnbioobe0pe9ench772md7b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmkp671flduri94ubfm4cua4df66cl48mc4n6ab0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbr4fmn04f5iupdjf8dfjq6qglg71qefojtpehs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zporp2hod8s643lco4tfhg4u8lds4idrqcjv4pv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6to72ng9no8pck0k8g9ih4tc6ppmr2d2dj75878_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

[Sponsor a SkyTree book fair for $4,500 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkoniqv7nmthsmhr9jpkc298tho9au22rhdvhtlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4pltve51bqrrm16kkh1p144dmcn13n2rnstmpa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor2cdh2bs)
Since I began sharing my story, I’ve received death threats and ugly and twisted threatening messages on social media. The media has labeled me an extremist.

_I’ve even been physically assaulted by a mob of transgender activists_.

But I’m not afraid.

**Instead I think of what God tells us in _Romans 8:18:_**__I consider that our present sufferings are not worth comparing with the glory that will be revealed in us__.

You and I must take on this battle. We’re called to do so.

Let’s step up and provide children with a positive alternative to what’s happening in Scholastic book fairs by supporting SkyTree.

I hope you will join me in supporting SkyTree to ensure that children have access to high-quality literature that aligns with our most cherished values and principles.

Thank you,

Riley Gaines

SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023.
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs9vcitanc2dqe3oc9uotq2ornq8qpnr513h86po_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5g61pr3c9hm49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zho6r8m80nt572n824q9tflthor85qqni5bmtvig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zue4p4idmqq1vq9lh0lr47qel04bqikeofl87m2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor6c3h2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

American Action News

clean_body: In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. | | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling. Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry. While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state. In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic. Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform. The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma. When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic. You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events. Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Trump Administration Alert [via NRSC]
subject: The next four years are going to be better than we could have ever imagined
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

If you had any doubts about President Trump's selection for the next Attorney General of the United States, think again.

**[Here's what nominee Pam Bondi had to say about the weaponization of government these last four years under the Biden-Harris Administration:](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-TNntZLLuRv_54eEU03zFw~~/AAVLBgA~)**

**["When Republicans take back the White House... you know what's going to happen? The Department of Justice, the prosecutors will be prosecuted -- the bad ones -- the investigators will be investigated..."](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-TNntZLLuRv_54eEU03zFw~~/AAVLBgA~)**

[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-TNntZLLuRv_54eEU03zFw~~/AAVLBgA~)

We think Pam Bondi is going to be an EXCELLENT Attorney General, along with the rest of President Trump's cabinet members. **[Do you agree with us, friend?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-TNntZLLuRv_54eEU03zFw~~/AAVLBgA~)** Now is your chance to make your voice heard.

**[Take the NRSC TRUMP CABINET APPROVAL SURVEY before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to let us know what you think.>>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-TNntZLLuRv_54eEU03zFw~~/AAVLBgA~)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4hkeip6f0ntkitqvfqblkkkrs1294b4m0dj8lbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor1c5h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z64fbi5cnr4g7k0dqnmkd8j5skqpg09k1nsnb2ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor1c5h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8f99odalearpc9o66730n61idrj50gu84toc3e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor1c5h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjv64vcsl9ib5ebf75p9db1ci0v2i0t2qe6nort0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor1c5h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ub716d5i0050cko5iv37dd04p0vpiol5en06l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1geeor1c5h2bs)
---

GOP Presidential
