name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zidnnjnt9n51u5u2quc1e7kkk5bln3cr9rhv1bc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge1pb2cdh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7h3eku1968h4r4t2a23lh8o60ehbcomu5gi977g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge1pb2cdh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgjmp8m2t1hs4e9si85sucummlrd4ugrku9rs6tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge1pb2cdh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm20pvd63tq82rh2qrhg6bldqig2f646tnvn69q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge1pb2cdh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zps39luhl02hdh0l0iscd92p297s8g9gr7nkmf80_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36ctgm9pb6c8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5g61o75c9hm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo9dh73bo394j76bkdqvkaea694ev2u58qp6uke0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge1pb2cdh2bs)_

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1r5oc428t23sfmu6cnvd1ssd2fmifn8um09jn68_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge1pb2clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zde0tkeje0gsr87cg6akf40aeksias1ur0fl4pmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ge1pb2clh2bs)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

name: Gene Hamilton (America First Legal)
subject: Enormous Victory Against Mass Amnesty
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWsOhkFWZN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWsOhkFWZN

Fellow Patriot,

It has been a huge week for us at America First Legal.

I want to share news of an enormous legal victory we won in
court: Our team at America First Legal, working with Texas
Attorney General Ken Paxton and a coalition of other courageous
state Attorneys General won a lawsuit to stop the Biden-Harris
Administration's DHS from granting administrative amnesty and a
fast track pathway to citizenship for hundreds of thousands of
illegal aliens in the United States.

DONATE HERE

As you know, the Biden-Harris Administration has dedicated
itself to the decimation of our immigration system and the
erasure of our borders.

America First Legal was built to fight the Deep State and win.
That's why your support of America First Legal is so important-
we do the heavy lifting in the courtroom that stops the
far-left's malicious attempts to transform and destroy America
cold.

Please support our work so we can continue to Save America >>
Thank you!

Gene Hamilton

Executive Director, America First Legal

DONATE FAST

America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section
501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to America First Legal
Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

name: Al Canata
subject: “America is in the fast lane to bankruptcy.”
body:
We’re facing a financial crisis of historic proportions.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsdc8h0gqkft6qku8tnq21kh4ph1ghe2dtesqpu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)
Friend,

We’re facing a financial crisis of historic proportions. Our national debt is now over $35 trillion and growing every day.

That’s $106,538 owed per citizen!

The debt burden is so heavy that even just the interest payments are unmanageable.

**As Elon Musk recently tweeted,_“Interest payments on just federal government debt now exceed the entire Defense Department budget! America is in the fast lane to bankruptcy.”_**

I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships for the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). We are dedicated to holding Congress accountable and ensuring they prioritize fiscal responsibility over pet projects and pork-barrel spending.

We’re sounding the alarm, but we can’t do it alone.

We need Americans who are committed to our country’s future and who believe that responsible, limited government is key to long-term prosperity.

[Will you stand with us today to protect your hard-earned money? Please consider a donation of $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us put a stop to Washington’s reckless spending.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvcev8ds12lnv7e7p12ain89h1mo5ts3j0kn19i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfsvua5r9or1jdobuf7citj2acrog873u3c4p5d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)
The danger isn’t just in our debt’s sheer size — it’s in the long-term costs that will weigh on our economy, threaten jobs, and limit future opportunities for our children and grandchildren.

**Just this year, American taxpayers will pay nearly $900 billion in interest payments alone.**

That’s money we’re sending straight to bondholders instead of investing in our people, our defense, or our infrastructure.

NTU is fighting back by:
* Advocating for spending reform to cut the waste and prioritize real needs.
* Pushing for transparency in federal budgets so you can see where every dollar goes.
* Building coalitions in Congress that stand for fiscal sanity and responsibility.

**This year, we have a chance to make a difference. Your support today could be the tipping point that helps us hold the line on reckless spending and change course before it’s too late. Can we count on you?**

Make a donation today of $15, $25, or even $50 to keep our voices loud and strong in Washington.
[Donate $10](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6cqd27ldhq06pb15ob0nu36o32uda1lspqjq4ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0tkjhga9r4mtqv5ba0hro7iojim6jrev5cqeogg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zomptmdhdfj5npcna6gqmkbnaplk90e58lgu1dno_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9mbv8a04rl6md4vv2qvle5f0lard1de384q43a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zool4bsud9u5jo4g68tovde2nl61obigiq12ogi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zias6522cebpqs7a3u294rr8usl90i1npt2bveb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6j3ol6ba541eetd8suges2e0fmhgv8la7km8q40_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zch1dkpfga6qi2njnhv60409du2jp5k1fp15mtkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)
Billions that could be used to strengthen our economy, provide services, or secure our nation are instead wasted on servicing debt from years of reckless spending.

The fight won’t be easy, but the stakes are simply too high. Together, we can change the way Washington spends and hold politicians accountable for protecting your future.

_Thank you for standing with us in this critical moment_.

The National Taxpayers Union is the longest-serving organization in America fighting for taxpayers. Our mission is to achieve favorable, pro-taxpayer policy outcomes using the most effective team on Capitol Hill and in the states.

With your support, NTU can continue to achieve tangible results for taxpayers.

**Congress will be back in Washington in just a few weeks, ready to spend more out of an empty pocket. We have to be ready! Please click below to donate today.**
[Donate](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9gd99f3r0imvp3otktvms9n1oa671s7u9ggib3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie8oj4cjh2bs)
Thank you,

Al Canata
Vice President of Strategic Partnerships
National Taxpayers Union

The National Taxpayers Union is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to the National Taxpayers Union are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution.

---

Updates for Great Americans
---

Our national debt is now over $35 trillion and growing every day. That’s $106,538 owed per citizen! The debt burden is so heavy that even just the interest payments are unmanageable. As Elon Musk recently tweeted,“Interest payments on just federal government debt now exceed the entire Defense Department budget! America is in the fast lane to bankruptcy.” I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships for the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). We are dedicated to holding Congress accountable and ensuring they prioritize fiscal responsibility over pet projects and pork-barrel spending. We’re sounding the alarm, but we can’t do it alone. We need Americans who are committed to our country’s future and who believe that responsible, limited government is key to long-term prosperity. The danger isn’t just in our debt’s sheer size — it’s in the long-term costs that will weigh on our economy, threaten jobs, and limit future opportunities for our children and grandchildren. Just this year, American taxpayers will pay nearly $900 billion in interest payments alone. That’s money we’re sending straight to bondholders instead of investing in our people, our defense, or our infrastructure. NTU is fighting back by: Advocating for spending reform to cut the waste and prioritize real needs. Pushing for transparency in federal budgets so you can see where every dollar goes. Building coalitions in Congress that stand for fiscal sanity and responsibility. This year, we have a chance to make a difference. Your support today could be the tipping point that helps us hold the line on reckless spending and change course before it’s too late. Can we count on you? Make a donation today of $15, $25, or even $50 to keep our voices loud and strong in Washington. Billions that could be used to strengthen our economy, provide services, or secure our nation are instead wasted on servicing debt from years of reckless spending. The fight won’t be easy, but the stakes are simply too high. Together, we can change the way Washington spends and hold politicians accountable for protecting your future. Thank you for standing with us in this critical moment. The National Taxpayers Union is the longest-serving organization in America fighting for taxpayers. Our mission is to achieve favorable, pro-taxpayer policy outcomes using the most effective team on Capitol Hill and in the states. With your support, NTU can continue to achieve tangible results for taxpayers. Congress will be back in Washington in just a few weeks, ready to spend more out of an empty pocket. We have to be ready! Please click below to donate today.** Thank you, Al Canata Vice President of Strategic Partnerships National Taxpayers Union The National Taxpayers Union is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to the National Taxpayers Union are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Russia and the United States
body:
You’ll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia’s enigmatic relationship with the West today

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zslerfto00ur3lke3ei6aq4d0h432h31facu8sig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie4p32cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Winston Churchill once described Russia as "a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma"--words that still ring true.

But given Russia's current war with Ukraine--and Russia's role in the shifting balance of power in today's world--a better understanding of Russia is critical.

Since Peter the Great, Russia's place among nations has only grown. As it transformed itself from a regional backwater to a great power, its politics and culture influenced significant events in our own history.

At the time of the American Revolution, for instance, Russia was the first nation to recognize the U.S. as a sovereign state. And in the Cold War period between World War Two and the fall of the Soviet Union in 1991, American-Russian relations became the focus of world attention.

**The need for a better understanding of post-Cold War Russia, in light of its current importance and its long history as one of the world 's great powers, is why Hillsdale College has created a [FREE online video series on Russia](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z01rpaj9l1g8sbnt6uf6qa4eid4f61g66gdofubg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie4p32cdh2bs). **

In our online video series, based on a recent conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about Russian history--including the "Greats" such as Peter and Catherine--with special attention to the Russian Revolution through the fall of the Soviet Union.

The video series also explores Russia's significant contributions to literature, through such authors as Dostoyevsky and Tolstoy--and to classical music, through such composers such as Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff.

**You 'll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia's enigmatic relationship with the West today, and about the causes and complications of the current Ukraine war. **

You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/russia-cca](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh20g8svv2arib3ivlcms84jvg2fttg1qipmbjrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1ie4p32cdh2bs)

**Please use the secure link above to immediately receive your video series on Russia.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **
**

clean_body: You’ll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia’s enigmatic relationship with the West today This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Winston Churchill once described Russia as "a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma"--words that still ring true. But given Russia's current war with Ukraine--and Russia's role in the shifting balance of power in today's world--a better understanding of Russia is critical. Since Peter the Great, Russia's place among nations has only grown. As it transformed itself from a regional backwater to a great power, its politics and culture influenced significant events in our own history. At the time of the American Revolution, for instance, Russia was the first nation to recognize the U.S. as a sovereign state. And in the Cold War period between World War Two and the fall of the Soviet Union in 1991, American-Russian relations became the focus of world attention. The need for a better understanding of post-Cold War Russia, in light of its current importance and its long history as one of the world 's great powers, is why Hillsdale College has created a . In our online video series, based on a recent conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about Russian history--including the "Greats" such as Peter and Catherine--with special attention to the Russian Revolution through the fall of the Soviet Union. The video series also explores Russia's significant contributions to literature, through such authors as Dostoyevsky and Tolstoy--and to classical music, through such composers such as Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff. You 'll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia's enigmatic relationship with the West today, and about the causes and complications of the current Ukraine war. You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: Please use the secure link above to immediately receive your video series on Russia. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zu8pahq4chd8b2n5o0m2tk6rv0bsvopmhneu1fk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1iecp72c1h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztbamcgc0rcc4s7vf6g1qnemt6f8acq8kbsno6i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1iecp72c1h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zigvirev080jgsiml16objvp9k18q46b3dpegn08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1iecp72c1h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z088v52id6g8fifkt0r3qnv70khdeumpufrdv3tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1iecp72c1h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Real American Reporting

We need an OVERWHELMING and IMMEDIATE response right here - right NOW. | 200,000 names are needed BEFORE the end of the day for us to stop the WOKE MOB’S ASSAULT on Trump’s TOP ALLY. | | | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson | | PO Box 53058 Amarillo, TX 79159 | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| Greater Georgia Newsletter December 13, 2024
---
| As we look toward the end of the year and set our sights on the 2025 election cycle, we wanted to thank all of Greater Georgia's supporters, volunteers, and partners. With your help, Greater Georgia achieved major milestones - working tirelessly throughout 2024 to register new voters, engage diverse communities, and get them to the polls.
This year, we registered over 11,000 voters and made more than 14 million voter contacts \- helping to secure conservative leadership at both the state and federal levels. President Trump will now return to the White House in less than two months with a clear mandate for change, and he'll be supported by strong conservative majorities in the Georgia House and Senate.
We are proud of these successes, but there is more work to do. Over the last four years, we have grown to become the state's leading conservative voter registration and mobilization group, and we look forward to continuing our efforts to build Georgia's conservative infrastructure so that every voter's voice is heard. We're also especially excited to play an active role during the upcoming legislative session, which begins in just a few short weeks.
---

| Greater Georgia recently announced that, this year, we registered 7,000 new conservative voters and re-engaged over 4,000 inactive conservative voters, helping to ensure decisive conservative wins up and down the ballot. Since 2021, Greater Georgia has registered or re-engaged more than 55,000 conservatives. You can read more about Greater Georgia's voter registration efforts [HERE](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ8HwZfD8VsGFL6p0n1blnWt4mLGAZYdcEpCyL58ifLoxWiVXcEIgIloluqFTDphKl6tGVxWjXKcFbrX74eeqlHxQdApC1v3nuWrEkNz4JIMcTXldW5qYrPruZrP7SKzXcfPnqe-vQiT5T_36TemKudN_VSR0s8JkU8sD-55RKNO6anir2i1x1o-YhsbNkwS7X1&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==).

| Chairwoman Loeffler highlights Greater Georgia's GOTV

| | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ81soHQR-A961qi310LZGCQsKD8itW8aGLH4HPYcDwvW8y6bzh0FCMz72cwtjtQqvmzJltLltlbALw9F40VGlZ_rlzu3q0docZyfkYfLLDRrpM-ka6xZZLuQQynNzApvKdM6XUVlmPdvl7ivQr7XX645Li4AXooFOVXi3MqqP9oFypnqj7S7Rz7g==&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==)

| Last month, Chairwoman Loeffler applauded Greater Georgia's get-out-the-vote efforts, which helped deliver historic victories. Leading up to the election, the group invested in multiple six-figure GOTV campaigns - making more than 14,000,000 voter contacts. Greater Georgia targeted and saw gains from Black, Hispanic, and Asian voters, voters aged 18-29, South Georgia voters impacted by Hurricane Helene, and low-propensity voters in North Georgia. Read more about Greater Georgia's successes [HERE](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ81soHQR-A961qi310LZGCQsKD8itW8aGLH4HPYcDwvW8y6bzh0FCMz72cwtjtQqvmzJltLltlbALw9F40VGlZ_rlzu3q0docZyfkYfLLDRrpM-ka6xZZLuQQynNzApvKdM6XUVlmPdvl7ivQr7XX645Li4AXooFOVXi3MqqP9oFypnqj7S7Rz7g==&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==).

| IN THE NEWS
---
| | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ8IbqaT546gIgCGG6wSeo8_z6A0_o1QjMgetThNsHF8FfxCmetv02_3f4ssGZrNYcGun6rTEcP8wPCMdueci6kapcJBm0izdp1WR6gMAodXc0naz4mBIn9UT2XtDJ84CcPl-WQeJxsSUEXsJ42b82R0hRCoMlVQn0Nu4tQwiSrDF0UZlD0n8NOvsCtGe3xoQaX&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==)

| This month, President Trump [announced](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ8lnqCFVpXoEJJNGV2fd_TgGig3dKwLFmKsQvPPiq8ONNcRKqFktEMGgiWco2bmc8pDpQJpV-RCHLIv8TlnE3Mqy4zOEhQLmBsevciC26_CcDN3eJUTV0_aVsDue2cAzVh-XOJ1K_2fBaf-bgr1CqTzg==&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==) his intention to nominate Chairwoman Loeffler to serve as the next Administrator of the U.S. Small Business Administration. As he said:
"Kelly will bring her experience in business and Washington to reduce red tape, and unleash opportunity for our Small Businesses to grow, innovate, and thrive. She will focus on ensuring that SBA is accountable to Taxpayers by cracking down on waste, fraud, and regulatory overreach. Kelly was a tremendous fighter in the U.S. Senate during the first Trump Administration, including helping to pass the first ever bill to protect Women in Sports. Prior to her tenure in the U.S. Senate, Kelly built a 25 year career in financial services and technology. Along with her amazing husband, Jeff, she helped build a Fortune 500 company from 100 employees to over 10,000, as Executive VP. She and Jeff also helped me secure the Big Election Win in Georgia!"
Chairwoman Loeffler was honored to accept his nomination. As she [wrote](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ88Z8TSyCs5B1eoj84WBAdRboZUqMxbO3U4j57aFJWZXyJ5wJFofovsST3mRG1VE9g6slv8kJW-gEQLTi_hU-RVLlbmGyzWutwp3oW2ZyPTCJ6Mrvt-gI4pQnQ8Jx8AqTX&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==):
"As a fellow entrepreneur and business leader, I am deeply honored to accept President Trump's nomination to serve as SBA Administrator. Small businesses are huge for America. They're the beating heart of our economy and the gateway to the American Dream. The America First Agenda will unleash a new era of growth and opportunity for job creators and innovators!"
Read more about Chairwoman Loeffler's nomination [HERE](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ8IbqaT546gIgCGG6wSeo8_z6A0_o1QjMgetThNsHF8FfxCmetv02_3f4ssGZrNYcGun6rTEcP8wPCMdueci6kapcJBm0izdp1WR6gMAodXc0naz4mBIn9UT2XtDJ84CcPl-WQeJxsSUEXsJ42b82R0hRCoMlVQn0Nu4tQwiSrDF0UZlD0n8NOvsCtGe3xoQaX&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==).

| Chairwoman Loeffler was also honored to be selected to co-chair President Trump's inaugural committee alongside fellow business leader Steve Witkoff. As she [said](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ8hAnF6TB4cwolKVGmVlvxaatEdPwP-IfCXvCNvom3650SOY3jSirtNa8LP0qvXRlp2V3BIakjorYvha6x55tj3YMhgJ5VEPHrSwOmpa2Cigypg3T3_qJCXw9ULa7t3kG7&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==), the committee looks forward to delivering a very special celebration that honors the American people, the promise of our nation, and President Trump's triumphant return to the White House. Read more about Chairwoman Loeffler's selection [HERE](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xm8f70qk_XZ2rYi4Rt42ztFLBtuUBEErKflQ7rIr_pV16NDcTtv62P-EzOFvbdJ8noDidaRfcs74pVRI2ONFEr5zaOpeLmfCnRLqr1clbBx63K8e3ip8S1Iw2ZXeJ73yNX_v8YaR1w4xd3SUvXZ6HbPmSpq9sIdy7bVAFgVUfcCCp6XErX7Q_BP6bDLgcr-DeM-drKtZ5NeFakPHOf2xQ5vpvWaMJ4611xciBhNqT0sUjheCuAVUU3gY8hGvYTTz&c=RAokVjGuVgjsSnBE-dwuxnqlJ000jOG-zZDrDgwZ5vUr1WovBvZ8JA==&ch=z8pkOx0bED8XtjsuIbsaU_EhTtFES_Nly6Ix01bp37VPX7Ls3WlQFg==).

clean_body: | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter December 13, 2024 | As we look toward the end of the year and set our sights on the 2025 election cycle, we wanted to thank all of Greater Georgia's supporters, volunteers, and partners. With your help, Greater Georgia achieved major milestones - working tirelessly throughout 2024 to register new voters, engage diverse communities, and get them to the polls. This year, we registered over 11,000 voters and made more than 14 million voter contacts \- helping to secure conservative leadership at both the state and federal levels. President Trump will now return to the White House in less than two months with a clear mandate for change, and he'll be supported by strong conservative majorities in the Georgia House and Senate. We are proud of these successes, but there is more work to do. Over the last four years, we have grown to become the state's leading conservative voter registration and mobilization group, and we look forward to continuing our efforts to build Georgia's conservative infrastructure so that every voter's voice is heard. We're also especially excited to play an active role during the upcoming legislative session, which begins in just a few short weeks. | | | LATEST FROM GREATER GEORGIA | Greater Georgia announces voter registration results for 2024 | | == | Greater Georgia recently announced that, this year, we registered 7,000 new conservative voters and re-engaged over 4,000 inactive conservative voters, helping to ensure decisive conservative wins up and down the ballot. Since 2021, Greater Georgia has registered or re-engaged more than 55,000 conservatives. You can read more about Greater Georgia's voter registration efforts ==. | Chairwoman Loeffler highlights Greater Georgia's GOTV | | == | Last month, Chairwoman Loeffler applauded Greater Georgia's get-out-the-vote efforts, which helped deliver historic victories. Leading up to the election, the group invested in multiple six-figure GOTV campaigns - making more than 14,000,000 voter contacts. Greater Georgia targeted and saw gains from Black, Hispanic, and Asian voters, voters aged 18-29, South Georgia voters impacted by Hurricane Helene, and low-propensity voters in North Georgia. Read more about Greater Georgia's successes ==. | | | IN THE NEWS | | == | This month, President Trump == his intention to nominate Chairwoman Loeffler to serve as the next Administrator of the U.S. Small Business Administration. As he said: "Kelly will bring her experience in business and Washington to reduce red tape, and unleash opportunity for our Small Businesses to grow, innovate, and thrive. She will focus on ensuring that SBA is accountable to Taxpayers by cracking down on waste, fraud, and regulatory overreach. Kelly was a tremendous fighter in the U.S. Senate during the first Trump Administration, including helping to pass the first ever bill to protect Women in Sports. Prior to her tenure in the U.S. Senate, Kelly built a 25 year career in financial services and technology. Along with her amazing husband, Jeff, she helped build a Fortune 500 company from 100 employees to over 10,000, as Executive VP. She and Jeff also helped me secure the Big Election Win in Georgia!" Chairwoman Loeffler was honored to accept his nomination. As she ==: "As a fellow entrepreneur and business leader, I am deeply honored to accept President Trump's nomination to serve as SBA Administrator. Small businesses are huge for America. They're the beating heart of our economy and the gateway to the American Dream. The America First Agenda will unleash a new era of growth and opportunity for job creators and innovators!" Read more about Chairwoman Loeffler's nomination ==. | | == | Chairwoman Loeffler was also honored to be selected to co-chair President Trump's inaugural committee alongside fellow business leader Steve Witkoff. As she ==, the committee looks forward to delivering a very special celebration that honors the American people, the promise of our nation, and President Trump's triumphant return to the White House. Read more about Chairwoman Loeffler's selection ==. | | | INTERNSHIP APPLICATIONS NOW OPEN Greater Georgia is now accepting internship applications for Spring 2025. Every semester, we are proud to hire college students and recent college graduates for paid internships with our organization. Anyone who is passionate about the conservative movement is encouraged to apply. | | == | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | | | | | | | | | WHAT WE'RE READING | == Sen. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: Russia and the United States
body:
You’ll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia’s enigmatic relationship with the West today

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkD3P2yAUhX8N3mzxcYPtgeGVHE9JWrVDR4vAxUECbAFu1X9fpU3U9V3Plc59nvPjuly1Dz6tNx1RuZCXXJakl4cPoc1HKV63xuiFUw4t4y0TC2usomy0AA0q1gugA5Mn2jwUO_WDY2YExtHBnUrEE2gJ0o1usNo2Xj17GGeCDiBZ3zknOQWQhls94sAIUB0w185lRLtFnWzwd8z1d8Z9y7UzW2yCetS6FyI-CJ8Jn31yW_cELlYH7NAehM__2YmYiyFionQEfqMc-IXK6ct0Pn8nXB41LmU7skEipj1vZUdTfVpfp4jWH5GICaP24RUaHXft10TE9O_NO99SxVSJmL5-tPPlW_u2bbKy-y8fgi-yJ0DXZ9lfl_rZzX8q_icAAP__uI2IjA)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Winston Churchill once described Russia as "a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma"--words that still ring true.

But given Russia's current war with Ukraine--and Russia's role in the shifting balance of power in today's world--a better understanding of Russia is critical.

Since Peter the Great, Russia's place among nations has only grown. As it transformed itself from a regional backwater to a great power, its politics and culture influenced significant events in our own history.

At the time of the American Revolution, for instance, Russia was the first nation to recognize the U.S. as a sovereign state. And in the Cold War period between World War Two and the fall of the Soviet Union in 1991, American-Russian relations became the focus of world attention.

**The need for a better understanding of post-Cold War Russia, in light of its current importance and its long history as one of the world 's great powers, is why Hillsdale College has created a [FREE online video series on Russia](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkD3P2yAUhX8N3mzxcYPtgeGVHE9JWrVDR4vAxUECbAFu1X9fpU3U9V3Plc59nvPjuly1Dz6tNx1RuZCXXJakl4cPoc1HKV63xuiFUw4t4y0TC2usomy0AA0q1gugA5Mn2jwUO_WDY2YExtHBnUrEE2gJ0o1usNo2Xj17GGeCDiBZ3zknOQWQhls94sAIUB0w185lRLtFnWzwd8z1d8Z9y7UzW2yCetS6FyI-CJ8Jn31yW_cELlYH7NAehM__2YmYiyFionQEfqMc-IXK6ct0Pn8nXB41LmU7skEipj1vZUdTfVpfp4jWH5GICaP24RUaHXft10TE9O_NO99SxVSJmL5-tPPlW_u2bbKy-y8fgi-yJ0DXZ9lfl_rZzX8q_icAAP__uI2IjA). **

In our online video series, based on a recent conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about Russian history--including the "Greats" such as Peter and Catherine--with special attention to the Russian Revolution through the fall of the Soviet Union.

The video series also explores Russia's significant contributions to literature, through such authors as Dostoyevsky and Tolstoy--and to classical music, through such composers such as Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff.

**You 'll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia's enigmatic relationship with the West today, and about the causes and complications of the current Ukraine war. **

You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/russia-cca](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkD3P2yAUhX8N3mzxcYPtgeGVHE9JWrVDR4vAxUECbAFu1X9fpU3U9V3Plc59nvPjuly1Dz6tNx1RuZCXXJakl4cPoc1HKV63xuiFUw4t4y0TC2usomy0AA0q1gugA5Mn2jwUO_WDY2YExtHBnUrEE2gJ0o1usNo2Xj17GGeCDiBZ3zknOQWQhls94sAIUB0w185lRLtFnWzwd8z1d8Z9y7UzW2yCetS6FyI-CJ8Jn31yW_cELlYH7NAehM__2YmYiyFionQEfqMc-IXK6ct0Pn8nXB41LmU7skEipj1vZUdTfVpfp4jWH5GICaP24RUaHXft10TE9O_NO99SxVSJmL5-tPPlW_u2bbKy-y8fgi-yJ0DXZ9lfl_rZzX8q_icAAP__uI2IjA)

**Please use the secure link above to immediately receive your video series on Russia.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **
**

body:
We are just 2% shy of our goal!

| |
---
| | | **982,239 CONSERVATIVES HAVE STOOD UP TO CHINA
WE NEED 17,764 MORE TO MAKE THIS PETITION OFFICIAL**

---
| [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGOnDAQhp_GdEaeMWBvQXHKiSa6KEqT0pozs6y12CBjuHv8iE1SXbW1_c0_3z-_39wbhTmk6QdF7u8-u7y5cjiOkbOcllX6W0gkVy4OFTYSUIJ2UI39ePEddRX3YHSjLNhWVbcetYXWXlQLQAatAURQFx7fNREaa6vQn3MAQSvbdBrrK7RAur1i05grmFY0imbOpb4zr35JU-Zty7zu73PwlGq_xGrub6Wsm9AvAgeBw8Z-z1x_hJR5PH8IHApTlA8PgcNfiyvlOFMaT51QwpKkPnk95JPPIU1Cv5a8s8BuL9F5iiuFKQn9-m9pdD9f5Pdvv7AG0F0DrkBrjboYiaZFgR1_uhLGJ4BHzpIKp3KGH_Lus_xfkcDuc0_H14cq9-P6EeY5bJ0RjZoihflRTXnmikePfwIAAP__5vCcXg)
---

Hi Friend,

We're writing to alert you about a shocking development: **Communist China has spent a staggering $1.8 BILLION buying up our American farmland. **

This is a blatant attempt to undermine our national security and manipulate our food supply. But there's hope.

**Our Republican leadership 's official petition to stop China's land grab is just 2% shy of its goal. Listen, we're so close, but we need your help to push us over the finish line. YOUR signature could make all the difference: **

---
| | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGOnDAQhp_GdEaeMWBvQXHKiSa6KEqT0pozs6y12CBjuHv8iE1SXbW1_c0_3z-_39wbhTmk6QdF7u8-u7y5cjiOkbOcllX6W0gkVy4OFTYSUIJ2UI39ePEddRX3YHSjLNhWVbcetYXWXlQLQAatAURQFx7fNREaa6vQn3MAQSvbdBrrK7RAur1i05grmFY0imbOpb4zr35JU-Zty7zu73PwlGq_xGrub6Wsm9AvAgeBw8Z-z1x_hJR5PH8IHApTlA8PgcNfiyvlOFMaT51QwpKkPnk95JPPIU1Cv5a8s8BuL9F5iiuFKQn9-m9pdD9f5Pdvv7AG0F0DrkBrjboYiaZFgR1_uhLGJ4BHzpIKp3KGH_Lus_xfkcDuc0_H14cq9-P6EeY5bJ0RjZoihflRTXnmikePfwIAAP__5vCcXg)
---

name: Tom Cotton
subject: My Fox News Announcement [Trump’s Cabinet]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My prediction inside...

Friend,

On Fox News, I said that I expect our Republican Senate to confirm _**[all](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=795d9d637d01463493c8eabd49a2d806&_e=vCd8p6rbkjMOUhMFTr4jSp8S9FBN0eyB_Ry1Yi1FSoImb5MXwkR5zamSFiPd9fFHlaKWaIuX3U6tjgqc9pHH2moB-khpANgRyslRWqvdorzWqWR-BvAFw0rtBoPQm0HvdETdvkUvVIgbdUlYJ2o7TLh66s_xAYFfg2FljzmvEqa4t7pY_mHZ5cUh4UaA6Q6nXI6VrF2o9viOuUrT_lRyAZXDiRxHE1yq7U-ZBMC0zhIhh42sIZV8zCgm5w0zr0HOcfrRmxMug6Csyvk9mlmwjW5TCx51pH6cbqL6u2bdokstHldILnVm-dxDg8AWRUSTl7VgdE2Q0dN24n-YU0EkQTpvwNJZPwDBY_tT5_w87aox3PQ_KIqBnwo_cx5YYsW00TEh6P43xFZHIjjt52itzIUeOxIzDjHyVeJfTzn4N2MyN80GDEARQrFyRBODom8ujG0WAcQQRIDrpDlWMmfPBQ%3D%3D)**_ of President Trump's nominees.

No one should be surprised by that. President Trump and Senate Republicans won a historic victory, and it's our job to ensure President Trump has his team quickly in place.

_Just as your support was critical to our wins, your input is critical to our work to confirm President Trump 's nominees, and to make America strong again._

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs0Z_pFWsN

Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as
someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os0Z_pFWsN

Take it
from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole
life...

Take it
from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole
life...

Fellow
Conservative,
Please --
for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone
who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
You are
absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into
your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms
children.
You may
remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best,
Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.
But today
when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the
Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

And the
result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about
what you can and cannot say...
...and
they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean"
ideas.
Today you
have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are
turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly
values we love.
Today,
I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first
children's television show that actively fights back against the
groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical
values that made America great.
And it's
only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you.

Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.
This
ground-breaking live-action television show captivates
children...
...but
more importantly, it builds their character at the same time.
Imagine a
children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a
greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.
Courage,
honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a
biblical and traditional lens.
Imagine a
children's show that brings families together instead of driving
them apart.
Now
imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible.
Because I
can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding
Supporter.
Season
One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled
episodes planned.
And each
episode costs around $70,000 to produce.
I know
that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it
would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio.
And
obviously we won't work through Hollywood.
Hollywood
has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and
hijack our children.
We
parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to
rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture.
That's
why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to
help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.
Whether
you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything
higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are
needed and greatly appreciated.
As your
special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the
$35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses.
For example, if your Founding Supporter Gift is $50 you will
receive:
** All
ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family
to enjoy FREE on DVD.
** And a
FREE copy of my children's book: Pride Comes Before the Fall
which teaches children to be humble before God instead of
prideful.
It was my
honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write Pride Comes
Before the Fall with the great team at Brave Books -- the same
God-focused conservative team that's bringing Adventures with
Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life.
Maybe
you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News,
Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets.
Unabashed
conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson,
Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave
Book to stop the Hollywood groomers.
Supported
by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild
our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our
country was founded upon.
Now I
know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the
next ten minutes.
But I
hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter
of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.
Hollywood
groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we
rebuild from the ashes.
And it
starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with
faith and family -- not filth.
Thank you
for joining us as a Founding Supporter.

Sincerely,

Kirk
Cameron

DONATE

Brave
Books
13618
Poplar Cir, Suite 302
Conroe,
TX 77304

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Trump's Plan to Pardon January 6th Rioters
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vq6wb-nrpmb0-kyd76rh8/)
---
# **Trump's Plan to Pardon January 6th Rioters**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vq6wb-nrpmb1-kyd76rh9/)
---
| | | | folks, Donald Trump has made it **crystal clear** where his priorities lie: not with the American people, not with protecting democracy, but with **pardoning the violent rioters** who tried to overthrow our government on January 6th. On **day one** of his administration, Trump says he'll move to release those who stormed the Capitol, assaulted law enforcement, and left the world in shock. **This isn’t leadership—it’s lawlessness.** **_Let’s break it down:_** 1.) Trump is prioritizing **pardoning domestic terrorists** over addressing the needs of hardworking Americans. 2.) He called the conditions in which these criminals are held “filthy” and “disgusting,” but where’s his outrage for the brave officers who defended the Capitol that day? Where’s his concern for the **rule of law**? 3.) Even worse, Trump wants to target other politicians, such as**Liz Cheney and Adam Schiff** , suggesting they belong in jail for standing up to his lies and holding the rioters accountable. This is not about justice. This is about **revenge** and ensuring loyalty from extremists who will stop at nothing to dismantle our democracy. **Make no mistake:** Donald Trump is endorsing the violence and chaos of January 6th. By pardoning these individuals, he’s sending a dangerous message that attacking the Capitol was not only acceptable, but something he’s willing to excuse—if it helps him consolidate power. [**_We need to call this out! Our most powerful weapon right now is our voice, and we need to use it to call out injustices at every level of government. The people need to hold MAGA accountable, and we are going to use our platform to do just that. Join us in our fight today._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vq6wb-nrpmb2-kyd76rh0/)
---

body:
We’re going to clean up the corruption

Friend,

We're counting down the days until Inauguration Day.

| GREAT NEWS: Trump’s Postmaster General, Louis Dejoy, may finally get FIRED! But we need 25,000 Democrats to show their support and demand the USPS Board of Governors to fire Dejoy – and your signature is still missing. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0a71cdc-6e3c-4cad-9164-67bb81e64852/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [BEFORE MIDNIGHT, will you sign this petition to stop DeJoy from destroying the Postal Service?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8be4e7cc-f596-4a28-9241-3006a21108b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[FIRE LOUIS DEJOY →]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d48113f-218e-4a44-8797-e55bdba8cadb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter – Louis DeJoy tried to overturn our FREE AND FAIR ELECTION SYSTEM by sabotaging vote-by-mail and slow mail deliveries in 2020 to help Donald Trump. Now, the USPS Board of Governors is FINALLY considering firing DeJoy – but we need to show that enough of us want him OUT. [25,000 signatures are needed from Democrats like you, Peter, so sign the petition before 11:59 p.m. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td872ec7c-f373-4902-889c-af3f03de31e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com SIGNATURE: PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2921e1ef-7553-4e2c-ac94-f4403212df51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cc1cc0119b6b40889b5f6f0a23487be5&_e=7Ovl_5IpuiuRt9SX9hV0SER1g1uWp_cTOgqs_mSTxv2TgR6dU2801dcSSc5pMMtutA-1cjl97jcBSQhpMSxQFmJI3vxphmIQp2dNPRKvWfyIvu9q9fQWgx8sZD7vBUKka7AwM5UGG0blZeASHYVavca1NiEUh_hCnFjcD5IHJZjkD3pWQloYq2iCFlSgpHvoTi8KYZXb0Ugnt5UjzvI3U8KFu8TqhjTMboI6PfDDWAV9pBTf8_0vGUimOMzNufgEhwwRAjgN3uuIFLGtYNj7vourq1kmJlxIqu1ii6BnrRCvwowPG43ZQIlLHSTxFKQpEnh91hgCKZVjvONRe4cqF1s3q6wZbtqRipCIUMLUjzNKbH031kHtGzxrgpb_0VSm1Wk7c1sesnXDVJj18FZovw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81be3bffa3184a94ae6e97e32b55e880&_e=MSX8hqf8GE95FhtfDrV1UiG1L0bf-7g2zc86NJ0SqmNb-ngZNOZo21XkS6Gc_EqMg8OhawZb64HhTWLLWzircaTfw7s2BqJWo1ZQ0lxeejafyNMKKt6n_W5dUYRo1Y0iCOYM-xBc3PyuKo-T1_VY8OCvdL13FQAVRakdv8toRaNS8CpkXwcH8uACqxGnQ7Oqf7_pNVt2bdH7zY4oob9c0euIAE4U7Ns9oFVMt8Hm2bLlEzbSTNG-y68stT316Vy87WPmopDA53JrnzQgJ9zd4AoGB2bvxgiLm8Pw0Zrm1qP1uxnWtuzi1wQfB4Kqjs2ouypw9hxsek7wQiukcDr4tm-0YpDyceZ2jh3nB8bjA5YFDyj6IjdK0iidLXjIF2jP), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81be3bffa3184a94ae6e97e32b55e880&_e=MSX8hqf8GE95FhtfDrV1UiG1L0bf-7g2zc86NJ0SqmNb-ngZNOZo21XkS6Gc_EqMg8OhawZb64HhTWLLWzircaTfw7s2BqJWo1ZQ0lxeejafyNMKKt6n_W5dUYRo1Y0iCOYM-xBc3PyuKo-T1_VY8OCvdL13FQAVRakdv8toRaNS8CpkXwcH8uACqxGnQ7Oqf7_pNVt2bdH7zY4oob9c0euIAE4U7Ns9oFVMt8Hm2bJ5T10fVzx1fNkVQuwFepQfTduP_hOZHIsxmaOhecdgDNxI-UGw2d3fXee52wtc9wUCSTdSvv5ILwCVOXHNhfTokqyAXmG6FntYGEQemvEj-iUKPtaJxoPKNphj6GeME4lLtGc9fj5Wz359QTQOQZTU) [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81be3bffa3184a94ae6e97e32b55e880&_e=MSX8hqf8GE95FhtfDrV1UiG1L0bf-7g2zc86NJ0SqmNb-ngZNOZo21XkS6Gc_EqMg8OhawZb64HhTWLLWzircaTfw7s2BqJWo1ZQ0lxeejafyNMKKt6n_W5dUYRo1Y0iCOYM-xBc3PyuKo-T1_VY8OCvdL13FQAVRakdv8toRaNS8CpkXwcH8uACqxGnQ7Oqf7_pNVt2bdH7zY4oob9c0euIAE4U7Ns9oFVMt8Hm2bIRp7soLxg4sGttY7V2S60wUv_zX-_6RPcEwKRjXrEc24Bs2-XEBl2rkoQhEWYxoyuVPFuPBDh56B6hp16dfISqXQLeCF-wxypl-bGq-QwDqvNnCRS0msO-azFK1ws2Cbruqs7CGS8Q7WrkSnvrlMvP) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81be3bffa3184a94ae6e97e32b55e880&_e=MSX8hqf8GE95FhtfDrV1UiG1L0bf-7g2zc86NJ0SqmNb-ngZNOZo21XkS6Gc_EqMg8OhawZb64HhTWLLWzircaTfw7s2BqJWo1ZQ0lxeejafyNMKKt6n_W5dUYRo1Y0iCOYM-xBc3PyuKo-T1_VY8OCvdL13FQAVRakdv8toRaNS8CpkXwcH8uACqxGnQ7Oqf7_pNVt2bdH7zY4oob9c0euIAE4U7Ns9oFVMt8Hm2bIj7L8jdVDGoJm8WgzF-7qaIup6UYUxYm6qMS3j6_0XbcdS0cjsXVyCJETvoM_EG-EfnT5gUVwCIUTCglNKcEradF5qyFeGM2Izt4gaFqmVS1uIQGRjlcmT14U5Fp4JWzbbwomkRN-MZqxxzFASCLtF) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81be3bffa3184a94ae6e97e32b55e880&_e=MSX8hqf8GE95FhtfDrV1UiG1L0bf-7g2zc86NJ0SqmNb-ngZNOZo21XkS6Gc_EqMg8OhawZb64HhTWLLWzircaTfw7s2BqJWo1ZQ0lxeejafyNMKKt6n_W5dUYRo1Y0iCOYM-xBc3PyuKo-T1_VY8OCvdL13FQAVRakdv8toRaNS8CpkXwcH8uACqxGnQ7Oqf7_pNVt2bdH7zY4oob9c0euIAE4U7Ns9oFVMt8Hm2bLj2iqReKUzgDCXrFq9G2qKDCYSSjB2nEVa3wh7pN0EX-_E28T3Hg22bjUd8YmAB2GS-UJv0tyJ3M8LgkO2twB2UChBwHjHl9ADjgPtjcXBCrYJM0ItqQj6duGnElewmzAiKXpEUkgRil-DT4P0l2rw)

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1ad3f75926b4baf88be1d6aca46f9b1&_e=wXOIphoUd9ASt-QNf97Tqy2Tmsu7tNg03FcjS7RniuCzGAw9R2sGzB3SapImBtAYyG0dB4aEi-4X8QP183iKmovMRhIU7fXyh2TpdM7Q1EVHzf-X9QlFxAoELgxJ8FNMFZrQH3dfwIUFAiJkIsbNxHBX52m9BfTLm6URT6yKgX2PNdTsaW_voUaldzwhDluW8QnL0dqVVAKGNyQAWIXA1gdyn_o5485X-pzNtPnWqI-mfvv0k4SwMs6aSum5D7aVKbkfPBMggXiQ7EF2EGoU1BEX22He0I22aeTz6MezA8jaAKH0wKZdYqIBqWxkdm8caZbgw18K9-DpyGqmIumeDcAs9NPEAuoWfWUCn_8hD4WscIzvfPA4qiWvcn_ko199)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1ad3f75926b4baf88be1d6aca46f9b1&_e=wXOIphoUd9ASt-QNf97Tqy2Tmsu7tNg03FcjS7RniuCzGAw9R2sGzB3SapImBtAYyG0dB4aEi-4X8QP183iKmovMRhIU7fXyh2TpdM7Q1EVHzf-X9QlFxAoELgxJ8FNMFZrQH3dfwIUFAiJkIsbNxHBX52m9BfTLm6URT6yKgX2PNdTsaW_voUaldzwhDluW8QnL0dqVVAKGNyQAWIXA1gdyn_o5485X-pzNtPnWqI8NdEOc_IeF0WCwUo6N2HXigTpJqPWypfixc_IBdWEr0WaTVfrMI95Cwwi_o3Ky9xyQfvyL67gDN0QEaQUoGZYsb00yRbf4tbWs5-wGCMM6tazcpzHQ6fOx6C2jA15Ak00_kYnZHfOCIsMR_WIs6NJW)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

clean_body: In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling. Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry. While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state. In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic. Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform. The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma. When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic. You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events. Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Troy Downing
subject: This makes my blood boil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We have one shot to turn this around

| | | U.S. NATIONAL DEBT
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter,

This is Congressman-Elect Troy Downing, and I’m fired up.

Washington’s career politicians have dug us into a $36 TRILLION hole – _and they’re still spending like there’s no tomorrow._

**It’s reckless. It’s unsustainable. And it’s putting the future of our country at risk.**

But we CAN turn this ship around.

That’s why I’m ready to partner with bold leaders like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to launch the new Department of Government Efficiency – a game-changer that will transform our bloated bureaucracy and bring accountability to Washington’s runaway spending.

[**Now I need to hear from YOU:**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-nDVkyKmbQhLq4g70Rrg) What changes do you want to see in Washington? How can we make government work smarter and more efficiently for the American people?
---
[ SHARE YOUR FEEDBACK](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Your voice matters. Together, we can bring common sense and fiscal responsibility back to Washington.

In service,
Troy
---
---
|
