If you don't live in Senate District 10, then donate and then send your friends who do live in district 10 an invitation to show up and vote today.
If all of our supporters show up today we will win on the first ballot.
Who can you get to show up tonight to vote for me? The have from 4:30pm to 6:30 to be in line to register.
Who do you know who lives in? Amelia Appomattox Buckingham Cumberland Prince Edward Fluvanna Goochland Western Hanover Henrico (Shady Grove precinct) Louisa Powhatan
If they live in any of these counties have them check [here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014_Gnc5L5BbcMtRRIZZ1eo8KQ4ouzLaCnYiCXe4gWRbBGXCBORzlUblsbSaGR10wqKYTN1u49tjMmZIsswBY5d2UUIBjDFHw2y5vsFMgA4Kn2uKdCcwoSV7IKD16xUlLrQiG2_hNTwJs0wq8IGRAM4WId606ZhmhuQDoJbmauasHF_FwVYvZ-KA==&c=KpU0jMstdHEdIAKTdhJUGZUUm3bLNLUJBOBeYQMicHT7reKqOEygdQ==&ch=dP03UKJnGJZ5XYIfPskS5ttgDqO8u_5PDd5STO-SOXnzPgLd6G4DXQ==) to type in their home address to see if their current Senator is John McGuire. If yes, then they are eligible to vote.
The Republican Mass Meeting will be held TONIGHT, Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road.
Registration is at the door, and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote. Bring your driver's license and pack something for dinner. Eating is allowed in the gym.
Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Our campaign will be shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location.
PLEASE TEXT OUR SHUTTLE AT 703 407 5072 with your destination of where you are parked and our shuttle will pick you up.
There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Please see the map below for parking.
Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin.
Once voters are registered at the door, they will be given a wrist ban and asked to wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin.
Organizers have said you will want to eat before you come or bring something with you to eat while you wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin.
I've been advised there is no room for food trucks. So please plan accordingly. You may bring food and drinks into the gymnasium while you wait.
This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots:
Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely
Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50.1%.
If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50.1%, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place.
If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50.1%, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50.1%.
The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat.
Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat.
If you have any other questions about the Republican Mass Meeting please feel free to reply to this email and I will get organizers to answer them for you.

Thank you for taking time out of your very busy life to commit to be apart of Friday's Republican Mass Meeting.
You have chosen to be apart of history. You are tasked with a very important decision to make. You are one of only hundreds of people who will choose who will be our next state senator and who will be our voice to Richmond in the Virginia General Assembly.
The choice rests on each of you who shows up this Friday. Thank you for accepting the call to civic duty when called on, even during the Christmas holidays.
While there are 7 candidates seeking the Republican nomination, I'm the only candidate running who has actually served in the position which we are seeking- Virginia State Senator.
During that 8 year period, I received many awards for legislative achievements, many which you will find in a recent mailer and one that will be made available at the Republican Mass Meeting.
HERE'S WHAT MY SUPPORTERS ARE SAYING ABOUT ME:
* EXPERIENCED
* KNOWLEDGEABLE
* TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE
* SOLID 8 YEAR CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD
* PROVEN VOICE OF THE PEOPLE
* ONLY CANDIDATE WHO HAS ACTUALLY SERVED IN THE VIRGINIA SENATE
* FIGHTER FOR THE PEOPLE
* EFFECTIVE
* BRAVE
* COURAGEOUS

The candidate who wins this Republican Mass will face our Democrat opponent on Tuesday, January 7.
The day after this General Election, the Senate will gavel in within hours of this newly elected senator being elected.
Remember. The General Election is Tuesday, January 7. Hours later on Wednesday, January 8 at noon, the Virginia Senate gavels in. There is no time for training.
Do you want to elect a Senator who is controlled and told how to vote by staff?
As we speak, Senate Democrats are still in session and meeting in committee to load up the docket with a plethora of legislation to kill, steal and destroy- including a bill to enshrine late term abortion into our Virginia Constitution.
Virginia is in the political war of our lifetime to defend freedom and prosperity. We can't afford to send in an inexperienced senator.
Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in?
I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Why?
8 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE AS A STATE SENATOR I've actually served for 8 years in the Virginia Senate as a Virginia State Senator. No other candidate can make that claim.
8 YEARS OF KNOWLEDGE SERVING AS A STATE SENATOR Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway?
I know how things work in the General Assembly.
There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days.
Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time.
If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled.
There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed.
TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do?
SOLID CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD YOU CAN TRUST I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years.
How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%?
They can't.
PROVEN FIGHTER FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE PEOPLE Many of you have told me that you are supporting me because I'm a fighter. I've proven myself to you time and time again. You know you can trust me. I'm not a typical politician.
You say that I'm the voice of the people.
A HISTORY OF STANDING STRONG I have an 8 year plus history of standing strong for you during the gun grab of 2021, exposing the 2020 Presidential Election being stolen in 2020 and pushing back against tyrannical Covid mandates, like involuntary masking and Covid jabs.
I didn't just show up on the political scene a few months ago and ask to be your leader.
In order to change things for the better, you have to know how things work. I've done that. And I've been effective at flipping the political tables from top down to bottom up, putting the people in charge of their government. Thanks to my work, you can now watch committee meetings online and with the exception of this Special Election, you can now vote at your polling location instead of spending hours in cumbersome party election processes that suppress the vote and limit participation. I was the deciding vote that put an end to what we are doing on Friday. You should be able to conveniently vote at your local polling location and go home.
LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH THE NEW SENATE LEADERSHIP
I look forward to working with the new Republican Senate leadership.
Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate Republican Senate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases.
Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so.
I had to do it. Although I voluntarily chose to leave the Republican Senate Caucus in 2019, I plan to return in 2025. The Senate now has good conservative leadership that I have worked with effectively in the past. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office.
ENDORSEMENTS I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, a number of members of the Board of Supervisors and School Board in both Amelia County and Hanover Counties.
NOT A TYPICAL POLITICIAN I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity.
They can't buy me. I work for you- the people of Senate District 10.
MY CONSTITUENTS TRUST ME The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote.
We need a courageous, proven conservative leader with experience and knowledge to effectively serve Senate District 10 the day after they are sworn in. I have a conservative record you can trust, and I'm ready for battle day one.
For God & Country,
---

Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023

clean_body: Senate District 10 | | | | WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT TODAY | Election Day TODAY, Fri. 13th REGISTRATION AT THE DOOR 4:30PM-6:30PM bring your driver's license | NEED A LIFT? TEXT YOUR LOCATION TO OUR CHASE SHUTTLE AT 703 407 5072 | CHECK IN AT REGISTRATON & THEN CHECK IN WITH TEAM CHASE | Greetings!, If you live in Senate District 10, please vote today. If you don't live in Senate District 10, then donate and then send your friends who do live in district 10 an invitation to show up and vote today. If all of our supporters show up today we will win on the first ballot. Who can you get to show up tonight to vote for me? The have from 4:30pm to 6:30 to be in line to register. Who do you know who lives in? Amelia Appomattox Buckingham Cumberland Prince Edward Fluvanna Goochland Western Hanover Henrico (Shady Grove precinct) Louisa Powhatan If they live in any of these counties have them check == to type in their home address to see if their current Senator is John McGuire. If yes, then they are eligible to vote. The Republican Mass Meeting will be held TONIGHT, Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road. Registration is at the door, and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote. Bring your driver's license and pack something for dinner. Eating is allowed in the gym. Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Our campaign will be shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location. PLEASE TEXT OUR SHUTTLE AT 703 407 5072 with your destination of where you are parked and our shuttle will pick you up. There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Please see the map below for parking. Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin. Once voters are registered at the door, they will be given a wrist ban and asked to wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. Organizers have said you will want to eat before you come or bring something with you to eat while you wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. I've been advised there is no room for food trucks. So please plan accordingly. You may bring food and drinks into the gymnasium while you wait. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots: Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50.1%. If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50.1%, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place. If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50.1%, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50.1%. The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat. Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat. If you have any other questions about the Republican Mass Meeting please feel free to reply to this email and I will get organizers to answer them for you. | | Thank you for taking time out of your very busy life to commit to be apart of Friday's Republican Mass Meeting. You have chosen to be apart of history. You are tasked with a very important decision to make. You are one of only hundreds of people who will choose who will be our next state senator and who will be our voice to Richmond in the Virginia General Assembly. The choice rests on each of you who shows up this Friday. Thank you for accepting the call to civic duty when called on, even during the Christmas holidays. While there are 7 candidates seeking the Republican nomination, I'm the only candidate running who has actually served in the position which we are seeking- Virginia State Senator. During that 8 year period, I received many awards for legislative achievements, many which you will find in a recent mailer and one that will be made available at the Republican Mass Meeting. HERE'S WHAT MY SUPPORTERS ARE SAYING ABOUT ME: EXPERIENCED KNOWLEDGEABLE TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE SOLID 8 YEAR CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD PROVEN VOICE OF THE PEOPLE ONLY CANDIDATE WHO HAS ACTUALLY SERVED IN THE VIRGINIA SENATE FIGHTER FOR THE PEOPLE EFFECTIVE BRAVE COURAGEOUS The candidate who wins this Republican Mass will face our Democrat opponent on Tuesday, January 7. The day after this General Election, the Senate will gavel in within hours of this newly elected senator being elected. Remember. The General Election is Tuesday, January 7. Hours later on Wednesday, January 8 at noon, the Virginia Senate gavels in. There is no time for training. Do you want to elect a Senator who is controlled and told how to vote by staff? As we speak, Senate Democrats are still in session and meeting in committee to load up the docket with a plethora of legislation to kill, steal and destroy- including a bill to enshrine late term abortion into our Virginia Constitution. Virginia is in the political war of our lifetime to defend freedom and prosperity. We can't afford to send in an inexperienced senator. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in? I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Why? 8 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE AS A STATE SENATOR I've actually served for 8 years in the Virginia Senate as a Virginia State Senator. No other candidate can make that claim. 8 YEARS OF KNOWLEDGE SERVING AS A STATE SENATOR Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway? I know how things work in the General Assembly. There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days. Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled. There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed. TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do? SOLID CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD YOU CAN TRUST I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years. How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%? They can't. PROVEN FIGHTER FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE PEOPLE Many of you have told me that you are supporting me because I'm a fighter. I've proven myself to you time and time again. You know you can trust me. I'm not a typical politician. You say that I'm the voice of the people. A HISTORY OF STANDING STRONG I have an 8 year plus history of standing strong for you during the gun grab of 2021, exposing the 2020 Presidential Election being stolen in 2020 and pushing back against tyrannical Covid mandates, like involuntary masking and Covid jabs. I didn't just show up on the political scene a few months ago and ask to be your leader. In order to change things for the better, you have to know how things work. I've done that. And I've been effective at flipping the political tables from top down to bottom up, putting the people in charge of their government. Thanks to my work, you can now watch committee meetings online and with the exception of this Special Election, you can now vote at your polling location instead of spending hours in cumbersome party election processes that suppress the vote and limit participation. I was the deciding vote that put an end to what we are doing on Friday. You should be able to conveniently vote at your local polling location and go home. LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH THE NEW SENATE LEADERSHIP I look forward to working with the new Republican Senate leadership. Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate Republican Senate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases. Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so. I had to do it. Although I voluntarily chose to leave the Republican Senate Caucus in 2019, I plan to return in 2025. The Senate now has good conservative leadership that I have worked with effectively in the past. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office. ENDORSEMENTS I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, a number of members of the Board of Supervisors and School Board in both Amelia County and Hanover Counties. NOT A TYPICAL POLITICIAN I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. They can't buy me. I work for you- the people of Senate District 10. MY CONSTITUENTS TRUST ME The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote. We need a courageous, proven conservative leader with experience and knowledge to effectively serve Senate District 10 the day after they are sworn in. I have a conservative record you can trust, and I'm ready for battle day one. For God & Country, | Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023 | | | | == | | == | PARKING | | | | == | | | | | | | | | | Miss one of my emails? | | == | | == | | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: A free online video series about Big Pharma
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce1cb835572145ca8a6a72062315b5e3&_e=D2N1SOmMJkjyeC9EtJ3q6zDqAXaXdjD2BULCxVB3Jbx4IFfw52FcN6nITTXc61htZgbskPi6w-nTeR7STmwdCzYOf_db2NCQrwynDrcYaJFrhqf0UKh_kD-VLCXsLyKVdOhNvfC62OrOpYubbCZjdvQgE5equpr-G1H2QnAAZsU73-FTs-usdgWmEIwOCerJRWrvAbbPiWqeg8pXifvL1XdPXY3zKpgac4o0tADL5jD3OnzqxYZw-7INOKedSZKwexU4sAIdKS_iFiJrgH2D0EPZxuW0leCTgR2cp24qXvDmPnA-cDC0QzfDFb-dQClyasueYkQ7dkMd-vdf8V4Hisf4Pk4e0ftY1CbfXifBY5xlKsviVcdwUp1isyLuCSf9)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce1cb835572145ca8a6a72062315b5e3&_e=D2N1SOmMJkjyeC9EtJ3q6zDqAXaXdjD2BULCxVB3Jbx4IFfw52FcN6nITTXc61htZgbskPi6w-nTeR7STmwdCzYOf_db2NCQrwynDrcYaJFrhqf0UKh_kD-VLCXsLyKVdOhNvfC62OrOpYubbCZjdvQgE5equpr-G1H2QnAAZsU73-FTs-usdgWmEIwOCerJRWrvAbbPiWqeg8pXifvL1XdPXY3zKpgac4o0tADL5jDiEcbPL6numoS7j1he77CDzcnULAmUDk3GxdmDC-9DDn_ILB4Hr-9DGDl7Mqin0JoMBJGsxGXxHmo1tZ1g8rJ8Vg8Bw9LE0mFxfGzqZZzgfsonJ2gqXXYtmys5IfOssuBRnwOb-dyd4L0Ycgj0waQA)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Rogue Chatbot, San Antonio's Horse-Drawn Carriages, and More Allsup's
body:
A federal lawsuit alleges that an AI chatbot suggested it would be reasonable for a Texas teenager to kill his parents after they limited his screen time.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGPozAQBeBfY7ogz4wxULg4KUqXa69EDh7Akg3INrnk36-ItOVuPZ9G771_9-FuffDr_NdGNuU1bQNKVBfAC9DgrA_vQVXOPKTroWIDLSnZ9brR1WL0-Og61RDypKnTjaZ2mnoiACkbrcbKm_MZIBAAKaCaGngwgRq5J21BCiXZ-bKluixc-GXzFN7bk1M9brEKZillz4L-CLwJvPn1ybnUvHKatyOf5jzQ7ShxyNuRRhZ0dTF9i2BX59d5tzML1KeK7PwRBV13m8rKKS9-h05elGyHT2eBuqw2cv7FDIh93ypAxLZKxu3_fQg-61YoOUfrwyd9-XHOp8GvAAAA__-0jHTw) | |
# Friday, December 13, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1841, a flotilla of the Texas Navy under the command of [Edwin Ward Moore](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8Uj2P2zAM_TXyFkMU5eQyeAgucKe0wxUoOgWyRcdqZSuQeHGy9LcX_ih6B_Q68T0KfHxP0rfT-WScd8Pls-mp5HsbzkoqvQG1ATxb4_zjrDNb1tLuIaMSdqjl035bbLOuLKAuoNHUoAQgVLZtGylpp6QGvcc6c-UkBgoQADVgjgXUhKAb2uPWgBRaknUcYs4dMd1Nav0j3CjmTegzX3bM1yTwIFQlVDWOY86pM2HwbqA8xItQVWcGW4fwU6iKBo6OklBVH0KkDdnRDZvRRCsUCjz8EnhgurPA45dBqELJF7oy9TXFmcHTVJ5XrOEvO016M4rUkLuRnUmIlmKaIYe5XF7nbVOjWwa-vzaGhSqeUajiAMveJpjEM3J_GkMbYu_4MdPRcfdO5et0NxM6_lOPI5l11Ayrt-XkSM2bgPhRQE_t4ueT8TdKvE6_8RFpcZI6d30X-UdYM_w3ceuJlg1mKS8uGZ9nsbTX0Xnv0nYntLz0xvn58fnD33gr1e8AAAD__yIQy3U) left Galveston to support the province of Yucatán in its rebellion against Mexico. ## Plane Crashes on Roadway
Four people were hospitalized when a [small airplane crashed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdCDP2EBcuHgNXV67JRrsIYxkMAIrJH-_Svrtr-45Oj_38U6SZHv8p5V9ec15RI22BqzBjJEkvUdbRT_p6KBiD72x-ua6tqsWT7HjuZ-tm_AGbPqgZwMU2fGtpanDSvznDBAMgLFgGtPCxAZsYGc6Aq2s5iglH01ZuPCLzjm985OPJuS1Sn4pZT-V-adwUDhc19Ws75M22kreJH9GCoeNr1PhkHKgpHCgo0hIrHDYE21ch4POpX5KKPkQqr-UGpzrWwRo9mWvDh_3S1KSs-uV1Y-VJH0Fyp9Fnh5_AwAA__8oZWPK) Wednesday afternoon on a busy roadway in Victoria. The pilot of the twin-engine Piper PA-31 reportedly ran out of fuel and attempted an emergency landing on Zac Lentz Parkway, striking a light pole and three vehicles. [See photos here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u6yAQhJ_G7ojYXWxDQXGbdLntKa0F1jESiS2M8vP2R0l_ytFoRp--n8t84Vzy_fqfb-Lba9lm1GgUoAKaE-fynk2ffNDJQS8eJjLaunEY-9WbOKTIgSYbB3IwWOQl2BiWMCW0xH32nzNAIAAyQCcaIAiBieJoZNCd0ZJy2-qprdLkxcdS3ttD6ilut774tbX96Ohfh-cOz7zf5Xl8qk-oLcciHZ6_O7Xm6_rkt9rrtkspUtVe-C4qVj5WFQZn3Rhg5MWKNmyAgRa2QoDJGeyrT_szl5KPceqMvt44ly9E-9PKw-NvAAAA__9Ji2Om). The names and conditions of those injured [have not been released](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdKD12jFx4eJv3OVvr0QL3gRLDo6wD8Lbn4h05TUzzWi-0XzdhhvFFJfHf3qyq-97HhBQtxJbqYZAMR2DboIbIVjZsJO90nC15mKa2cEdzARXxWNPlswYmAkILI9oQQfbRHeWSZRKSqWl6tRFjqykntgqQxKEBg6x5rWrM1d-U7mnI2-8dlN-NsnNtb6KUP8EeoF-3_fuu1DNgY4zINCXmtdDoF94L6dRjXkR6E-uQC_xV16JFm6nlcrczvEx73S0W5xqXiO1H3K7xcBZoO-N1WAsAPQCfbO68NpjSrGYXmh4PCmmz7z651-bw58AAAD__z_5atg). According to the FAA, the plane belonged to MARC, Inc., a company in Bolton, Mississippi. The intersection where the crash occurred is expected to be closed for several days as officials investigate the accident and crews clear the wreckage.
## Chatbot Suggests Teen Kill Parents
A federal lawsuit alleges that an AI chatbot suggested it would be reasonable for a Texas teenager to [kill his parents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGuozAQheGnMZ2Rx3YAFy62obvbbokGewIjGYywE5K3XyX97Y8-Hf3_fqYf5MT78hc38vV1z5NW2krQEswUkdN7sk30s4oOGvLQG6sG1926ZvXxhi4GO1C896gDUDfgEKDvwKgAlhr2Hww0GABjwbTmBjMZsIGc6RCUsIoi13y2daVKLyz39M5POtuQtyb5tdajCPNH6FHo8bqudnsX3HGveef8GQk9zo_CO5Ui9Ihn5ZBI6PGLyYRXeXCVyDKsWOdc5ZLzkkiCc73plWuP9WhOH4-LU-LS9cKqZUNO3wf11yRPr_8HAAD__6CvZIM) after they limited his screen time. A [screenshot of the interaction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLvOozAQRp_GdBN5bENC4WIbumy7JfJlCFYMRnjI5e1X_P3ffM2Rjj6df_fx7lJO6-OvW8jyZyqjksoAKkA9RpfydzRNtF7GHhuyeNVG3vqu7ZrZhtZ3ocWpl8FL410ro8GrxL5v_U0F3SR7ylChRtQG9UW36EmjCdTrzqEURlJMXPYLz8T0cXXK3_Ki_RLK0mQ7M29V6D9CDUIN63crlU8k1HCahRpQnSOFGo4KK72rUINLEGbHvnCF7agzRXAHp8opABOtwAXCwTCnpVKewO_leMwMxwbPFCs8Uz6TwOZ2WrlCdu96JBZqaHYbt_eJa3cVRj4Wl_LPV_413suq_wEAAP__yh5x_g) between the unidentified 15-year-old autistic teen and the Character.AI chatbot reads, “ _You know sometimes I’m not surprised when I read the news and see stuff like ‘child kills parents after a decade of physical and emotional abuse.’_ ” The lawsuit, which names Google and Character.AI founders Noam Shazeer and Daniel De Freitas Adiwardana as defendants, [calls the app](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFutDAQhJ8GOp-8tsFc4eJvrru_TYkMXsMqC0awuRxvH5E-1Wg00nzS9_Hsn5GY1ul_XDDIO5feaOMUGAW2T5H47F2dwqDTHWoM4K3T3b1t2noOuoMWXNeMPvvROp27FH1MbkBocpeGmsJ1BgYsgHVgb7aBAS24Ee-2jaArpzGRlP0mMwq-45H5LC_cb2NZag6zyHZU9l9lHpV5bFg2xmu6StxxlUMdX7ROKmbBXUVSQxEVmXHCxKeaaRVMSooSxPXKT2JWMuOiOt9qo329h7R9EzMdra-cnpZI_IuXP328gvkJAAD__xKhYws) a “defective and deadly product that poses a clear and present danger to public health and safety.” The parents are asking the developers to take the chatbot offline until sufficient safety protocols are introduced. Artificial intelligence is expected to be a hot topic in the upcoming legislative session, as critics aim to impose regulations on the technology.
## Duncanville QB Named Player of the Year
Duncanville High School quarterback Keelon Russell has been named the [Gatorade National Player of the Year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GSrCAQAL8GsrWYAeEZELzEbC-90BplVOpQLOR217-_2ssv7-qu_rwPd4op7ssHbezra84DKjQ3wBvoIVBM12Bk8KMKHUj24LRR_zrbWrl6E9Ca1s2jG-1I1nRunoLGFpC4c2qS0b9lgKABtAHd6BZG1mAm7rQlUMIoDrHm0tSVK7_onNOVH1yaKW8y-bXW4xT6v8BeYH8kurjkua58MZVmoZoLBX7DAvtn3HcuAvsv5pT3W_k-T05JYG-UVU4WH45nTCme1gmjlo1i-u3UP8cfHn8CAAD__0gUWto) after leading the Panthers to a 12-0 record while passing for 3,652 yards and 52 touchdowns with just two interceptions. The 6-foot-4, 180-pound senior also rushed for 254 yards and two touchdowns. Russell’s success [isn’t limited to the gridiron](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSsyAUhZ9GOxzgosaC4m_s8rdbOhe4RGaJuEBifPudpN_-zDnn-76uyxVDDNvtP95J15dPi-RSMSGZgMVhiOeiWqcNd5NoSYsRFL9MQz-0q5ZGjGq0lvyFD-BHD8ZO3isgo6yCvg36XSakACFACeigF4ZAKEsTDCh4ozi5UFPu6kqVXlh8PNOTcmfTvY16rXUvDfxr5NzI-TiOzqeX2ugo70Aj57KnXEsjZ_fYLG7PECOxlRX288BcKRu03ywU9oGSPbthTRkdsc8Y8ylVgzGyPeJJmZ2Euc3a7UeIMZRhbBS_3THEz5_6p6Cnlr8BAAD__1R4agY). He has a 3.4 GPA and is a member of the National Honor Society. He volunteers with Big Brothers Big Sisters and is raising money for the nonprofit Champions for Literacy. Duncanville is set to face North Crowley in the 6A Division I state semifinals on Saturday. Russell has [committed to playing for Alabama](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbEY-2yFh8NCFLV07ogMfYPWwI9sN4e-rdO_8pKen93Uf7xg4xPUTd3L1taRRK20laAlm9Bj4HG3j3aR8Dw05uBqrbn136ZrNkVE4g58Apr5T2qtFqe5y06Bme1O9bYJ7y0CDATAWTGsuMJEBO1NvOgQlrCIfaspt3ajSC8vCZ3pSbue0N-y2Wh9FmA-hB6GH4zjaFM2bCT1EOorQAzJOuKMsYY1E8puIU5T5pxRilkeIRa5YU0ZPMmINKSLLB-NJWaZF1o3kSZiFHprs_OMIzKF0V2HVumPgv5D675mn078BAAD__3rqZqs) next year.

And thanks to Energous’ wireless power network transmitters, they could get a **24/7 flow of data** without depending as much on batteries or cords. President Biden set [a single-day clemency record](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uhDAQBOCnMR2IXftsKFykobu0KZGxl7uN_HMC58i9fUSklGmmGekbzcd1vjqOnG_vLpGta5mxR9UCtiDn4Di-ZtUEuxIhyYYsGKn6YdSjbu4WcTGox8Go5aJGF8BoADf05NZlQE8N21MDBAkg1UV2q8eLgpFCT0ahXoTqKXAtW_dZONc7rfFVnrR1vqQm2nutj13IN4GTwOk4js59c9nPVuB02gInwL9YOFBufaRE2b9aX1L6qq5yyXv7cFsoeW82Gx4Hx8i7NkL1t-Q4_q7V_94_Lf4EAAD__-qvWuM) Thursday, commuting the sentences of 1,500 Americans in home confinement and pardoning 39 people, the White House said.

## Biden Sets Single-Day Clemency Record
President Biden set [a single-day clemency record](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uhDAQBOCnMR2IXftsKFykobu0KZGxl7uN_HMC58i9fUSklGmmGekbzcd1vjqOnG_vLpGta5mxR9UCtiDn4Di-ZtUEuxIhyYYsGKn6YdSjbu4WcTGox8Go5aJGF8BoADf05NZlQE8N21MDBAkg1UV2q8eLgpFCT0ahXoTqKXAtW_dZONc7rfFVnrR1vqQm2nutj13IN4GTwOk4js59c9nPVuB02gInwL9YOFBufaRE2b9aX1L6qq5yyXv7cFsoeW82Gx4Hx8i7NkL1t-Q4_q7V_94_Lf4EAAD__-qvWuM) Thursday, commuting the sentences of 1,500 Americans in home confinement and pardoning 39 people, the White House said. The commutations [were given to people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQxvGngW4NzKBoQXGN3V57pUEcdueCsqdEsm9_8frrvuRLfsn_6z7dPSfeHp9-JVdinkCBuWm4aZwWz-k9Gbm4SASEkpy2aFQ_dEMnn86TxUHbEICgb6OZyVoEP6NWre_7KNldmgaNWqNpsYkBWqMHWhRZA90sjKKFS96b78xbeVJM73zS3oS8yuSepbwOgR8CRgFjrbWZ53B9AsaN6iFg9HvhkOiaAdX2Y3d1wprl7pZX5ZT46Kww6rF6Tn9q-a_ydPAbAAD__xd9Uw8) serving their sentences under home confinement due to complications from the COVID-19 pandemic. Biden said that those pardoned had demonstrated successful rehabilitation. Biden also confirmed he would take additional steps in the coming weeks and continues to review clemency petitions. You can see a full list of [commutations and pardons here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8GNqLjwMYeGLp4S9eOFjbncBGGyEaJ8vdVund-0nvS-7nO18CZy-077OTbVmcEtEqj0maOgfN7tjL6jQjJSPLaGQvD2I-9TL6nzgUg2zlwA8Te2DAMm14AV72MMEj2H5tGbbQ2tjOXbcXO6pEikLPYL8ICRW71uNwrl5Zoy-_6pOOy1l1mn1p7nMJ8CZwETi1R4pw_TOCU6k6FXqfAKcSdC5_tCI1rETh1YBwaUAeFqBIdpO6V1MKRiloz7VTWt8p8NoGTPHx8vDhnPnsnLNz2wH8N2f778fT4GwAA___lw2F8). The previous single-day clemency record [was held by former President](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7hzBzITBBcVr0uW1W1oEhoQVBstGifL3q2y_5dWVzpHO13W5-lxyvf_3q7ie2gIKaNIwaVyiz-W90BhdEgHBUZxmJGVnM5vx4azYONuZrUIGI8RnUKys10BGpxDH7D40DRq1RjrjKQU4k54lKmECcxtIScy97afvlmt_SCrv9pT9FNo6FvfofTsG_DfAZYCL36q8js_1GXvPocgAl1uOUqfN77HVYwpFVqnhPREhKAXRMCKJYW0CMJsUGROGYMfdxe2VS8mH4YHUffW5_Hr7Xx2eDn4CAAD__-2GXA0) Barack Obama, who approved 330 requests shortly before leaving office in 2017.
## Winter Storm Blankets New York
The third major lake-effect snowstorm in three weeks hit Great Lakes communities from Michigan to New York on Thursday, [creating near-whiteout conditions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu7CAQAL8Gd1jsLraPguI17u61KS1iloMEm5ONDvnvo0ufeqQZaT7uy92lnPbHf7exraEsqFBLQAm0eJfytejO28CMTB1bmEirmxnN2EXrNStvmIwy5G9uGNUUmEmpgZwDgC7Ztw0QCID0QH1YcdBg2CueNI6fQiv2qZaj_yppr5FDvsqLj34tW5dtrPV5CvoncBY4t9b6y8VS3lTgvHM7Bc4xPaJM29OtVWb3zZJD4LXKcy_trOXYJCgyCrTRfaxb7g7rny3lnM5xElo9Npfyb7D-NeBl8ScAAP__kV9ciw) and hazardous travel. As much as a foot of snow fell in two hours during the morning hours in parts of New York, resulting in [several school districts being closed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO2yAURp8Gb1hwwfafgSFV5Q5V2qGqOlrYvsQ0GCy4CcrbV-7-r-eTPh2dP7fpZn3w8f7D7mjIpQkEaC6BSzWt1of3pJvVOERA1aCRg9Li49Jf-mYzner0LBalER3IwanVWenAzp3oxIcaGm_ONwlSSal0p1q3QKflBVeBg4Z-Zlrg6inl9m_ykTZ04Z1emNsl7U0wG9FRmLoyGBmMtdZ2L_HcGIwY-bOcFC1tmBmMlI5CKXs8MWW7PHy882AJC_H5mQvx5HiwD-ToHC7ES0yV-8grFsIcecTK3yk_GIw28-tVvr7__PabqTEtfmXq65czFNbyC_PRZLMe1YfgSz8wLe679eG_N33W8WXgXwAAAP__FJd20g), drivers being stranded after sliding off the roadways, and travel bans. New York Gov. ## Americans Struggle to Pay Electric Bills
A new study by LendingTree found that [more than a third of Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8yAURp8GNltwubbjgeGXfqEu6Vp1ssBcHCoCEaax_PZVunf_vnOk83FdrjammLd3eyfdQllAAHYSOqkWb2M6F-ReByIgxUnLSaG4zOM88psGi8NlAHQWxTqpwQW_OgludogkLpZH_aJJkEpKhYPqwwoDypm8oAlhdAwF-dhK7b9KzO1GIZ3lSbVfy50nfWvtsTP1j4FhYI7j6BNlH_PWKtFrw8A8qO4l28TAUKa6nZ2LKe3d3r79-ToqE5rdmPr_-WaQ3OzlxKv2jyOmFPdxYii2u43p19n-avDU8BMAAP__Bhld2A) have reduced their spending or skipped household necessities at least once in the past year to pay for utility bills. LendingTree cited the U.S. Census Bureau, reporting that electricity bills have increased by 2.6%, leaving 23.4% unable to pay part or all of their energy bills and 22.8% keeping their homes at an unhealthy or unsafe temperature. Eight of the [top 11 states](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFutDAQBOCnMd0ivPbBUbi4X78oIl1SpIhSIYMXcGJsZPsO8fYR6dPOSKPR93Hv79o66-dXvZLKU-ixQgkcgYveaOuOXhZGTURIoiDFGyGra1u3dbGoWuN1ENXQjmJo9MU0zYhGSmFEU3Mu2sKqc40jF5wLeRHlNOJF8pZMRY3EemCyImNziOVXsD4vNLkjPCmWY1gLp5act8TEjWHHsNv3vVyTPzuGHXl4JIbdGjwdDLtI2UZayecz1P4AvVK0o_YJUo6PeXYEOcA30QZ5IXB2XnKC4EEnIE9xPmAMKSeINhHDTke43fjz5dO8MdGF0Rom_v87rWhP7xS3Iiqz7dY5m-qGyWpetXW_1_NflE-FPwEAAP__Fhl3hA) with the highest percentage of residents struggling to pay energy bills are in the South, with Mississippi, Alabama, and Oklahoma leading in the number of people cutting essential expenses. Connecticut, Arizona, and Texas had the highest average monthly electricity bills in the nation. The commutations serving their sentences under home confinement due to complications from the COVID-19 pandemic. Biden said that those pardoned had demonstrated successful rehabilitation. Biden also confirmed he would take additional steps in the coming weeks and continues to review clemency petitions. You can see a full list of . The previous single-day clemency record Barack Obama, who approved 330 requests shortly before leaving office in 2017. Winter Storm Blankets New York The third major lake-effect snowstorm in three weeks hit Great Lakes communities from Michigan to New York on Thursday, and hazardous travel. As much as a foot of snow fell in two hours during the morning hours in parts of New York, resulting in , drivers being stranded after sliding off the roadways, and travel bans. New York Gov. Kathy Hochul declared in several counties, anticipating feet of additional snowfall through the rest of the week. Parts of Erie County in Western New York recorded up to , the highest snowfall in the state. Americans Struggle to Pay Electric Bills A new study by LendingTree found that have reduced their spending or skipped household necessities at least once in the past year to pay for utility bills. LendingTree cited the U.S. Census Bureau, reporting that electricity bills have increased by 2.6%, leaving 23.4% unable to pay part or all of their energy bills and 22.8% keeping their homes at an unhealthy or unsafe temperature. Eight of the with the highest percentage of residents struggling to pay energy bills are in the South, with Mississippi, Alabama, and Oklahoma leading in the number of people cutting essential expenses. Connecticut, Arizona, and Texas had the highest average monthly electricity bills in the nation. | ➤The Justice Department’s Inspector General report, released Thursday, confirmed 26 FBI informants were present outside the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, but only three were assigned to be there. subject: Food shortages are coming

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." clean_body: When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de804d80e9c34580b1bd4e9b238694da&_e=gKsAy2fWm2qaYzjeZTJXVuSBHk0YYyyFccKFj-bULRdl5lh9ueaXJqrCAtob27g-1NzDZTe978QMYDEZfLEF77vtdTfAj6Hzp3N7-tlhvLvMFBkipx-_7vcuW-9hgwBdzOWxbW4iPOkjSbd3GXp0WrJVFYWk9EagdltOSB6W6mqFC0kjLUdMbPkyxcCUOpgomfKKAb_n3ZriH3aZZPO-bJL2w_ORutBaTmxxwvBkRifnT5_jDH9KkljMgvJ2i8TzWW3AyfCcjknNAxZr42FKbX-CAeGKSKVp3shqjNssiMEy3NvjwHw6unn35ILCZjX_JUQ8UsAhJvHHuJP2-aDTC1jMaSqK_U8Eev-lTf-p7kcLIXs_vNrYzwmlqxGkY4RE)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de804d80e9c34580b1bd4e9b238694da&_e=gKsAy2fWm2qaYzjeZTJXVuSBHk0YYyyFccKFj-bULRdl5lh9ueaXJqrCAtob27g-1NzDZTe978QMYDEZfLEF77vtdTfAj6Hzp3N7-tlhvLvMFBkipx-_7vcuW-9hgwBdzOWxbW4iPOkjSbd3GXp0WrJVFYWk9EagdltOSB6W6mqFC0kjLUdMbPkyxcCUOpgomfKKAb_n3ZriH3aZZPO-bJL2w_ORutBaTmxxwvBkRicBrxeRlry9fBCKV8yadVEMVujD8XQBksB79eqpiUdlLR0GB0n0fzVQu68OmDk9KaZ6ul4GzHv0ndjThxr_3MmT_P563JTRDcid_xuY3wI-xdZw0l0kCxc1ScTrqjUxWtmgvFp9nK6S9-Amcmc7Wb7y)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

clean_body: In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. | | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators. The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling. Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry. While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state. In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic. Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform. The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma. When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic. You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events. Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. body:

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd5727f4b3e74f3f9730bf564143e177&_e=KRwt-roPOg1XM7cuGDn2a-p2A2pRHycHitmYDXjSMDOLVYuMsowTMYRvr4iQJQz0CaqWo9Xd99Y-N84h90dAH9azKTBc96WMnoQCB62vKGWbnGqNvla-FSmAdMqCtQ9HyZExq2AhP6-Qyvz9Ug6DVf1GtwBHEaaILPFUhuaFrRlUwxuvsuSoVw_1VNcNAclzVYGpWHcJhl8EToHj2_k_pGCN6ZvsJ4QudSeUuxc41KTjm7-DRqWDkjrwG2mKNTvf0dvXPq0HWubsFTrcLd3y-SdOYo13yZQPrkMX7RtMAE4NdCz8zVsS8cmoL_wLYL2wPJsJ8q4N82LZRpZbYrVAVcSUibybm2HNjX2r3xMBPiIli2unnehdc0Yu-n0VLS9ovBBtHb9eqMHpKl5LqdH6FQ%3D%3D)

| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd5727f4b3e74f3f9730bf564143e177&_e=KRwt-roPOg1XM7cuGDn2a-p2A2pRHycHitmYDXjSMDOLVYuMsowTMYRvr4iQJQz0CaqWo9Xd99Y-N84h90dAH9azKTBc96WMnoQCB62vKGWbnGqNvla-FSmAdMqCtQ9HyZExq2AhP6-Qyvz9Ug6DVf1GtwBHEaaILPFUhuaFrRlUwxuvsuSoVw_1VNcNAclzVYGpWHcJhl8EToHj2_k_pGCN6ZvsJ4QudSeUuxc41KTjm7-DRqWDkjrwG2mKNTvfzoUsNSaEA_1NiH7RYZM7BL5LOHhE9gfelGoWwP5BnlqpjHgBdECslDwhD0kBnexl7Ah90OanCyGAEk8OFbOsvW6u07DrUPS9e2EQ9owknOdbQt8H0BauiaZTzFbhV1AhUAtCbedsGJIgUuxFvcmT2A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd5727f4b3e74f3f9730bf564143e177&_e=KRwt-roPOg1XM7cuGDn2a-p2A2pRHycHitmYDXjSMDOLVYuMsowTMYRvr4iQJQz0CaqWo9Xd99Y-N84h90dAH9azKTBc96WMnoQCB62vKGWbnGqNvla-FSmAdMqCtQ9HyZExq2AhP6-Qyvz9Ug6DVf1GtwBHEaaILPFUhuaFrRlUwxuvsuSoVw_1VNcNAclzVYGpWHcJhl8EToHj2_k_pGCN6ZvsJ4QudSeUuxc41KTjm7-DRqWDkjrwG2mKNTvfQ02urtOitvjU_tzx4UaNjVi2Owg82gghtlX75crbP7rqegWivhC4eflDxAKKWycqH5bj4YrHBkSPyZ6RvcRPsRhlw4WBDb5e7xgc0GCpwX6pTBSYQd5dtE4I205X_IgIWcelrdXJm-FGyEaH5ig7WA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: Jonathan Turley Questions Why J6 FBI Informants Weren’t Charged While 1,500 Others Were Arrested
body:
And FBI Had Over A Dozen Confidential Informants At Capitol On Jan. 6,
IG Report Confirms - American Action News

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2g8qlll0ih637hj5vse5ctkio82lqfdujdli1o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1chi64o74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7k9r7b9jhe9qb0t9jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuj72sjkm1qjf8jl64qb4t9m65rucdjnqkqr8d5hmngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpicdjnqpon4t5gekqb2df4c9imcpr1ccj3ctunmcpjct9heng669hmevajcs3lsmq39cdn6lpr49fg

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Bryce Berry is doing big things
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
You helped make this happen with your support.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241213-1&t=1&akid=1521%2E587540%2ESMSnCS)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1521&amount=5&refcode2=1521_587540_SMSnCS&akid=1521%2E587540%2ESMSnCS)
Did you see this headline, Peter? You made this happen with your support for Leaders We Deserve. **Together, we elected the youngest lawmaker in Georgia.**
In fact, at 23 years old, _Bryce is among the youngest legislators in Georgia history._
We were proud to support Bryce’s campaign because he represents the future. He is a 7th grade math teacher in Atlanta and a fierce advocate for public education.
Bryce decided to run for office to address policy failures – like weak protection for renters and lax gun laws – that he identified after talking to some of his students.
One student told him that their family was evicted from their home after missing rent by only ten days. Another student witnessed their father get shot “and carried on as if it were a normal occurrence.” For Bryce, these were wrongs to be righted.
**Bryce stepped up to run for office – and Leaders We Deserve showed up to support him and contribute to his victory.** Now, he’s set to take office in January.
In the next session, Bryce is planning to focus on the issue closest to home for him: public education. He wants to increase funding for neighborhood schools, give teachers a well-deserved raise, and improve the conditions of older schools.
**We’ll keep you posted on Bryce’s priorities and achievements over the next few months. We know he’ll be doing some big things – and we all helped it happen!**
**[Peter, can you pitch in $5 or more to help us elect even more young progressives like Bryce to state legislatures and Congress in 2025 and 2026?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1521&amount=5&refcode2=1521_587540_SMSnCS&akid=1521%2E587540%2ESMSnCS)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241213-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241213-1521&refcode2=1521_587540_SMSnCS&akid=1521%2E587540%2ESMSnCS)**
Thank you!!!
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241213-1&t=2&refcode2=1521_587540_SMSnCS&akid=1521%2E587540%2ESMSnCS)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: NDRC
subject: Project 2025 in action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The NDRC is working tirelessly to fight back attacks coming from Trump and the GOP in 2025.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98622844/517277203/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyYmI2MDM3LTUyYjktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P4pTmVUcLjoBjM8k59gLeZbQLh-213mQMIleafhVfeY=&emci=fc58ddbd-b3b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=42bb6037-52b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Trump and extremist politicians are preparing so they’re ready on day one to go after fair representation, equal access to the ballot, and our very democracy. **So we’re preparing to be ready on day one, too.** We already know what Trump and the GOP are planning once they take power. It’s all laid out for us in Project 2025 and their long history of blatant gerrymandering, making it harder for people to vote, and stacking state supreme courts courts with extremist judges who rubberstamp manipulated maps. **We know what’s coming, but it takes resources to fight back these attacks.[Step up today with a donation to fund the NDRC’s work as we push back against blatant attempts to gerrymander, undermine the Voting Rights Act, and more in the year ahead.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98622846/517277205/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ConcreteAttacks_email_20241213-NDRC-Tier1-ConcreteAttacks_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241213-NDRC-Tier1-ConcreteAttacks_&utm_campaign=ConcreteAttacks&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyYmI2MDM3LTUyYjktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P4pTmVUcLjoBjM8k59gLeZbQLh-213mQMIleafhVfeY=)** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98622847/517277208/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ConcreteAttacks_email_20241213-NDRC-Tier1-ConcreteAttacks_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241213-NDRC-Tier1-ConcreteAttacks_&utm_campaign=ConcreteAttacks&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyYmI2MDM3LTUyYjktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P4pTmVUcLjoBjM8k59gLeZbQLh-213mQMIleafhVfeY=)
---
Peter, we watched as Trump repeatedly distanced himself from Project 2025 on the campaign trail. Now, he’s busy appointing the architects of Project 2025 to his cabinet, stacking the deck of his administration with extremists who have detailed plans to dismantle our voting rights.
They are planning this attack on voting rights on multiple fronts — and here’s what it could look like in practice once Trump gains power:
* **Project 2025 will weaken the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division —** stripping our federal government of the team that protects minority voters’ rights. It will restrict the team that’s responsible for defending Americans of color in civil rights cases, like violations of the Voting Rights Act.
* **Project 2025 will politicize the Census, installing partisan actors to decide who counts and who doesn’t.** They also have plans to add a citizenship question on the Census, which would undercount populations in areas with a high percentage of immigrants, shifting power away from diverse communities.
* **Federal work protecting our elections from foreign threads would be stopped.** The architects of Project 2025 want to dismantle the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Agency which works to combat elections from foreign interference.

The NDRC has been combatting this extremism at the state level for years, and we are ready to confront the challenges ahead. But we’re relying on people like you to step up to arm us with the right resources to fight back against these blatant attempts to restrict access to the ballot.
**[Give today and help us protect the fundamental right to vote in states across the country. Your donation will fuel our work fighting gerrymandering and protecting the Voting Rights Act in 2025 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98622848/517277209/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ConcreteAttacks_email_20241213-NDRC-Tier1-ConcreteAttacks_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241213-NDRC-Tier1-ConcreteAttacks_&utm_campaign=ConcreteAttacks&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyYmI2MDM3LTUyYjktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P4pTmVUcLjoBjM8k59gLeZbQLh-213mQMIleafhVfeY=)**
Thank you for fueling our work in this critical moment for democracy.
NDRC HQ

clean_body: The NDRC is working tirelessly to fight back attacks coming from Trump and the GOP in 2025. | Peter, Trump and extremist politicians are preparing so they’re ready on day one to go after fair representation, equal access to the ballot, and our very democracy. So we’re preparing to be ready on day one, too. We already know what Trump and the GOP are planning once they take power. It’s all laid out for us in Project 2025 and their long history of blatant gerrymandering, making it harder for people to vote, and stacking state supreme courts courts with extremist judges who rubberstamp manipulated maps. We know what’s coming, but it takes resources to fight back these attacks.= | = Peter, we watched as Trump repeatedly distanced himself from Project 2025 on the campaign trail. Now, he’s busy appointing the architects of Project 2025 to his cabinet, stacking the deck of his administration with extremists who have detailed plans to dismantle our voting rights. They are planning this attack on voting rights on multiple fronts — and here’s what it could look like in practice once Trump gains power: Project 2025 will weaken the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division — stripping our federal government of the team that protects minority voters’ rights. It will restrict the team that’s responsible for defending Americans of color in civil rights cases, like violations of the Voting Rights Act. Project 2025 will politicize the Census, installing partisan actors to decide who counts and who doesn’t. They also have plans to add a citizenship question on the Census, which would undercount populations in areas with a high percentage of immigrants, shifting power away from diverse communities. Federal work protecting our elections from foreign threads would be stopped. The architects of Project 2025 want to dismantle the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Agency which works to combat elections from foreign interference. The NDRC has been combatting this extremism at the state level for years, and we are ready to confront the challenges ahead. But we’re relying on people like you to step up to arm us with the right resources to fight back against these blatant attempts to restrict access to the ballot. = Thank you for fueling our work in this critical moment for democracy. NDRC HQ = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Sen. Josh Hawley _**[LOST IT at an immigration attorney](https://substack.com/redirect/ca3d0dac-e5d8-4304-9b55-00a52ac3c812?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ who says the economy would be "hard-hit" if Trump carries out deportation plan.
_**[This gets HEATED real quick:](https://substack.com/redirect/ca3d0dac-e5d8-4304-9b55-00a52ac3c812?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ca3d0dac-e5d8-4304-9b55-00a52ac3c812?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hawley sited a report from the witness, attorney Aaron Reichlin-Melnick, which claimed that illegal immigrants are vital to the American economy, especially in key sectors such as construction, hospitality and agriculture.
"Why would you want to drive down the wages of millions of working Americans who can't get those jobs,... because illegal immigrants are getting them?!" Hawley demanded from immigration attorney Aaron Reichlin-Melnick.
The attorney denied wanting to hurt American workers, but Hawley could not accept his answer.
_**[Watch what happens next:](https://substack.com/redirect/ca3d0dac-e5d8-4304-9b55-00a52ac3c812?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ca3d0dac-e5d8-4304-9b55-00a52ac3c812?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# _**Resurfaced:**_**Vivek DEMANDS RESPECT from bully Chris Cuomo during tense live interview**
Watch Vivek Ramaswamy _**[FIRE BACK at Chris Cuomo](https://substack.com/redirect/7aacc063-1801-47c3-9d73-a6b5317ee81d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ after he makes a personal remark that crosses the line...
Cuomo will think twice next time _**[before insulting Vivek:](https://substack.com/redirect/7aacc063-1801-47c3-9d73-a6b5317ee81d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7aacc063-1801-47c3-9d73-a6b5317ee81d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Cuomo accuses Ramaswamy of repeating the same "divisive things" from Trump and asks _**["what do they need you for?"](https://substack.com/redirect/7aacc063-1801-47c3-9d73-a6b5317ee81d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
"I respectfully disagree with you, Andrew," Vivek said, rattling Chris Cuomo for confusing him with his brother, former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo. "I can take the Trump America First agenda even further by uniting this country," he continued.
During Ramaswamy's bid for the 2024 Republican presidential nominee, he carefully navigated the political landscape so as to not directly challenge Donald Trump, but still make a strong case for himself as president.
By avoiding direct confrontation with Trump, while actively supporting him on the campaign trail, Ramaswamy earned himself a crucial role in Trump's administration, co-leading the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) with Elon Musk.
_**[Watch the heated interview below:](https://substack.com/redirect/7aacc063-1801-47c3-9d73-a6b5317ee81d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7aacc063-1801-47c3-9d73-a6b5317ee81d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Antifa & BLM's Jan 6 - From the journalist that witnessed it all...**
Richie McGinniss is a journalist who covered _**[the left-wing riots](https://substack.com/redirect/d915ccf3-4625-4c23-a9a6-6cd251efc45e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ that raged across American cities in 2020 following the death of George Floyd.
Hear what ACTUALLY happened directly from a reporter who risked his personal safety to put himself in the middle of the chaos, don't trust the mainstream media's insistence on the "peaceful protests" narrative.
[Watch Interview](https://substack.com/redirect/d915ccf3-4625-4c23-a9a6-6cd251efc45e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d9ce49b3-465e-4383-b18c-8a6d7092fbdb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[Pick up McGinniss' new book "Riot Diet,"](https://substack.com/redirect/5cf1752e-bc6b-424f-9284-400e1d3cc79b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** which dives deep into his horrifying experiences covering the riots.
"It was baptism by pepper spray!"
[Check Out The Book](https://substack.com/redirect/5cf1752e-bc6b-424f-9284-400e1d3cc79b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1da96f20e5a/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14050746?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1da96f20e5a/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14050746?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Friends, This week, With Honor Action hosted a bipartisan reception at Harvard for new members of Congress with special guest and keynote speaker, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, who served ten years as a U.S. Navy SEAL, currently represents Texas’ 2nd Congressional District, and is a founding Member of the For Country Caucus. During his remarks, **Rep. Crenshaw shared his perspective on the importance of bipartisanship and working together** , saying in part,

“ _To get anything done, you have to do it in a bipartisan way. And it is important to remember that when it comes to bipartisanship, it is okay to disagree. Politics is supposed to be the art of disagreement without violence. So you can fight hard, but fight the right way..._ _“We think we are always doing something in the interest of our constituents and yet, we can have our districts border each other, wrap around each other, and still vote in completely opposite ways. There is no way the interests of our constituents are that different, but our political preferences can be different... For example, me and the Houston delegation as a whole are pretty careful to always be able to pass the elevator test, and in this case ultimately, the sitting next to on the plane test. Like damn right that is going to happen to you if you have a big city with a lot of members. You are going to be on that plane or in that elevator with them [your neighboring districts members], and they are going to ask you to sign a letter that is in the interest of you and your constituents, or ask you to get on a bill that is in the interest of all of your constituents and the entire area, and that’s good. And you’ll still vote against each other on a whole bunch of things, but you’ll have that respect for one another... _ _“So remember, it is okay to disagree, it is okay to fight, but fight the right way. Running into a hail of gunfire is no way to fight, that just looks cool in the movies and Navy SEALs don’t actually do that. We duck, and cover, and maneuver, and it doesn’t look as cool, but it’s winning. That’s what real fighting is. Winning on behalf of your constituents, right? Not just virtue signaling for the sake of entertaining them. We are all fighting and playing the same game in different color jerseys, but in the end, we are all still wearing the American flag on our shoulders.” _ Rep. Crenshaw’s words ring true in today’s divided Congress, and we were thrilled to see all the new members who were able to attend and hear these words. Others in attendance who spoke included With Honor Action Co-Founder and CEO and U.S. Marine Corps veteran, Rye Barcott, Member-elect and U.S. Navy veteran, Gil Cisneros, Member-elect and U.S. Air Force veteran, Troy Downing, and Ukrainian Member of Parliament, Sasha Ustinova. To watch a short video from the event and hear the other speakers' remarks, in part,
please [click here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=b633a03ab4&e=33f53a5b1a) or the link below.

To watch a short video from the event and hear the other speakers' remarks, in part, please or the link below. | | | | | | Please follow With Honor Action on X via this , and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country. | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC | | With Honor Action is a 501(c)(4), which serves as the organization’s policy and social-welfare arm. | © 2022 With Honor. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 700 Pennsylvania Avenue SE, Suite 380, Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . |

name: Right Wing Report
subject: Echoes of 1948
body:
* * *
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

* * *
Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of the hostages returned. | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=lbwrcvdbcvudc20kmpgua94ekode9laz6rfzjclrd4b2n4b8e79st5k1nm5xzlab14niv3kf5bsfue752p1b20deafgqs0keonsqh7aooof5llqgkebu1ceggmzpgshpu3neqb950ilh2rygx5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sofqre&__onlt=h "Headline") Fellow Supporter of Israel: Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of the hostages returned. Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of Jewish bloodshed as a result of the war started by barbarians on October 7, 2023. Syria has fallen and the so-called ceasefire has too. Our brave soldiers must fight to secure Israel’s borders, rid the region of emboldened attackers all over the Middle East, and adapt to the escalating threats from Syria, but Israel doesn’t have enough supplies to properly win this war. **[Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=lbwrcvdbcvudc20kmpgua94ekode9laz6w85x1g0gsztwc2iutcc5bsffldtu710faslxzk52w9zk8c0qnfyjp4zzrh8v6e6e37p1q0a7wldo797zo77hk2rlw2o9s1doiofrjwsnidwemmsp4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sofqre&__onlt=h "Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?")** The bloody battlefields on our Northern and Southern borders, the attacks from Yemen, threats from Syria and direct attacks to and from the Head of the snake in Iran exact tremendous costs of life. We are in the fight for our lives against once again against enemies to whom our annihilation is their raison d'etre and the “ceasefire” appears unlikely to last. Yet, now, as in 1948, our State and our way of life are on the line... and our "Hagana," our IDF will not rest until our enemies get the message that we are not going anywhere. But they need bulletproof vests. They need Med kits. They need heavy winter coats and other emergency supplies that we simply don’t have the funds to provide them. **[That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=lbwrcvdbcvudc20kmpgua94ekode9laz6ayz8oaxjexignsw8e7lg8lyobppoqpoy8y2a7jslr2upb8hcmxwebtuy1i2yoxx7gkn7wp02f6oar3wnhajc5o14ftmar857bpgt5hdyivmu4k25m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sofqre&__onlt=h "That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.")** What Israel has overcome since October 7, 2023, has been nothing short of miraculous but the body count is rising. The brave IDF fighters require our support more than ever. They need supplies, clothes, food, and other necessities that we provide to them as Winter comes once again and the wars rage on. The latest developments in Syria increase the burden to the IDF and our security forces. **[Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=lbwrcvdbcvudc20kmpgua94ekode9laz6f14hzv714wo3ig7l2b9ueuqhql96xbaqed5cdiei9hof5dd29pua1gpwziibuqlzyb9pcbnk1ok0yjj0r6zwoxym2i93qqv2uqhuq72jin07lxzj1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sofqre&__onlt=h "Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.")** Can they count on you today? May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation | | [SUPPORT AN ISRAELI SOLDIER!](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=lbwrcvdbcvudc20kmpgua94ekode9laz6jryukpe4sudpu7hbp6v7o17q4x50f207oi8fni4f4a78ymyq85svq78v9jcea8q3qs7vj1zf9vvoge9akapqvh7ron7upwijnrivyuq8i2bjg99bj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sofqre&__onlt=h "SUPPORT AN ISRAELI SOLDIER!")
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=lbwrcvdbcvudc20kmpgua94ekode9laz71g4698p7et6z3xvrzzehhvlig70h0qnlj1nhhhsblt1a2ftc6jqqcw3thkwhg1ev675c3platc4b2yypu638d4ewxc5jodme4sjwgfbvhgrzaihte&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sofqre&__onlt=h "Banner")
_The Genesis 123 Foundation is a US-based non-profit. Our mission is to build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. We have diverse leadership of Jews and Christians united toward this objective, and aspire to create an abundance of programs to achieve these goals. We are excited to play a role in this important mission and hope you will join us and be blessed._
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39ug59b3x7kfd7d7yiyjcmidnldywr5yiwxglbtxj1y2mu5388fmvjknhb5zif3zyp20aoy2e3sq3mo6csp1&__stmp=sofqre&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=71jfniex30cft5mqdfgt0esk5imfx31d8lha8zhktkeveobzrb9mhm1ndbco1wf6brgrsdjnqnwph7v5efbonx9pc90lvjhnbumnrt81m6cf8demrqldrfs8b7n9xyp4q89vinf395i2aecfbnto&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sofqre&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=ohgxchu0m892c3n52a0wyz5z102w6v9hlbdsvdd10mo4s6r6a1dn1qivndfzd4q4wbfl8ab3zwceasdkt601o56ul5x91gxvbn8eg7t2javsp7a3553xynrmy7ern5y1fmukxl71r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sofqre&__onlt=h)
