name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: A free online video series about Big Pharma
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7740a1b4faf94a5eb52aa55b20674c3d&_e=SSw8iEcpPPdLm0607kdX_KdbkR_eljwUpGRPsPid4AnbPKW_rhxVc88OEVN5NEIr1_M8RXaDiL7K3G5ZKnEoONhUS37HpNLJXEwq7j6YhEF9b7_hHlvHi-5R5fkSLJMJt1ettFDpRAg3ExWb7hXIYR8ue4DcuwUGAS905aUkVbAlGaWd8I5qUt2juUv6cOx8LcCyy4sHw5vyQTLCS_HUGzJNd4s6y94QzJOmobHlABIM8xTyO5xekm1zjc5EaUR5Csl51xhEKWWaG6EaNSqNHmv9fDHqdAORi9heYjOM-IwWep5RurDEavPlYV92iYsWst6cRvQfkHT6OcLAcN5RuTqQ4OycHK1GJooYdtx-2YRdd_mZTDS0nojdUMACdle1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7740a1b4faf94a5eb52aa55b20674c3d&_e=SSw8iEcpPPdLm0607kdX_KdbkR_eljwUpGRPsPid4AnbPKW_rhxVc88OEVN5NEIr1_M8RXaDiL7K3G5ZKnEoONhUS37HpNLJXEwq7j6YhEF9b7_hHlvHi-5R5fkSLJMJt1ettFDpRAg3ExWb7hXIYR8ue4DcuwUGAS905aUkVbAlGaWd8I5qUt2juUv6cOx8LcCyy4sHw5vyQTLCS_HUGzJNd4s6y94QzJOmobHlABI-VuImJYaF95krvtfgb5zlqFKA4ZolWidMCt_xsuCuHKYWnddSggThUBzH6IdncuGaI0oQCBg24YqLx5GbOAEM2fRcw0dkr2AQoMBq4QexwYC3PKGhfAqfo50i4zkqMMxAtZXyk9nvhumT-wPLzbz1)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Liberty in America is under serious threat
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsZlu1FWqN
I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to
participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the
Department of Justice.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osZlu1FWqN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email-I would
appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in
Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice.

The survey will only take a few moments of
your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very
survival of the rule of law in America.

The current administration's weaponization of
the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

Instead of protecting your God-given
constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of
Justice to attack its political opponents…

…as well as Christians, parents, and
anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media
it…

Covers up a two-tiered justice system
that violates your constitutional rights

Hides the corruption of the ruling
class

Attacks those with traditional
viewpoints

That's why I'm asking you to take the
Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.

By completing this survey, you will help
us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like
you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale
strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf
of liberty-including the importance of the rule of law and checks
and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential
safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National
Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64026517:sZlu1FWqN:m:3:2627245898:4C7D96E3968712D9D8F8D84FEE34B10F:r

The Declaration of Independence argues
that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural
rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the
governed.

Yet today's ruling class regularly
disregards the will of the American people, and our rights-to the
freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to
gun ownership, and more-are under constant attack.

You and I know that liberty in America is
under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell
the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against
this threat.

A vital part of our efforts in this
fight-in which Hillsdale College is a leader-is reaching and
teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's
great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our
educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend
Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.

These efforts include:

Teaching bright and principled
students-on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington,
D.C.-who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education,
including a required course on the Constitution

Distributing Imprimis, America's
leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4
million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues
include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by
Harmeet K. Dhillon

Producing and promoting free
online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics
such as the Constitution, American history, and free market
economics

Providing a classical K-12
curriculum with a solid grounding in American history,
constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate
thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the
past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach
efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by
completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and
returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few
minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us
form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of
Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College
is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to
accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly
in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

This independence frees the College
from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it
also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support
of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of
education to liberty.

If you agree that we are now seeing
an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you
will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous
tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing
the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice, which
you can access at this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64026517:sZlu1FWqN:m:3:2627245898:4C7D96E3968712D9D8F8D84FEE34B10F:r

Thank you for your time and
attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and
I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational
outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty
Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isZlu1FWqN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osZlu1FWqN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice, which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 25, 2023. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/900e8caa-8049-4d46-9292-1c456a31e716?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On December 11, 2024, many people reported receiving email or text messages from Democrat Blake Gendebien, announcing he was running for the Congressional seat in New York 21 currently held by Elise Stefanik. There was also some very nice press coverage about Blake.
I received numerous texts, email messages, phone calls, and social media messages. "Who is this guy and why does it say he is running?"
Another message: "And does he have DNC support?"
Answer to first question: Blake Gendebien is a great guy. I have met him and his wife. Good vibes all around. I am glad he is entering the arena in this fight for our democracy.
Answer to second question: Nobody in NY-21 has DNC support.
**There is no Special Election in NY-21 yet.**
As I type this, there is no Special Election race in NY-21. There will not be a Special Election race until Stefanik is confirmed by the Senate and appointed by Trump. Then Stefanik has to resign her office that she has held since 2015.
Pause right there. If I were a Republican (cough, cough, OMG did I really just type those words?!?!?), I would be assessing the mass exit we have seen from the Republican votes in the House of Representatives. Aren't we up to 4 now? Their numbers are dwindling, while Democrats have picked up a few since November.
We cannot assume that Stefanik will resign. She is making the rounds to get support, notably even from Democrat John Fetterman. Stefanik is a powerful voice, she is Chair of the Republican Conference, and she raises tens of millions of dollars wherever she goes - something she cannot do as a U.N. Ambassador.
But there exists a possible scenario in which Stefanik doesn't resign. Stranger things have happened in MAGA world. Remember when that Congressman resigned to accept a position in the cabinet, only to then withdraw his nomination due to threat of revelations of his sexcapades? (I know, it's a blur, but that was only about 2 weeks ago.)
So let me emphasize - we don't have a Special Election in NY-21 right now, and a lot of things have to happen before we have one.
And while I would really love to have another opportunity to run for the seat in 2025, [Stefanik is on record with her desire to see the United States de-fund the United Nations Relief and Works Agency (UNRWA). ](https://substack.com/redirect/e5971617-4f10-427a-b5f6-94900667a635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)So let me be clear: I would actually rather see two more years of Stefanik in NY-21 than to have her actively working to dismantle the UN.
### "But aren't you running?"
**I announced my candidacy for the midterm race in 2026. I have also submitted my Letter of Intent and Resume to express my wish to be the Democratic candidate if there is a race in 2025.**
I believe that my candidacy presents the strongest opportunity that Democrats have to claim the seat in the U.S. House of Representatives. Here are my reasons:
* Name recognition. My name and my face are familiar to the voters, since I have spent the last 6 months driving the miles and meeting people in tiny towns throughout the 15,000 square miles. Many of the voters still have my yard signs (the ones that did not get stolen).

Repeatedly when I was campaigning for the General Election, voters said that they would like to see me run again in 2026 if I didn't make it in 2024. To me, it is logical that we would keep the same name and face on the ballot in 2025, rather than change mere months after the last race.
* The learning curve of running a campaign in such a geographically vast district is steep. You have to know where the town committees are the greater "in the trenches" presence than the county committees. There are places in the district where the support doesn't come from the Democrats at all, but from various environmental groups, community action organizations, and Indivisible groups.
* The Democrat who ran in 2022 raised some $2.1 million, was actively fundraising for slightly more than a year, and got 116,421 votes. I got into the race with only 6 months to campaign, raised less than $200,000, but still got 130,617 votes. Those are raw figures, and the 2022 candidate had a larger percentage of the vote. But 130,617 is a strong showing in the greater context of MAGAs overwhelming capture of both houses of Congress plus the presidency in 2024. Let's not mess with success.
* I'm running on a platform that is a direct reflection of what the voters told me in the last election that they wanted: kitchen table issues. Voters want to know how Democrats can help them to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over their heads.

### **But assuming that Stefanik resigns, what is the process?**
Let's continue walking through the process. If and when Stefanik resigns, her resignation triggers Governor Hochul to call for a Special Election.
A few voters have asked me if our Democratic Governor could just appoint someone to fill the seat. The answer is no. Hochul cannot appoint someone to fill a seat in the House of Representatives. The Governor could appoint someone to fill a Senate seat, as she did with Kirsten Gillibrand some years ago. But not for the House. The rules emphasize something that NY-21 voters have wanted for a long time, which is representation tailored to their needs and priorities within the congressional district.
### **How is the Democratic Nominee chosen?**
Once Hochul calls the Special Election, the four political parties in New York (Conservative, Democratic, Republican, and Working Families) will gather their respective party leaders and nominate a candidate who will go on their ballot line. NY-21 encompasses all or part of 15 counties.
Unlike for a General Election, to run as a Democrat, one cannot gather signatures on a petition, file it with the Board of Elections, and print up campaign bling. For the Special Election, to run as a Democrat, you must get the nomination from the local leaders of the Democratic party.
In the case of the Democrats, the 15 county chairs will enter a weighted vote, based on the number of registered voters in the respective counties. Thus, Hamilton County, with sparse population, will have a vote, but St. Lawrence County, which has the greatest number of people in a single county living in NY-21, will have a more substantial weighted vote. (Note that Oneida and Jefferson Counties have large populations overall, but only portions of their counties are within the NY-21 boundaries. The votes of Jefferson and Oneida Counties will be weighted according to the number of people living within NY-21.)
In case you are wondering, the State Republican Party rules have similar rules that assign the task of nominating their candidate. However it is widely believed that Stefanik or Trump will pick the nominee. Stay tuned.
There is one exception to the rule about getting the nomination from the party. If someone wants to run as an Independent, they have about 12 days to gather 3500 signatures from registered voters from within NY-21. Heaven help those candidates if there is 6 feet of snow on the ground. It could be done, but it is a formidable task.
If I don't get the nomination from the 15 chairs of the Democratic county committees, I will come out in full support of whomever does. We have no time for Democratic candidates to grumble on the sidelines. We have a Democracy to save.
Once we have the names for the ballot, the race actually starts. The election will be held 70-80 days after the nominations are submitted to the Board of Elections. That will go by in a blink of an eye and a dusting of snow.
### How many Democrats have said that they want to run for Congress in NY-21?
I am not an insider to the discussions among the county chairs, but I was told at a gathering in Washington County on Sunday that some 9 people have submitted Letters of Intent and Resumes to the 15 Democratic County Committee chairs for consideration for the ballot nomination. So, as Blake Gendebien did earlier this week, you might be seeing more messages vying for your attention in the days ahead. All candidates who have expressed an interest in running (including me) are technically in an exploratory stage of campaigning.
This is good in many ways. I got on the ballot late in February 2024 because there was no other candidate actively making the rounds and doing events in the counties.
### We need to build the bench in Democratic politics in upstate New York.
The 15 counties in NY-21, like rural counties all over the country, have a serious lack of "bench" candidates. In other words, there is a lack of people who participate on county committees or in Democratic party events who could then be persuaded to submit their names to run for office at varying levels of government. In St. Lawrence County, where I live, we're going into 2025 with some 150 seats unchallenged. That means we're looking at as many as 150 races that will be won by Republicans by default because there will be no Democrat on the ballot.
This is how MAGA has gotten so entrenched in rural counties.
### So what do we do now?
For now, we wait and we watch for the moment when the Special Election in NY-21 is actually called. I have done a few exploratory events, and will do more in the coming weeks. But at this precise moment, there is no actual Special Election in NY-21. All of my current campaign activities are officially characterized as exploratory efforts for the midterm race in 2026.
If you are interested in running for office, I encourage you to reach out to your Democratic county chair and inquire about how to submit a Letter of Intent and Resume.
Even if you aren't up for a drive through NY-21's 15 counties and 15,000 square miles, maybe you are up for one of those other elected seats in your county.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

Tulsi Gabbard is in **PERIL**
The Anti-American Democrats have gathered _**MILLIONS**_ of signatures to have Tulsi Gabbard _**BLOCKED**_ from President Trump’s administration.
If Tulsi Gabbard becomes Trump’s Director of National Intelligence, Republicans can GUT the deep-state and return government to the MAGA Majority.
That’s why Democrats are **_SCRAMBLING_** to get rid of Tulsi. They know it’s their only chance to cling to power.
**We can’t afford to lose this fight. The damage will be too severe.**
That’s why just last night, **_THOUSANDS_** of Veterans and America-First Senators signed a petition **_DEMANDING_** the **_CONFIRMATION_** of Tulsi Gabbard as the United States’ next Director of National Intelligence.
**This is where YOU come in. We need an OVERWHELMING and IMMEDIATE response right here - right NOW. **

clean_body: I WAS PHYSICALLY ACCOSTED last night. A PRO-TRANS MAN chose violence and threats , costing me an injured wrist. Thankfully, I'm safe and the police have arrested him. The violence against me for trying to protect women only furthers my point. I need to HOLD THE LINE because women DESERVE to BE SAFE. This attack came right after I celebrated a MAJOR WIN: passing my bill to keep men out of women's bathrooms on Capitol Hill. As a victim of ab#se and r#pe, I know the risks women and girls face when they 're stripped of their privacy and safety. And these activists will stop at NOTHING to silence anyone who dares defend us. And after last night, it is clear I CANNOT STOP the fight! I 'm launching a NATIONAL fight to BAN biological men from entering women's spaces on ALL federal property. Peter, the stakes couldn't be higher. The mob is coming for me, but I need to know you're standing with me. 👉 Act NOW and SIGN YOUR NAME >> Paid for by Team Mace. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. Team Mace, 824 S. Milledge Ave., Ste. 101, Athens, GA, 30605 |

name: PoliticsPA
subject: Women flip script on motherhood and politics
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This segment dives into PA Women in Politics– **Beth Ann Rosica,** Education Reporter for Broad + Liberty, **Tasliym Morales,** School Board Member, and**Stacy Whomsley,** School Board Director all share insights you don’t want to miss.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **School Board Member Tasliym Morales** explains that because “women are traditionally the caretakers in the family” women who run for political or local offices lack support at home which “creates a big difference in the amount of women who want to run for office.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8b36bb85e4&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**School Board Director Stacy Whomsley** urged that a major reason women are hesitant to enter their local arenas or become civically involved is because of how they are treated once they are elected into office, reflecting that she “was cast aside and diminished and no matter what angle I approached it with my children and family would become twisted and weaponized.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bab7d023a3&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Reporter Beth Ann Rosica** emphasizes how despite the stigma women face in positions of political offices “as moms, we know how to recognize compromise and respect while valuing differences and appreciating every child for who they are.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e61eceee16&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Public Opinion_
* In the 2024 election, residents of swing states who voted were **more likely to identify as Republican (50%) than Democrat (46%)** , reflecting a similar trend seen nationwide. [[IPSOS](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dafe0248a0&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* When asked if their**financial situation would improve in the next year** , about 78% of Republicans said it was very likely, while around 30% of Democrats said it was unlikely. [[IPSOS](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eac13fab47&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Voter Interests_
* About half **(53%)** of Americans say **inflation** is the most important issue facing the country, followed by **immigration (37%)** and political extremism or **polarization (24%**). [[IPSOS](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=27b40d0444&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* **Hispanic women (+35 net Harris)** are significantly more likely than **Hispanic men (+4 net Trump)** to say they voted for Harris over Trump. [[IPSOS](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=97e2389090&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Elections_
* Now that Casey has conceded, Republicans are set to have a 53-47 majority in the Senate starting next year. [[Democracy Docket](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dcbad79825&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **Women in PA politics talk motherhood, career, and parent-teacher engagement**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6104b28e62&e=b7b3eddce2 "The Women of PA Politics + Data on Post-Dobbs & Trump Verdict Voting Trends | Voices of Reason Ep. 6")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ba206c352e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| Fact-checkers often play umpire but rarely call it fair. One side’s truths are labeled “needs more context,” while the other’s whoppers get a pass. That’s why we launched [FactCheckPA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c3393e8c20&e=b7b3eddce2): to sort fact from fiction, no matter the source. Follow us for breakdowns of claims from Pennsylvania politicians, interest groups, and media—and [send us tips](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c27f70436f&e=b7b3eddce2) on what to check.
---
| [Submit a Fact-Check Request](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7be856248d&e=b7b3eddce2 "Submit a Fact-Check Request")
---
|
* * *
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=512fe316b8&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7a889c1320&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ff193528be&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e2cc809d70&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=11debeb7d7&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8ba5047efd&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).

clean_body: Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | | | | | Welcome to the latest edition of Voices of Reason where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast. This segment dives into PA Women in Politics– Beth Ann Rosica, Education Reporter for Broad + Liberty, Tasliym Morales, School Board Member, andStacy Whomsley, School Board Director all share insights you don’t want to miss. | Big Names Make News | School Board Member Tasliym Morales explains that because “women are traditionally the caretakers in the family” women who run for political or local offices lack support at home which “creates a big difference in the amount of women who want to run for office.” ] School Board Director Stacy Whomsley urged that a major reason women are hesitant to enter their local arenas or become civically involved is because of how they are treated once they are elected into office, reflecting that she “was cast aside and diminished and no matter what angle I approached it with my children and family would become twisted and weaponized.” ] Reporter Beth Ann Rosica emphasizes how despite the stigma women face in positions of political offices “as moms, we know how to recognize compromise and respect while valuing differences and appreciating every child for who they are.” ] | | Numbers You Need to Know | Public Opinion In the 2024 election, residents of swing states who voted were more likely to identify as Republican (50%) than Democrat (46%) , reflecting a similar trend seen nationwide. ] When asked if theirfinancial situation would improve in the next year , about 78% of Republicans said it was very likely, while around 30% of Democrats said it was unlikely. ] Voter Interests About half (53%) of Americans say inflation is the most important issue facing the country, followed by immigration (37%) and political extremism or polarization (24%). ] Hispanic women (+35 net Harris) are significantly more likely than Hispanic men (+4 net Trump) to say they voted for Harris over Trump. ] Elections Now that Casey has conceded, Republicans are set to have a 53-47 majority in the Senate starting next year. ] | | Women in PA politics talk motherhood, career, and parent-teacher engagement | "The Women of PA Politics + Data on Post-Dobbs & Trump Verdict Voting Trends | Voices of Reason Ep. 6" | | In Case You Missed It... | | Fact-checkers often play umpire but rarely call it fair. One side’s truths are labeled “needs more context,” while the other’s whoppers get a pass. That’s why we launched : to sort fact from fiction, no matter the source. Follow us for breakdowns of claims from Pennsylvania politicians, interest groups, and media—and on what to check. | "Submit a Fact-Check Request" | | The Voices of Reason podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from to . Secretary of the Commonwealth , PA Treasurer , and House Appropriations Chairman are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions. Visit the Voice of Reason to experience all the great moments you missed. | | Get in Touch | We like smart ideas and want to hear from you. Send feedback and inquire about appearing on Voices of Reason , at mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry. | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. You're getting Voices of Reason updates due to your interest in the PoliticsPA & Broad + Liberty websites, plus stories with impact in Pennsylvania, the Greater Philadelphia area, and beyond. body:
Thank you for your input!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98634574/517311889/-211760203?refcode=EM_C_241213input_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjZiNWZmYS02MmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZAxxjwHgyELCdbC65CGTlgcPi74U9F1DUch5rGOScw=) Peter - Last week, I reached out with a short survey to help inform my priorities as I enter my second full term of Congress. I wanted to thank you for your input.

From access to comprehensive and affordable health care to democracy reform and voting rights, climate protections, the economy, and much more, you let me know what’s on your mind. Now, your direct input will be put to use to help me and my team prioritize where to focus next year to deliver for the people.

I am proud of the progress we have made together. And as we head into what will surely be a difficult next four years, it’s more important than ever that we work together to fight for our shared values. With your help, we can continue to advocate for an economy that puts working people first, protects the most vulnerable among us, ensures quality education for every child, upholds our fundamental right to vote, and more.

[**I have vowed to work to build a more just and equitable future, but I am going to need your help. Will you consider chipping in $5 or more to support my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98634575/517311892/-211760203?refcode=EM_C_241213input_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjZiNWZmYS02MmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZAxxjwHgyELCdbC65CGTlgcPi74U9F1DUch5rGOScw=)

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. Box 4217 Hopkins, MN 55343 United States **

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8f3f75215234e74a128d6940cade03b&_e=auXQAx2VHOvjl3FxUYec6PRf5z2VBG85JnMYaZDmbuYEBMaNQa_k64tw1Q8HJL_5gBjUgx16QuMXDpHo9tQgaXGaACmqMkhUiVw_-FxVyJuDwk-2R-z06k2QAheH6BSB5uTs9tWBSxKhcZBQcmwi5vCVuZjAD0Ggl3263MuiYiKOhyydZg-G5LnRDnyN4mLGhWgFZi6SBi54HFhSTH39yTxLG0HkcFODehg8oK3bHKAeF9BrbwuIiHA5hISCMQ3f7icDNTRtVNHGM3mS0M1dPMKD5S3JaAnyDitzPdL5kZWnTf1tIPgZQH0MeP6-dubA9dO4sMtF2x7liV0DvnphV7MUw_0zoVRQYsE0TXQfCOCFmNc8yFzWIgSJysP8mDgeobSJ9QsrCBvfhqUyMGdNTw%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8f3f75215234e74a128d6940cade03b&_e=auXQAx2VHOvjl3FxUYec6PRf5z2VBG85JnMYaZDmbuYEBMaNQa_k64tw1Q8HJL_5gBjUgx16QuMXDpHo9tQgaXGaACmqMkhUiVw_-FxVyJuDwk-2R-z06k2QAheH6BSB5uTs9tWBSxKhcZBQcmwi5vCVuZjAD0Ggl3263MuiYiKOhyydZg-G5LnRDnyN4mLGhWgFZi6SBi54HFhSTH39yTxLG0HkcFODehg8oK3bHKAeF9BrbwuIiHA5hISCMQ3fRw9Y4A-toxL6OS6xlTRT4N6Xnww8mfKtMnvB2KhHKIi62C6fBms4Dm3UAPH3hPPL-MF770Xdtt_PZDsnHuk_yTu8b83dztPiyKebJ8zY9ILWWhZERmdNLuAKLKJ8rLBwP5yg5n7vXMm3LNGrZU2JJQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8f3f75215234e74a128d6940cade03b&_e=auXQAx2VHOvjl3FxUYec6PRf5z2VBG85JnMYaZDmbuYEBMaNQa_k64tw1Q8HJL_5gBjUgx16QuMXDpHo9tQgaXGaACmqMkhUiVw_-FxVyJuDwk-2R-z06k2QAheH6BSB5uTs9tWBSxKhcZBQcmwi5vCVuZjAD0Ggl3263MuiYiKOhyydZg-G5LnRDnyN4mLGhWgFZi6SBi54HFhSTH39yTxLG0HkcFODehg8oK3bHKAeF9BrbwuIiHA5hISCMQ3foIUHG859PZ3pUXE-7s9VToSgIsv9JTZF_lDbg6PiuBtklVLGBDJvP1AeKDDPhOVhhLduc_AoVIA0FlT0E8ZWMfYt0-0-I4sbyCEoBSp4hfopKTSjt52n73UlP9XswWAoa5UA6rhwMw-f3ZqJ0iq7TA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Join Team Ortt for the Army Navy Football game and support our campaign for common sense in Albany | | | | | | | == | Dear Supporter, Just wanted to send a quick reminder that our annual Friends & Football Fundraiser is TOMORROW, December 14th. Come out and enjoy the Army-Navy Football Game with Team Ortt! Doors open at 3:00pm at Sweeney Hose Company #7, 499 Zimmerman Street in North Tonawanda. Veterans with ID are FREE! You can RSVP online here:== or email mailto:finance@robortt.com. == == Thank you for your continued support! -Rob Ortt | | == | | == | | | Can't make it? Folks, Trump's cabinet picks have left us saying...yikes. He's picked a Fox News host, an anti-vaxxer, and a TV doctor to join his administration – and this is only the beginning. I know it can be disheartening watching the aftermath of election night unfolding, but **this only gives us even more reason to strengthen our resolve to support Democrats and ensure we can fight back against this administration.** It isn't going to be easy, but with you on our team, we can take on these hard fights together. [**So if you're ready to fight back, can you contribute $10 or more to our efforts to defend our democracy against Trump's chaotic cabinet picks?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98637528/517319727/-103748983?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.13_CabinetChaos_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkxODQxNS02NWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xc1sgMKtGMKzH_C-PHLy2QvqQLa7tUW8UE_1NM5qBsU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**CHIP IN $10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98637529/517319735/-103748983?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.13_CabinetChaos_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkxODQxNS02NWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xc1sgMKtGMKzH_C-PHLy2QvqQLa7tUW8UE_1NM5qBsU=)**

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a05cd78fb9a4e68b5bb6b123ac34239&_e=2bKE_oZbWeWu5eFZRPtuC4CzS8CquMwGXEdstrg5yUGi0CaWsXwmh4Wndw0iY01uEYC18PuUveiKARCMDENbzhdE-w4M1yIcE6qoBP6bZJttZYV4My27Nzh4uZtDwHinQy62_23ChLwFohgV1acHZSvauaOAnmntu6cdFe_k4LauNBBLaDrC5Oy2Gn2MIQ90Gnx7jRsWYkFwMNT4hxZaS-WMtRfIFwFOqyKY82Eb-zdBj2Wn_VA8shw2WpY9j7sR3oPBQcv8YY7rCjBZTCIaclOwOQB6Z3lZuq81dE5N_Yj_hGkhms5lmeEe_CMYCTninGqn-enZ6H1Cp3STpqn4VPdiP-YGS7y1sPDQjQvPyuAZE2GC1-QKI0uSnHy8QzZS9PTtcBvU3RLVqT_lWL9JbQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9a05cd78fb9a4e68b5bb6b123ac34239&_e=2bKE_oZbWeWu5eFZRPtuC4CzS8CquMwGXEdstrg5yUGi0CaWsXwmh4Wndw0iY01uEYC18PuUveiKARCMDENbzhdE-w4M1yIcE6qoBP6bZJttZYV4My27Nzh4uZtDwHinQy62_23ChLwFohgV1acHZSvauaOAnmntu6cdFe_k4LauNBBLaDrC5Oy2Gn2MIQ90Gnx7jRsWYkFwMNT4hxZaS-WMtRfIFwFOqyKY82Eb-zdBj2Wn_VA8shw2WpY9j7sRAVwbC3lvdVjp-JX6BsDkNDOtKOu7zt00l2SmQINFg5m4JFK9QPoNLTk8ciamHlIq_frZNQDZ4atjaH7qBA_GGhl_D_vMkKsTqy6cx0glLiy6eUwwGaaKBRigecPPpVWXSnsEEAjIN_Y8yizi6_09yQ%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---

David Horowitz

clean_body: Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. name: John Kasich
subject: Wrapping up 2024 and looking ahead to 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I know you agree with me, and that's why it's so important that we continue to speak up and speak out about what we want from our elected leaders.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=55048bd290fe4214906f0e23ef0a89ec&_e=6hlk_qf68pCJTwSN-bMOPVZNXkms8GrgTJKgo0usk7QOLPZUN9cEaSe3xVDu-wcNqyhXCmBIr6ohdPQ-lTygX7CWcKjevxQgNQ5aW6O0Biqd6PuSgXr9cZ_br-ikgIjR6ufy-vNE4QGhWPqPf9kgo3pvpwvu_gUJstgDhQOaqNJ4EiG1cB4eLLHpIi9__E4UzAZdxWiPE6rQtAhgmWOMsw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, As we near the end of a head-spinning year and turn the page to 2025, I'm reaching out to ask if you'd be willing [to donate $25 or more right now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=55048bd290fe4214906f0e23ef0a89ec&_e=6hlk_qf68pCJTwSN-bMOPW09xfvp6z_y-AWqeSZjdOR1A6z6LMjXjP1gBe8w-PeYE3EuiNvQEoiaoezltLyEEfgfa80B4s8EtVb3SIvCXwmAY87Egbbsd2afKeKUtsOy_2f8P9sioH0eiVGrK4AmgsAwgCHIi7S_SeEc8sPucw0vOzHL9pCWFLOSuDUi6Dr2rOyPRM4KUIJ0u6zNZlYBx-fNfZ-0GMDBpiycUllF1sw%3D) as your way of ensuring we have the tools and resources that allow us to communicate with you and so many others about pressing issues impacting the future success of our country.

There's no doubt that we are in living in uncertain and difficult times for our nation. But no matter how crazy our politics and culture may seem at times, every day from my conversations with people across America I see signs of hope and optimism.

The noise out of Washington can be loud and divisive, but throughout our country, many Americans simply want their elected leaders to go to work and get the job done – just like they and their neighbors do every day. They want better economic opportunities for themselves, their families and the communities they call home.

That’s why I'm out there every week using every tool at my disposal to give hope and encouragement to as many Americans as I can.

I know you agree with me, and that's why it's so important that we continue to speak up and speak out about what we want from our elected leaders.

**Peter - I'm counting on your continued support to ensure that we can keep this important work moving forward**.

One of the realities is that we need to raise the funds to continue rallying support for this positive agenda. [Will you please consider chipping in before our December 31 fundraising deadline](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=55048bd290fe4214906f0e23ef0a89ec&_e=6hlk_qf68pCJTwSN-bMOPW09xfvp6z_y-AWqeSZjdOR1A6z6LMjXjP1gBe8w-PeY17Tl2tJhvw1KnKCMnvh9b3gNB-UQDJFyUmf-Ltef3a_dezSYz9vA1IoeVgTB6uzgAkTkr0VMa3t3ioa6je7kg2SsYVi_bY6qWJk_TcHPiSY8ptPQsDd8BxWMXtzV1rg9a069to3W-ZnxwpRH82DL4MvDw3Gl_cXtUr9Fd-uO39Q%3D) to help with this important cause and ensure that we can keep up the fight for a better America?
---
[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=55048bd290fe4214906f0e23ef0a89ec&_e=6hlk_qf68pCJTwSN-bMOPW09xfvp6z_y-AWqeSZjdOR1A6z6LMjXjP1gBe8w-PeY0ZLeMPcfODPCU0ZoPkC9WLtw6DH1_vdgegGwP8mxHP5wWgAW9eQXu0-mKvph1Go_PYrTFU4D3xU88y0ZazR79LIk5tRI9k-v9nnbliWT1vTPzirKAsnizUOUOIvX7IDcNobfJYky5ck08LRPF-R-tYLo7Vr_Rzi57I48OUN8tjs%3D)
---
I'm so appreciative of your ongoing support. Thank you. And best wishes for a happy holiday season! -John
---
| | |
---

[] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard. They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress. We CANNOT let them get away with it! Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [] Thanks for taking action, Team RTP [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. clean_body: 3 things everyone must know about Virginia's attorney general: | | | | | Team, here are three things to know about Jason Miyares, Virginia’s far-right attorney general: 1) Miyares has called for women's rights to be attacked, including through a statewide abortion ban.2) Jason Miyares is bought and paid for by Virginia's largest corporate polluters and price gougers.3) And he’s vowed to defend Donald Trump at all costs to score political points, rather than defend our democracy. = = Virginia will be the first test to see how far the Trump administration will go into taking away a woman’s right to choose, allowing corporations to run over working families, and if our democracy can stand up to freedom.But we have one opportunity to stop the chaos with Jay Jones. If he wins, he’ll fight to protect abortion rights for women, our healthcare access, and keep our kids safe.= = = = = = = \- Team Jay Jay Jones for Virginia PO Box 2501 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: URGENT: Trump picks anti-environmental extremist to run budget office. We need your help to respond.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4OTM1NTES1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDY1MDI0NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
DEVELOPING — Donald Trump has just picked Russell Vought, an anti-environmental
extremist, to lead the federal budget office. As head of the Office of
Management and Budget, Vought would be positioned to drastically cut environmental enforcement and clean energy. In a leaked speech delivered to far-right political donors, Vought said that he wants employees tasked with protecting our environment to
“feel trauma” and has called for their funding to be “shut down.” LCV’s teams are ready to fight Trump’s agenda in Congress, in the states, and in
the streets — but the truth is that we rely on support from our members to make our work possible. That’s why we’re aiming to raise $25,000 from LCV members before December 31. Please, renew your LCV membership for 2025 today — $5 is all it takes. Each gift helps us fight back against Trump’s disastrous anti-environmental agenda >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTVrg- As you’re reading this email, Donald Trump is assembling the most dangerous anti-environmental administration
in history.In addition to Vought, Trump plans to nominate Chris Wright — a Big Oil CEO — to
lead the Department of Energy. Wright is a science denier who has said “there is no climate crisis.” Their views may sound unbelievable, but make no mistake: Trump’s extreme nominees will be ready on Day One to do polluters’ bidding and
attack our environment and our democracy. At LCV, we’ve fought Trump’s dirty agenda before, and we’re ready to do it
again. We’re working with allies, elected leaders, and supporters across the
country to limit or block the damage a second Trump administration can do. But we rely on support from LCV members to make our campaigns work. So, we’re asking: Can you renew your LCV membership for 2025 today? Right now, $5 is all it takes. We need EVERYONE’s support to stand up to Trump and his anti-environmental cronies — please don’t wait >> https://links.messages.lcv. Thanks for standing with us, Peter. Supporters like you inspire us
every day to fight for people and our planet. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11893551&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDY1MDI0NQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDY1MDI0NQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11893551&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDY1MDI0NQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDY1MDI0NQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfE26GVh_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Inmate Number P01135780
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both
President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.

Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and
President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just
got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.

According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_,
_“SHE’S GOING FULL TILT WITH VENGEANCE AND EMOTIONS.”_

How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and
“vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the
Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the
cold hard _facts_.

But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch
hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk
free.

“‘IT IS UNDISPUTED’: FANI WILLIS HARSHLY CHASTISED BY JUDGE FOR
VIOLATING OPEN RECORDS LAWS IN LAWSUIT SEEKING HER COMMUNICATIONS WITH
JACK SMITH AND JAN. 6 COMMITTEE”

[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]

When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as
INMATE NUMBER P01135780.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]
__

IN FANI’S EYES, THE “P” STOOD FOR “PRISONER.” BUT, AS AN
INNOCENT MAN FIGHTING FOR HIS FREEDOM, TO ME THE “P” STANDS FOR
“PATRIOT.”

And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your
last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this
despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I
fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in
Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!

_(Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please
don’t even think twice!)_

IF YOU CAN, AND, SERIOUSLY, ONLY IF YOU CAN, PLEASE MAKE A
CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM
FUND – AS I KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE
DEMOCRATS’ DEEP STATE TRIES TO JAIL ME FOR LIFE.
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

CONTRIBUTE $50
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&amount=50&utm_term=vbout]

CONTRIBUTE $100

subject: Tracking poll: Corporate profits

body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121324_1&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Every day Americans are still feeling crunched by rising prices yet corporate profits and CEO pay are again reaching higher levels. These companies continue to pass their costs down to consumers, decreasing the size of items they are selling, and still blaming inflation, which is trending downwards, for their own decisions to gouge their customers.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Congress take further action to protect consumers as corporate profits and CEO compensation continue to soar?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121324_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121324_1&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121324_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121324_1&amount=25]

name: Blue Amp Action
subject: Can’t let billionaires buy our government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9b8afc5-429b-4080-b777-65182d6e0fba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, headlines like these have us worried: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teee57475-3506-4c11-9340-b5c9fa6940ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Our government is about to be in the hands of out-of-touch billionaires with NO IDEA what the average American needs to get by. Just take a look at some of the people Trump has picked to oversee our MOST IMPORTANT services:
* Elon Musk is supposed to lead a department dedicated to slashing government spending even though his budget cuts at Twitter have RUINED the site by turning it into a poorly designed hub of MAGA misinformation.

* TV Doctor Mehmet Oz was picked to lead the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services – but he wants to expand PRIVATIZED Medicare services for seniors, even though those plans limit doctor’s networks and require prior authorizations which could leave seniors without treatment coverage!!

* Charles Kusher, whose son Jared is married to Ivanka Trump, is going to represent the United States as ambassador to France. However, Charles served PRISON TIME for filing false tax returns and costing the IRS more than $200,000. There’s NO WAY someone who SCAMMED the government should EVER represent it.

[We need to gear up for the long fight ahead against appointments like these, Peter. At Blue Amp Action, we’re committed to investing in Democrats across the country who will challenge the MAGA threat to our nation. If you’re with us, can you chip in $15 or whatever you can spare to support our work today? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37256fa2-eef9-42fd-9233-5c0040e82dfb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Thank you. \- Blue Amp Action Team

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd368a98-fc7d-4333-9e61-be051231b0bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18203%2E878179%2EXiOYvD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18203%2E878179%2EXiOYvD).**

name: Kelly Morrison
subject: December Newsletter
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter!
Happy holiday season! I hope you are enjoying this busy time of year, and finding time to relax and reflect with your loved ones.
The past month and a half have been a whirlwind, and I want to share an update.
First, I hired my Campaign Manager Megan Hondl to take on the role of my Chief of Staff. I am excited and honored to report that she accepted this new challenge! The week after the election, we attended the two week New Member Orientation together in Washington. It was an incredible opportunity to meet my new colleagues and learn more about the ins and outs of Congress. I chose our district’s new office in the Longworth Building, and began to set up our operations. Peter, I wouldn’t be here in this role without you, and I want you to know how grateful I am!
Selfie of Megan and Kelly in front of the U.S. Capitol [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/people/image1.jpg]
Megan & I outside of the U.S. Capitol!
Earlier this week, I attended the Harvard Kennedy School’s Bipartisan Program for new members of Congress. It was another chance to spend time with my fellow new members and to learn from experts in government, economics, and foreign policy. It was an incredible opportunity and needless to say, I took a lot of notes!
Formal group photo of new members of Congress wearing business attire. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/people/harvard-institute.png]
Things have been busy back in Minnesota as well! A few highlights include having the opportunity to introduce Senator Klobuchar at her 20th annual Women’s Power Breakfast, spending time with my CD3 friends at our annual holiday party, attending Congressman Phillips’ final town hall, and joining the Minnesota Medical Association for a forum where we discussed the issues that will likely come up this next Congress that will impact patient care.
Photo collage of Kelly speaking at an event, a group photo at a holiday party, Dean Phillips and Kelly holding a cake that says ''Thank you Congressman Phillips'', and a screenshot of a zoom meeting. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/people/image2.png]
As busy as this work calendar gets, I continue to make time to cheer for our Minnesota sports teams - especially our Vikings (11-2 so far!) and the Minnesota Frost!
Thank you so much for your continued support, Peter!
With gratitude,
Kelly Morrison
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date on the campaign.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=W%2FD1rZIkxxWylA9UbG9SCclPh0wANVl404yUoMJU4uaKc2jsKAYWzvUUTvMJPY%2BwO6pnI6gAHaRT%2BGbToll10aR3UWR9Z6GIqS0K40OnrzlnalNQhWg4Yahr6fRNJjddW5Q4tuZAqYeqV8R2PM6FxqpyxtKsXfudmYDC1j%2FVQqklE91%2BVSHhdn8fW68TYPd58JVWDxDAUXE7y%2BRsWKx9NC1X9aYgQkW8tCRzdEvqNv5EBMFmp8C5xaBzw%2FGqCSqH%2B5gbZ7s%2FF2Y4iqs180J6L%2BSgqWyzupP4sg9z%2FE7voclt5rdBcwvKW0iqGW4%2F304%2BTtxAgXfGL%2F4RpxyDZcTQrKkznsWqFgZ%2BWN34PJngHNQFSddI3T8nqom1uYn%2BV%2FDpMfsJwlAYDBsBEE2knwLkPTG%2Fh3lhqrX8wgJSvwsQXRzvUenOLBrpKkLAjtXxGm%2FX] .
Morrison for Congress
PO Box 684
Wayzata, MN 55391
United States
Morrison for Congress

| | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! As the [Delaware Valley Journal](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YotOI2DH-2By2v4PJlM9Mdr-2BEmVEYaGbknm4wr88S6g6z-2BKVT5mL8Vi07gSr-2B-2F6r9KRI77QZ4GKRui55I-2BPjpItmOIQ-2FYdCbLo71tUOIzdM0c4qDYKZEVXHYXCMtU2a-2F-2F44A-3D-3DkGLe_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY0wqy-2FCNJJhnbkJ8gNWbx6UQgVRxVddXGjqfPYrEaSEkTO2qch7yb4hmou0mOSeNudI3R8E8jiUq-2FBoh-2FpMlgdS-2Bia4oRV9EIhe5hfFSv3vDwCxb8zcCNudv8H-2FKpQZObZW-2FoSWbkRegLWeRJO0F-2BSKtMWo808zfcrzEbKDd44xwiXnYsA7sYX6TNdLEJ9KDo) publishes: "Scott Presler, the GOP voting registration activist who helped flip several Pennsylvania county voter rolls from Democratic to Republican majority–ultimately helping elect President-elect Donald Trump–now has a new target: the state Supreme Court." In 2025, voters in Pennsylvania will have the power to elect judges in partisan elections, and to choose to keep or remove justices for the bench in nonpartisan judicial retention elections.In a time when voting rights are under attack and mis/disinformation continues to rise across the country, our work is urgent and necessary. Our communities must be fully informed about the importance of having fair and independent state and federal courts so that they are compelled to vote and protect their independence. #CourtsMatter #WhenWeVoteWeWin
---
| |

# Why Courts Matter: 101

Considering a more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in PA’s 2025 judicial elections, **Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania** , and us, are hosting: “Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall,” on Thursday, December 19, 2024, 6:30pm-8:00pm on Zoom.

But any efforts to halt the policy would face steep legal hurdles.” [Congress Passes Bill to Add More Federal Judgeships, Biden Plans to Veto It ](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YpZUHkN-2BljZaJXzDP365NJpshf9UgaCbaPERSJgV4M1WidD4Fdj9TGy8Rge9ihVfGe1ExL5mEr03HbE4HzlfF5D7M3qtsd51alp-2BsjG85FAFK3VMI2RXTW3oz8fUe3D7VrPTNLWyDeh9c6OPIvX7hFTOvboxAEe2huByGmH8C6SwmGjj_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY0wqy-2FCNJJhnbkJ8gNWbx6UQgVRxVddXGjqfPYrEaSElplDZQBdsKfxG0KDv6HZ-2BhjoF9ClNInR8SLjmwEklq1fRq10ehd-2BZzwE-2BcQWnFmszb5ARGXCVf5UNzz-2BRoYS-2BVwBr6RfvbJUs-2B0y3ooK3W62cULxbEnSHq6xtyLPbjwKdwcIJSeJO6WEZtoBcmVLt4) “The U.S. House passed a bill on Thursday to add more federal judgeships to alleviate overburdened district court judges, but the White House said President Joe Biden will veto it.”
