clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! As the publishes: "Scott Presler, the GOP voting registration activist who helped flip several Pennsylvania county voter rolls from Democratic to Republican majority–ultimately helping elect President-elect Donald Trump–now has a new target: the state Supreme Court." In 2025, voters in Pennsylvania will have the power to elect judges in partisan elections, and to choose to keep or remove justices for the bench in nonpartisan judicial retention elections.In a time when voting rights are under attack and mis/disinformation continues to rise across the country, our work is urgent and necessary. Our communities must be fully informed about the importance of having fair and independent state and federal courts so that they are compelled to vote and protect their independence. #CourtsMatter #WhenWeVoteWeWin | | UPCOMING EVENTS | | | Why Courts Matter: 101 Considering a more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in PA’s 2025 judicial elections, Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania , and us, are hosting: “Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall,” on Thursday, December 19, 2024, 6:30pm-8:00pm on Zoom. | | | NPP IN THE NEWS | | | NPPEF ON THE GROUND | | | The affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF), is getting more creative about where to meet Pennsylvanians to discuss why it is important to check their registration status and ensure they can vote in the primary elections.Here they engaged folks waiting at a new Wawa opening in Dauphin County. | | | | | McCormick Library, Harrisburg, Dauphin County | | | | | Cold weather crew | | | | | | | | West Chester, Chester County | | | | | Susquehanna High School, Harrisburg, Dauphin County | | | | | CareerLink Fair, Lackawanna County | | | | | | | | | NPPEF is also hosting several community events, including a series titled: "Cookies, cocoa & courts," in partnership with Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania. The next installment will happen on December 19th, between noon and 2pm at the McCormick Library in Harrisburg. | | SOCIAL OF THE WEEK On December 9th, activist, educator, and poet, Nikki Giovanni, passed away at the age of 81. May she rest in peace. | | | | | #COURTSMATTER | | “The judge ruled that the plaintiffs lacked standing to bring the case and gave them 14 days to file an amended complaint. The dismissal comes after a surge of right-wing lawsuits challenging voter rolls and their maintenance procedures this past election, including in Arizona.” “The North Carolina State Board of Elections (NCSBE) Tuesday it won’t order a full hand recount for GOP Supreme Court candidate Jefferson Griffin, after a partial recount confirmed incumbent Justice Allison Riggs’s (D) victory.” “Iowa Attorney General Brenna Bird (R) and Secretary of State Paul Pate (R) President Joe Biden’s administration, alleging that it is refusing to hand over the citizenship status information of over 2,000 registered voters on the state’s voter rolls.” “The decision comes just over a year after Beetem held a trial in a lawsuit brought by the League of Women Voters of Missouri, Missouri NAACP and three voters who alleged the burdensome identification rules infringe on the right to vote and the right to equal protection. The groups have already indicated their plan to appeal the decision in the near future.” | NEWS YOU CAN USE “In a recent op-ed for the conservative outlet The Daily Signal, Hans von Spakovsky, a right-wing lawyer and former FEC commissioner and Project 2025 contributor, outlines in further detail what Trump should do to roll back voting rights — specifically he explains what steps several federal agencies, like the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) and the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) should take and how it could potentially disenfranchise millions of voters.” “President-elect Donald Trump has promised to end birthright citizenship as soon as he gets into office to make good on campaign promises aiming to restrict immigration and redefining what it means to be American. But any efforts to halt the policy would face steep legal hurdles.” “The U.S. House passed a bill on Thursday to add more federal judgeships to alleviate overburdened district court judges, but the White House said President Joe Biden will veto it.” “She was interested in social work as a young woman and told her family she was inspired by President John F. Kennedy in the 1960s. So she joined the VISTA volunteer group after college and organized voter registration drives and church-related events for several years in underserved communities.” | | | Last day to register to vote: Monday, May 5, 2025 Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025 Last day to register to vote for the General Election: Monday, October 20, 2025 Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025 General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | Important Links: Voter Hotlines: Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTEDOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTAAsian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | | | | | ---|---|---

subject: Why abortion access in Ohio STILL hangs in the balance in 2025

body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98644691/517342690/-2131781993?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MidMonth_241213_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjEwZGY5MS02ZmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMdrjyNBlDZsciiWDXE6RKNw0_50vk6c9rl14UYHkII=) Team,

**FIRST:** The Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ , stripping away federal protections for abortion and paving the way for states to restrict and outright ban abortion rights.

**THEN:** Ohio voters passed a constitutional amendment to protect abortion rights and prevent the Ohio GOP’s extremist anti-abortion ban from taking effect.

**NOW:** Thanks to extremist anti-abortion Republicans in Ohio incessantly trying to overturn Issue 1, legal battles surrounding abortion regulations, including a six-week ban, the 24-hour waiting period, and even an attempt to stop telemedicine as a way to receive abortion treatment, are continuing to unfold in the Ohio courts, extending well into 2025.

[_**The fight for reproductive freedom in Ohio is far from over, and we need your support to face the challenges ahead. Can you pitch in $5 ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline so we can defend abortion in Ohio in 2025 and beyond?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98644692/517342691/-2131781993?amount=5&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MidMonth_241213_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjEwZGY5MS02ZmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMdrjyNBlDZsciiWDXE6RKNw0_50vk6c9rl14UYHkII=)

name: Kate Cox
subject: Denied care. Forced to flee. My story.
body:
Abortion ban exceptions don't work | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98645175/517343806/-1586972746?sourceid=1150198&utm_campaign=25emjge-1205aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=katecox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTJlMjZkOC02ZmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hL7R-Uf786Lzf0x15rmdVf8sTBYXZNrnHgUZaL_mXOw=&emci=d82e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=ea2e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)
---
Dear Peter,

My name is Kate Cox. **Last December, the Texas Supreme Court denied my request for an emergency abortion, despite a fatal fetal diagnosis and severe risks to my health and future fertility.** I was the first pregnant woman to ask a court's permission to access an emergency abortion since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade._

In the midst of my health crisis, the Center for Reproductive Rights was my champion. Today, they continue fighting for everyone facing the devastating impacts of harmful abortion bans. [**They need your help now more than ever—because something must change.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98645176/517343807/-1586972746?sourceid=1150198&utm_campaign=25emjge-1205aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=katecox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTJlMjZkOC02ZmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hL7R-Uf786Lzf0x15rmdVf8sTBYXZNrnHgUZaL_mXOw=&emci=d82e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=ea2e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237) | [**5X MATCH: GIVE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98645177/517343808/-1586972746?sourceid=1150198&utm_campaign=25emjge-1205aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=katecox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTJlMjZkOC02ZmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hL7R-Uf786Lzf0x15rmdVf8sTBYXZNrnHgUZaL_mXOw=&emci=d82e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=ea2e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237 "5X MATCH: GIVE NOW")
---
At 19 weeks pregnant, I learned my pregnancy had Trisomy 18, a fatal genetic condition. My husband and I were shattered. **My doctor said an abortion was necessary to protect my health—but Texas law said otherwise.**

Instead of receiving care, I was treated like a criminal. My husband and I were told we could be prosecuted simply for seeking critical health care. **I was forced to flee my home state to get the procedure I needed.**

This is the harsh reality of abortion bans. Medical exceptions to abortion bans _do not work._ The horrifying experience and trauma of being denied basic medical care compounded our grief, and no family should have to endure this.

[**If my story has moved you, please support the Center for Reproductive Rights today. Right now, your gift will go 5X as far.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98645178/517343809/-1586972746?sourceid=1150198&utm_campaign=25emjge-1205aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=katecox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTJlMjZkOC02ZmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hL7R-Uf786Lzf0x15rmdVf8sTBYXZNrnHgUZaL_mXOw=&emci=d82e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=ea2e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)
[**CRITICAL SUPPORT NEEDED**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98645179/517343810/-1586972746?sourceid=1150198&utm_campaign=25emjge-1205aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=katecox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTJlMjZkOC02ZmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hL7R-Uf786Lzf0x15rmdVf8sTBYXZNrnHgUZaL_mXOw=&emci=d82e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=ea2e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237 "CRITICAL SUPPORT NEEDED")
---
The Center represented me when I needed them most, and they are still on the front lines, fighting tirelessly for families like mine. Your support is the reason they can be there for those whose rights and lives are at stake. It was donors like you who made it possible for the Center to represent me during the most challenging moment of my life.

[**With your generosity, we can push for change and protect the future of reproductive rights in Texas and around the world.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98645180/517343811/-1586972746?sourceid=1150198&utm_campaign=25emjge-1205aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=katecox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTJlMjZkOC02ZmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hL7R-Uf786Lzf0x15rmdVf8sTBYXZNrnHgUZaL_mXOw=&emci=d82e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=ea2e26d8-6fb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Before it’s too late
body:
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | |

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f78af1c430154b5c955aa8a1df90cf38&_e=6uPAixAYdqn3hVlHOXp_VdM03t4-0BS8o7BlnLbTm6xECsphu5tb9k7NdTbdlwR_QoPoxeUxuSpm5r9IXouRFdt3FiaYgCRPfn_BvOLZmB9Upd6rQxFIgm46KnSGLfuR3qhi62zp02Yr6T5NC8GHvSaAe38rm899oOmxHynvkBNcEmG4H9BSEKbk5ly-ufmbo18-5iwlV-RhiAJMahPoFsSYzcEV7vJCWgbaXOLpSw3joU_6okyh1PdsQs67s3bb6oAjmwI32xGKtMiFUxMexMI9tRwE-w_jW8qX3cM-wWrWL4_Ddl-llxisnIRAYJlQkKDq7k_dM9WTISGHEg1FzvT15Pd2MiNv2wiufZdUyYt6YEGzsz6q3uQNAJWGtdSrHFp83jkPGrxrJSJ-UD9V7g%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f78af1c430154b5c955aa8a1df90cf38&_e=6uPAixAYdqn3hVlHOXp_VdM03t4-0BS8o7BlnLbTm6xECsphu5tb9k7NdTbdlwR_QoPoxeUxuSpm5r9IXouRFdt3FiaYgCRPfn_BvOLZmB9Upd6rQxFIgm46KnSGLfuR3qhi62zp02Yr6T5NC8GHvSaAe38rm899oOmxHynvkBNcEmG4H9BSEKbk5ly-ufmbo18-5iwlV-RhiAJMahPoFsSYzcEV7vJCWgbaXOLpSw3joU_6okyh1PdsQs67s3bbL50k8XO1zny29CAHkJAZDXkGeuZQdUkQeiKWJcges8Chn5blkYWWbH2FTLL6fyW_88Qow84BqCWC7yJgzw8LoWDj6Of9cADfaqunTBnmpdGZWCHDUM1lG3ECPdQrQDmO5peS9tGnSdgRpvWR1w--JQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f78af1c430154b5c955aa8a1df90cf38&_e=6uPAixAYdqn3hVlHOXp_VdM03t4-0BS8o7BlnLbTm6xECsphu5tb9k7NdTbdlwR_QoPoxeUxuSpm5r9IXouRFdt3FiaYgCRPfn_BvOLZmB9Upd6rQxFIgm46KnSGLfuR3qhi62zp02Yr6T5NC8GHvSaAe38rm899oOmxHynvkBNcEmG4H9BSEKbk5ly-ufmbo18-5iwlV-RhiAJMahPoFsSYzcEV7vJCWgbaXOLpSw3joU_6okyh1PdsQs67s3bbViSZCsAitl9OulVYiAQyYkSv7vUKCVP3vyaH7Af7rTjNMkbp4EpHrfUTZFtaToGZSGwEQx83s5pmSoHDWzVlP9kULAFq6nZgzfcaj-AAwZ_m8TerWJnT8rU0GN66L8-YZ4y7L-yn3eJ9yuCHNT4nbQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f78af1c430154b5c955aa8a1df90cf38&_e=6uPAixAYdqn3hVlHOXp_VdM03t4-0BS8o7BlnLbTm6xECsphu5tb9k7NdTbdlwR_QoPoxeUxuSpm5r9IXouRFdt3FiaYgCRPfn_BvOLZmB9Upd6rQxFIgm46KnSGLfuR3qhi62zp02Yr6T5NC8GHvSaAe38rm899oOmxHynvkBNcEmG4H9BSEKbk5ly-ufmbo18-5iwlV-RhiAJMahPoFsSYzcEV7vJCWgbaXOLpSw3joU_6okyh1PdsQs67s3bb5zTX_1gbaSdF1CiDMM3VVNaWwA2uDiLdmjaXTMv0HMi2V-XL-8TzyK5lRasAAbf7X4THPte0kgudgEowS69ve4EinAG__vrobBJblmi3j5Ci3BPhMpPgEoLtH9zqmuyCOjB9R3NH2G3kuks2yjknLA%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f78af1c430154b5c955aa8a1df90cf38&_e=6uPAixAYdqn3hVlHOXp_VdM03t4-0BS8o7BlnLbTm6xECsphu5tb9k7NdTbdlwR_QoPoxeUxuSpm5r9IXouRFdt3FiaYgCRPfn_BvOLZmB9Upd6rQxFIgm46KnSGLfuR3qhi62zp02Yr6T5NC8GHvSaAe38rm899oOmxHynvkBNcEmG4H9BSEKbk5ly-ufmbo18-5iwlV-RhiAJMahPoFsSYzcEV7vJCWgbaXOLpSw3joU_6okyh1PdsQs67s3bb7GqckZW6eKLQ1O-K7zAvVDcN607MqD8vCrNHIcBbXaM0Za8CvaA9xKswcOHJdDsUU2CBPKN4j4vGSrL0zwjBtHZu0XAcbcIebJ0BB-Wm2oJGV0DOfutSgZGyAtvIEDc9yYR6FPsz9CM_AxseT9HU5g%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f78af1c430154b5c955aa8a1df90cf38&_e=6uPAixAYdqn3hVlHOXp_VdM03t4-0BS8o7BlnLbTm6xECsphu5tb9k7NdTbdlwR_QoPoxeUxuSpm5r9IXouRFdt3FiaYgCRPfn_BvOLZmB9Upd6rQxFIgm46KnSGLfuR3qhi62zp02Yr6T5NC8GHvSaAe38rm899oOmxHynvkBNcEmG4H9BSEKbk5ly-ufmbo18-5iwlV-RhiAJMahPoFsSYzcEV7vJCWgbaXOLpSw3joU_6okyh1PdsQs67s3bbmSBCJWVN8dirtGWB42lGtaZv5D1KW4B5T0rRL-FhCyiQeT0ttK-qW7wD5cHu4o6P8VjN-AjQMWobPd45kBsQpZqOjZesX55h6qCZ4GuYQ2QSx_5wJ942tkzIYe362VQY40hVAkU3oTkFTQ18Qa1JDw%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!

Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f78af1c430154b5c955aa8a1df90cf38&_e=6uPAixAYdqn3hVlHOXp_VdM03t4-0BS8o7BlnLbTm6xECsphu5tb9k7NdTbdlwR_QoPoxeUxuSpm5r9IXouRFdt3FiaYgCRPfn_BvOLZmB9Upd6rQxFIgm46KnSGLfuR3qhi62zp02Yr6T5NC8GHvSaAe38rm899oOmxHynvkBNcEmG4H9BSEKbk5ly-ufmbo18-5iwlV-RhiAJMahPoFsSYzcEV7vJCWgbaXOLpSw3joU_6okyh1PdsQs67s3bb4VaHYmohOSMl7nHmLT6AcBuZIOY_VonKGGa3emwnL7p6d6hRricowRtK_2EnGHzBitOe5SY_If4nODLj_kOuntYznFkGRKsW1kxSsGFVlijsm-inXP6zVWX5TCfl6cfrIzkdC2sP5E94C17Z4PEBLA%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f78af1c430154b5c955aa8a1df90cf38&_e=6uPAixAYdqn3hVlHOXp_VdM03t4-0BS8o7BlnLbTm6xECsphu5tb9k7NdTbdlwR_QoPoxeUxuSpm5r9IXouRFdt3FiaYgCRPfn_BvOLZmB9Upd6rQxFIgm46KnSGLfuR3qhi62zp02Yr6T5NC8GHvSaAe38rm899oOmxHynvkBNcEmG4H9BSEKbk5ly-ufmbo18-5iwlV-RhiAJMahPoFsSYzcEV7vJCWgbaXOLpSw3joU_6okyh1PdsQs67s3bbiEuRWmfR6RKmNV_9_Bro3CLhlUF2iLyscUp-qrHh-k3xptM5ly8WJ0w0MnccuyEUj0JvLUbhY0FfvK2-JuDY9VhTist9jmlFxJbc-r0gzip_4SwoftysraiAIFJDHZV3FPrg73QSAYK4XWv27VS-CA%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

**It's now or never, team. Special elections could be coming up in Ohio and Florida -- but if Democrats don't come together right now to prepare, we could _lose our chance_ to win these states and flip the Senate!**

MAGA Republicans want to replace JD Vance and Marco Rubio with more Trump loyalists -- so it's up to us to take these seats back and put a check on Trump's power. We need EVERY Democrat in this fight. **We're still behind on our must-hit $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal to get to work, so we have to ask:**

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Join our Monthly call Monday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It's a great time to tune in

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=1)
---
Friday, December 13, 2024 |
### December Statewide Call
Join us Monday December 16th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We will**too!** [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgERVNyuzV5ZB37lp0k_9LCD4c4dp9LvodX0R2gcnEudc7A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=2) This month, we're organizing. You can make a difference in your local area and we want to help. Connecting with your neighbors with calls and in person events builds a network. It's these networks across the state and country that are going to support candidates that run outside the traditional political system. That's what's going to get us out of the political rut we're in. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgERVNyuzV5ZB37lp0k_9LCD4c4dp9LvodX0R2gcnEudc7A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=3 "PA December call link") [PA December call link](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgERVNyuzV5ZB37lp0k_9LCD4c4dp9LvodX0R2gcnEudc7A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=3)
---
If your interests are more focused on the state party, we have plenty of needs. You can make us all stronger by getting involved in one of the following ways.
* Communication
* Candidate Research
* Candidate Support
* Fundraising
* Website management
* Convention planning
* Merch development
* and more

Or maybe you have ideas we haven't thought of yet, please let us know.
* * *
### Forward Party Year-end Call
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=4)
2024 was a banner year for the Forward Party. We grew more than ever and ran more than 125 candidates across the country. With hundreds of volunteers and thousands of hours of hard work, we helped propel a host of new forward-thinking officials into office, and we're ready to celebrate them and look to the year ahead.
Wed 12/18 at 7:15pm
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=5 "National Year-end call link") [National Year-end call link](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=5)
---
* * *
### Support our 2025 Efforts
Let's talk about money for a moment. Campaigns cost money, lawyers and advisors cost money, printed materials, and events cost money. Even the network systems we use to host our website, organize volunteers and send this email cost money. It's not the same sums that get spent on National political campaigns, we're not talking millions, but the PA Forward Party does spend thousands to do what we do, and we'd like to be able to do more.
Right now, we have a small number of people that are donating monthly or covering individual expenses we incur as a party, but we need to expand that base of financial support. The more recurring donations we can count on, the more we can plan to support our candidates in November. We can plan bigger and better events without the people planning them taking on personal financial risk. Any amount that you can contribute us is a huge help and we thank you for joining us to fund something new in PA.
**With PA Forward Party, every donor is a Mega-donor!**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=6 "Become a Mega-donor")[Become a Mega-donor](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=6)
---
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=10) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=11) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
ForwardParty.com
[Unsubscribe](https://home.forwardparty.com/unsubscribe?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_december_call_invite&n=12)

## How to get tickets to the Inauguration of President Trump...
I have been getting lots of questions about tickets to the events surrounding the Inauguration. There are two ways. Your members of Congress has a limited number that you can request. Additionally, the Inaugural Committee sells packages. Download the packet here for information on each package and the checkout link is below.
| File 66866.31MB ∙ PDF file
---|---
| [Download](https://substack.com/redirect/58268394-b23a-4628-ad30-42fb4f35b46f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Giffords.org
subject: Friend, is there anything we can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Is there _anything_ we can say to convince you to [**contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241213-1-b&t=1&akid=9617%2E3935704%2Ee3kYQp)
What if we told you that GIFFORDS has helped pass **_over 700 gun laws_** in states nationwide, plus the most significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly three decades?
What if we told you that with Donald Trump taking office and a new Congress about to be sworn-in next month, **_we’re going to have to work harder than ever before_** to defend our hard-earned progress?
And what if we told you that in just two days we’re facing our **_December mid-month fundraising deadline_** —our last fundraising benchmark before our end of year FEC deadline?
[**If you’re ready to fuel our work to end gun violence, please use this link or select an amount below to make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241213-1-b&t=2&akid=9617%2E3935704%2Ee3kYQp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: together, we can safeguard reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Team,

When I first ran for Congress, I ran against an anti-choice extremist with a promise to always defend reproductive freedom. While in Congress, I’ve introduced legislation like the Protecting Personal, Private Medical Decisions Act to condemn restrictions on reproductive healthcare.

Reproductive freedom is an issue we cannot compromise on. As Governor, I will work every day to ensure that every individual can make their own decisions about their health.

clean_body: | | Team, When I first ran for Congress, I ran against an anti-choice extremist with a promise to always defend reproductive freedom. While in Congress, I’ve introduced legislation like the Protecting Personal, Private Medical Decisions Act to condemn restrictions on reproductive healthcare. Reproductive freedom is an issue we cannot compromise on. As Governor, I will work every day to ensure that every individual can make their own decisions about their health. | | | | | | | I will always fight to make healthcare more affordable and protect women’s reproductive freedom. Thank you for fighting with me. Yours, Josh | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. | Limited Tickets for Presidential Inauguration
---
---
| Massachusetts Republicans,
Thanks to the efforts of National Committeewoman Janet Fogarty, National Committeeman Brad Wyatt, Party Chair Amy Carnevale and Trump Campaign Chairman Tom Hodgson, the RNC will allocate a limited number of tickets for the Presidential Inauguration to supporters in Massachusetts. In preparation for the distribution of these tickets, the RNC has requested a list of Massachusetts Republicans interested in attending.
Please note that the number of tickets is LIMITED, the MassGOP is not responsible for distribution, and we do not yet know how many will be available. Completing the sign-up form does not guarantee a ticket.
The deadline to submit our list to the RNC is the end of the day on Monday. If you are interested, please complete the form as soon as possible.
The sign-up form is available below: [https://forms.gle/7xJxL9DqYQBR296v5](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r9bAzx7Vthgu9NxPRw7nVJ3AuKKsT83CeK1x5FUpcZPnwpscxn1IynEEtFHOuc3W1iSNTvuhsO0irRVWcXaWOJGyBZ3XwN8R9w6-OxO2DIIFMkd-vKmkJhZboaOMyTwzCCMnzACqvu3Yh7NTjgG6e45Ah4aXg2RNrPVlHUOHb6c=&c=i0JxfQgJJCgnWulKHijcSZk_uAYpFWy5WTg3eGVQn5Co1M-V63gzAg==&ch=CaeUjX3yf9QEle2ZDzP9t1YFr56GjgZ4Hto_J0VNDJZ--_fLkVz1iQ==)

name: Andy Kim
subject: Tolerance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98646339/517347416/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTQyMTA5Yy03M2I5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybVn8ONYAeTScG67n9aFWe82IRU4TqulCDAw1xtn9bI=&emci=ed623e9b-6ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9942109c-73b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=26261389)
---

| | As I finished up my time in the House and moved to the other side of the Capitol, I wanted to share something almost no one notices that's written in the House. **The center aisle, the one the President walks down for the State of the Union, the aisle that divides the R and D sides, ends at an inscription of "Tolerance."** It caught my eye the very first time I stepped into the House chamber when I was first elected. There is a desk in front of it so you can't see it on TV. I thought it was a curious choice for such a central location. I've thought about it for a long time. Why "tolerance?" Tolerance isn't a particularly inspiring word. In fact, it can sound a bit negative. Tolerating noise or bad behavior. That's why political leaders often use "unity." Why isn't the word "unity" inscribed in this central location? Our most famous motto is E Pluribus Unum. It's scribed on the ceiling of the capitol dome. **I've come to believe tolerance is a critical part of how the "many" become "one."** Tolerance shows a path towards togetherness while still recognizing the challenges of differences. It is not that we perfectly blend in a melting pot or assimilate into some singular sense of being American. Tolerance inherently recognizes that differences exist – unity does not. Sometimes the word unity gives the impression of like-mindedness, agreement, and complete harmony. I've come to like that there's a grittiness to tolerance. It sets expectations grounded in the reality of plurality. It accepts as a fundamental fact that not everything can be fully agreed upon. That persuasion alone won't solve our problems. Tolerance exists in the space between unity and disunity. It embraces the idea that our belief in freedom is more important than our disagreement or discomfort with how someone else lives their life. **Tolerance rejects the notion that we are enemies. It means respect for one another despite differences. It rejects separation and segregation and instead embraces co-existence.** **Tolerance is not a weakness.** It does not mean compromising one's values or turning a blind eye to hate. JFK said, "Tolerance implies no lack of commitment to one's own beliefs. Rather, it condemns the oppression or persecution of others." Now, societal implementation of tolerance isn't easy. How do we forge a tolerance that flows in all directions? I don't claim to have all the answers. But I do think there's value in the concept and that it should be thought of with similar rigor as we do towards unity. Now that I'm in the Senate, I look forward to exploring symbols there. I take note that the Senate center doors that I enter draw a perfectly straight line across the Capitol to the center aisle of the House and this inscription of tolerance. More soon, _Andy_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98646340/517347417/-1197072038?refcode=2024-12-13-tolerance&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9942109c-73b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTQyMTA5Yy03M2I5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybVn8ONYAeTScG67n9aFWe82IRU4TqulCDAw1xtn9bI=) |

clean_body: | | | | As I finished up my time in the House and moved to the other side of the Capitol, I wanted to share something almost no one notices that's written in the House. The center aisle, the one the President walks down for the State of the Union, the aisle that divides the R and D sides, ends at an inscription of "Tolerance." It caught my eye the very first time I stepped into the House chamber when I was first elected. There is a desk in front of it so you can't see it on TV. I thought it was a curious choice for such a central location. I've thought about it for a long time. Why "tolerance?" Tolerance isn't a particularly inspiring word. In fact, it can sound a bit negative. Tolerating noise or bad behavior. That's why political leaders often use "unity." Why isn't the word "unity" inscribed in this central location? Our most famous motto is E Pluribus Unum. It's scribed on the ceiling of the capitol dome. I've come to believe tolerance is a critical part of how the "many" become "one." Tolerance shows a path towards togetherness while still recognizing the challenges of differences. It is not that we perfectly blend in a melting pot or assimilate into some singular sense of being American. Tolerance inherently recognizes that differences exist – unity does not. Sometimes the word unity gives the impression of like-mindedness, agreement, and complete harmony. I've come to like that there's a grittiness to tolerance. It sets expectations grounded in the reality of plurality. It accepts as a fundamental fact that not everything can be fully agreed upon. That persuasion alone won't solve our problems. Tolerance exists in the space between unity and disunity. It embraces the idea that our belief in freedom is more important than our disagreement or discomfort with how someone else lives their life. Tolerance rejects the notion that we are enemies. It means respect for one another despite differences. It rejects separation and segregation and instead embraces co-existence. Tolerance is not a weakness. It does not mean compromising one's values or turning a blind eye to hate. JFK said, "Tolerance implies no lack of commitment to one's own beliefs. Rather, it condemns the oppression or persecution of others." Now, societal implementation of tolerance isn't easy. How do we forge a tolerance that flows in all directions? I don't claim to have all the answers. But I do think there's value in the concept and that it should be thought of with similar rigor as we do towards unity. Now that I'm in the Senate, I look forward to exploring symbols there. I take note that the Senate center doors that I enter draw a perfectly straight line across the Capitol to the center aisle of the House and this inscription of tolerance. More soon, Andy = | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

| | Dear Peter, You’re receiving this email today because you’re a part of Oregon League of Conservation Voters’ dedicated and passionate member base. You believe in OLCV’s work, their ability to deliver results, and most importantly, you believe in fighting to protect Oregon’s climate and environment. I’m OLCV’s Board Chair for the same reasons. I know how vital and lifesaving OLCV’s work is. There’s no denying the state of our climate, and now that we’re on the verge of yet another Trump presidency, I cannot express how critical standing up for our climate is. [**We’ve got a lot of work to do in 2025 and I want to make sure that we’ve got the resources we need to fight everyday to protect Oregon’s clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98646645/517348870/118968535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZGQzZWMwLTczYjktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9Dq7-6eVpZp5RVWTd9jfqtRE0-Q7yqX5n-iP4sQ9Pfw=&emci=097975d6-04b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=14dd3ec0-73b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) That’s why just for today I am **personally matching gifts to OLCV up to $1500.** What can $1500 do?
* Sponsor an OLCV campaign fellow and help train the next generation of climate leaders
* Recruit 30 new volunteers
* Help us put on our annual Volunteer Leadership Retreat to equip our volunteer leaders with the tools they need to be effective advocates for Oregon’s environment

Thank you for considering donating to OLCV, your gift - _of any amount_ \- funds the fight to protect our environment for our friends, family, and future generations, one that we’ve all joined hands in. Together in this fight,Paige SpenceOLCV Board Chair

clean_body: = The election may be over, but our work is just beginning. Our win last month proved the power of this coalition. Together, we knocked on over 260,000 doors, made over 500,000 phone calls, and connected with voters all over mid-Michigan. Now, it’s time to channel this energy into passing meaningful policies that support everyday families. Throughout my career — from leading Michigan Head Start to my work in the state Senate — my focus has been clear: making life easier for working families. And, in Congress, I’ll have the opportunity to secure real results on the federal level. I promise to stay focused on our community and listen to your concerns, because you are my priority. I’m determined to lower costs however I can, including working across the aisle, because the needs of our mid-Michgan families are more important than party lines. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Kristen | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Slotkin
subject: Fundraising in a 6-year term
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2215%2E135344%2ERQ0BNv)

Friend,
Our team is getting used to a whole lot of changes as Elissa goes from being a Member of Congress to a Senator for the state of Michigan.
One of the biggest changes? Instead of constantly running for reelection every 2 years, Elissa has a 6-year term to serve before she has to run again. (She is THRILLED!)
Our team is hard at work devising our political plans for the coming years, since she won’t be up for re-election until 2030. But Michigan will stay at the center of the political universe in the next election cycle -- we’ve got a Senate race AND a Governor’s race on the ballot, and lots of good candidates coming up that Team Slotkin will be supporting when and where we can.
We’ll also be using this email list to provide you with opportunities to support deserving candidates and causes in Michigan and all over the country as we get closer to the 2026 midterms. Elissa believes strongly that we need to have an effective response to the Trump administration, so a strong political plan is vital.
Thanks in advance for sticking along for the ride – and for helping us deliver results and sustain strong, principled leadership for Michigan.
Team Slotkin
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-dec24.5LCKzI&refcode=em241213&t=2&akid=2215%2E135344%2ERQ0BNv)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-dec24.5LCKzI&amount=5&refcode=em241213&t=3&akid=2215%2E135344%2ERQ0BNv)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-dec24.5LCKzI&refcode=em241213&t=4&akid=2215%2E135344%2ERQ0BNv)**
---
****

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

name: COURIER
subject: It's urgent, Peter
body:
We need a progressive alternative to the right-wing media now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650384/517359045/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgwMGQ5YTctNzdiOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O61WlcI0ZrLGCHHrp0ImLgvl7lptlEowzX5TgXvEQnU=&emci=9b00d9a7-77b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a800d9a7-77b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14016711)

**We’re building a progressive media alternative to stand up to Donald Trump and counter the right-wing media’s lies. Help us reach our $50,000 goal before the end of December so we can hit the ground running in the new year. ** **[Donate Now ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650385/517359046/-593472309?refcode=20241213-EM-MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgwMGQ5YTctNzdiOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O61WlcI0ZrLGCHHrp0ImLgvl7lptlEowzX5TgXvEQnU=)**
---
The 2024 election proved one thing:
**The right-wing media machine is more powerful than ever—and building a progressive alternative has never been more urgent.**
Donald Trump didn’t win on policy. He won because Fox News, Joe Rogan, and Elon Musk’s X amplified his lies and threats, helping him win disengaged voters by 14%.
Meanwhile, legacy media like _The New York Times_ and CNN continued to lose trust and influence. And now, with Trump poised to take office, there are troubling signs that the media will continue to falter.
For years, Trump has attacked journalists and threatened press freedom. His intimidation is already having a chilling effect—Jeff Bezos pulled _The Washington Post_ ’s endorsement of Kamala Harris, and _Morning Joe_ recently made a pilgrimage to Mar-a-Lago to kiss the ring.
**This is why COURIER exists: to build a powerful, progressive alternative to the right-wing media machine. We’re not just countering their propaganda—we’re delivering factual, values-driven journalism directly to voters where they’re most vulnerable to disinformation.**
But we can’t do it without you.
[**We’ve set an urgent goal to raise $50,000 by the end of the month to expand our reach and counter the right’s influence. We’re just 25% there. To stay on track, we need to raise $5,000 by Sunday at midnight. Can you chip in $25 today to help us hit this goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650386/517359047/-593472309?refcode=20241213-EM-MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgwMGQ5YTctNzdiOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O61WlcI0ZrLGCHHrp0ImLgvl7lptlEowzX5TgXvEQnU=)
**[Donate Now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650387/517359048/-593472309?refcode=20241213-EM-MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgwMGQ5YTctNzdiOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O61WlcI0ZrLGCHHrp0ImLgvl7lptlEowzX5TgXvEQnU=)**
Here’s how COURIER will fight back during the Trump presidency and beyond:
* **Reaching disengaged voters in critical swing states:** Our 11 state-based newsrooms in Pennsylvania, Arizona, Michigan, and more bring local, values-driven reporting to communities most at risk of right-wing propaganda.
* **Meeting voters where they are:** With over 4.5 million followers and 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days before Election Day, we’re delivering critical reporting on platforms like TikTok, X, and Instagram.
* **Redefining progressive media:** Our journalists and creators provide factual, community-centered news that challenges misinformation and focuses on the issues that matter most to our movement and our country.

With Trump’s allies in the media working to normalize his fascism, COURIER’s mission has never been more critical. Together, we can counter their lies and deliver the truth where it matters most.
**Will you help us raise $5,000 by Sunday? Every dollar makes a difference.**
**[Chip in $25 now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650390/517359049/-593472309?refcode=20241213-EM-MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgwMGQ5YTctNzdiOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O61WlcI0ZrLGCHHrp0ImLgvl7lptlEowzX5TgXvEQnU=)**
Thank you for standing with us in the fight for truth.
In solidarity,
COURIER
* * *
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
[**Become a member! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650392/517359050/1028889122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgwMGQ5YTctNzdiOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O61WlcI0ZrLGCHHrp0ImLgvl7lptlEowzX5TgXvEQnU=&emci=9b00d9a7-77b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a800d9a7-77b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14016711)

**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=mAp9ToHBXsXlatMD9sFVLi0iScSoGrnH6iQbpyZpUBfuZn0CHxpY8b3GyTlIpzyjVhdel2M33dRAdKC3%2BDoDKrvGyKOo2SFGM39ECHXpT%2Fa8JR3tn3ljEflyRWd7eaw9q63nUo27kvSrsLJZ5O%2Fz7RlDkRu2EzjQ%2B6kNnCFqmd0eH%2F2%2FL4UnbH5MPzK9A%2F3qXvoegIb9zC6BsXP5HKWnpmi7XCQeqBoza1v31ObPY5c8o0JUtMXKJlytLWLGpningdjFXtICfLbkt198krQEAMJps0CxplFGz8xmTlyyA6N02LQMxAI1U5y3miwFIiymYk0dwOZxhRJRCar93oZUnOYtkRti0xLSz4J%2FT8Jl4cDghitUY72khop8kRf5WVHkVXqOjMNrx2tYsZkSxLMi8bRF9yvHkfyHFKfU6tYOFSm6KCXb7Qez6O%2Fiys2xWYKo)**

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ It’s the most wonderful time of the year! Peter, there is so much we have to celebrate and be thankful for this Christmas – including Donald Trump’s imminent return to the White House! To celebrate his big victory we want to surprise him with more names than EVER BEFORE on this year’s Christmas Card! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=b42605f9f449769586ea3ec7ab52d38b48b9e0e6e9d36b1926a4e861e833c8da1c491767539f1a70569a5ba8a2a05db8cf3398ec95efe8cd4d078b3a7db6a13a If we can gather signatures from 1,000,000 patriots it’ll surely be a Christmas to remember and we’ll break our record from last year. name: MW
subject: I’ll be honest, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I hate to ask

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650698/517359797/-401668678?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_241213_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWE3OGZmNC03N2I5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CGewvD_8uSgvVCRfhZr7NKKy8VvXfaPADJSNaTc0wKU=) Derek,

This month, Senate Democrats approved our leadership team for the next Congress, and I’m honored to share that I’ll be serving as Vice Chair of the conference.

I’ll be honest, Derek, the next four years won’t be easy. Despite losing our Senate majority, I will use my power in Washington to push for progress. I will work with anyone to get things done for Virginians and make sure Americans can be safe, healthy, and free.

And for those of you who might still be discouraged by the election’s outcome: I urge you to spend the next four years organizing, building consensus, and fighting for a brighter future. We have to be united in the days to come and do what we can, where we can, to make a difference.

Just remember: I’ll always have your back in the Senate.

Thank you,

Mark

[_**P.S. I hate to ask, but part of what allows me to stay focused on my work in the Senate is making sure we hit our monthly fundraising goals. They're a small but important part of making sure we have the resources for my re-election in 2026. Can you pitch in $5 now to help hit December’s? I really appreciate it.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650700/517359798/-401668678?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_241213_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWE3OGZmNC03N2I5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CGewvD_8uSgvVCRfhZr7NKKy8VvXfaPADJSNaTc0wKU=) ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98650702/517359799/-401668678?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_241213_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWE3OGZmNC03N2I5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CGewvD_8uSgvVCRfhZr7NKKy8VvXfaPADJSNaTc0wKU=)****

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/florida-woman-charged-with-terrorism?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In an arguably unprecedented case on the meaning of free speech, a 42-year-old Florida woman named Briana Boston has been arrested and charged on terrorism charges against Blue Cross and Blue Shield health insurance corporation. According to the arrest affidavit, after BCBS denied her health insurance claim, Boston responded, "Delay, deny, depose. You people are next." Apparently, though Boston does not own a firearm, has no violent criminal history, and indicated no acts of violence whatsoever--this statement amounts to a threat of terrorism and mass shooting. **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TUgSWz7VPDuXrFaJyIZBLgOVDApCG-UVZeSJtzNe7lI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153068282)
Briana Boston has little engagement in political activism, with a single $1 donation made to a New York political race years ago. But like millions of Americans, she received the hurtful news that her health insurance claim had been denied.
When Lakeland Police contacted Boston at her home, she admitted to using the "Delay, Deny, Depose" phrase and added, "_healthcare companies played games and deserved karma from the world because they are evil._ " She went on to say that she used the phrase, "_because it 's what is in the news right now_." Lakeland Police Chief Sam Taylor responded that, "_[Boston has] been in this world long enough that she certainly should know better that you can 't make threats like that in the current environment that we live in and think that we're not going to follow up and put you in jail_."
But what actual threat did Boston make, especially when compared to the violence corporations actually and knowingly impose upon the American people? As an attorney who represents women who are survivors of domestic violence, I cannot count how many times a survivor sought a restraining order against an abusive partner, and could not attain it because despite past abuse, and despite the new threat to "bash your face in" was too vague and unclear. What makes Blue Cross and Blue Shield so special that they deny a woman's healthcare claim and then get her arrested for terrorism because she peacefully and verbally expressed frustration?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7ab9a4b0-82eb-4cda-a0c1-416c57d35a01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Booking photo of Briana Boston released by the Lakeland Police Department
Likewise, as a human rights lawyer who has also literally survived violent death threats made against me and even testified in federal court against the man who threatened to kill me, I have to ask--what about her statement is a threat? The phrase "Delay, Deny, Depose" is a common insurance statement, used for decades as official policy to actively prevent having to make payouts. And the results of this policy are not hypothetical, they have been punitive, deadly, and are ongoing.
For example, in addition to suffering claim denial after claim denial, Americans are $220 billion in medical debt, 68,000 die annually due to lack of healthcare, and 500,000 file for medical bankruptcy, annually. None of these documented deaths or cruel policies are considered terrorism or violence--yet a woman repeating that policy statement back to insurance corporations is suddenly terrorism? Meanwhile, since the ACA passed, the health insurance industry has enacted the "Delay, Deny, Depose" policy to make a whopping $371 billion in profits. Corporations like UnitedHealth have led the way at raking in more than 40% of those profits, while simultaneously leading the way in denying 32% of all insurance claims.The hypocrisy is beyond glaring.
And the corporate coordination is obvious.
A GoFundMe to establish a legal defense fund for Briana Boston was quickly shut down. This is especially shocking because a GoFundMe for Daniel Penny, the former Marine acquitted of manslaughter charges for killing Jordan Neely, thrived with more than $3.5 million in contributions. Why is a defense fund for a man accused of manslaughter after actually killing someone allowed to remain, but a defense fund for a woman who merely stated an insurance company's policy shut down?
The answer is, this is what class warfare looks like.
Class warfare against working people is when billion dollar insurance corporations can live by "Delay, Deny, Depose" for decades--even as their policies actually and knowingly enable tens of thousands of annual deaths--but when a working person denied healthcare merely says that exact phrase--it's terrorism. The logical conclusion then, if we are to understand this, is that corporations ARE people when enacting policies that kill people, but NOT people when we demand arrest of the corporate executives who enact the policies that kill people, but ARE people again when a person repeats back to them the exact policies they use to kill people. Again, the hypocrisy is beyond glaring.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TUgSWz7VPDuXrFaJyIZBLgOVDApCG-UVZeSJtzNe7lI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153068282)
Last week I wrote about America's Violent Health System, in part [stating](https://substack.com/redirect/e9774c5a-e13c-4147-9022-ac8b06e376fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),
> This same day the assailant killed the UnitedHealth CEO, Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield announced that patients will have to pay out of pocket for anesthesia if their surgical procedure goes longer than expected. To call this dystopian is an understatement. And in case you were wondering, anesthesia typically costs $400 for the first 30 minutes and then $600 an hour after that. Change will not come until we recognize that each of the nearly 70,000 lives annually lost due to denied healthcare, is as preventable and as cruel as the UnitedHealth CEO's targeted death. Because whether you are pulling a trigger in broad daylight, or denying life saving medication to an innocent 4-year-old child, the end result is the same preventable death.
And just a few days ago I asked Where is Our Corporate Reckoning? [adding](https://substack.com/redirect/1d4b8601-f370-4ac0-a4dd-e1221eff5443?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> If we agree that murder is wrong, then we must also agree that corporate policies knowingly designed to prioritize profits over human lives are equally immoral. If denying care that leads to death isn't murder, then what is it? Our system allows the rich to kill the poor through bureaucracy, all while masking it as business as usual.
I then provided numerous examples of corporations enacting policies they knew would kill people, yet never once facing consequences or prison time for their deadly policies. That reckoning awaits, because this model is unsustainable. And the arrest and charge of Briana Boston is yet another example of how our class warfare system will always protect billion dollar corporations, but will punitively punish anyone who dares step out of line. I'm reminded of the speech the villain named "Hopper" gave to his fellow grasshoppers in the 1998 film, "A Bug's Life."
> You let one ant stand up to us and they all might stand up. Those puny little ants outnumber us a hundred to one, and if they ever figure that out there goes our way of life!! It's not about food! It's about keeping those ants in line.
Understand that the point of arresting Briana Boston goes well beyond her. The BCBS CEO knows full well she alone is incapable of causing any violence or harm to their corporation. The decision to charge and arrest her with terrorism for an innocuous statement of frustration is an intimidation tactic meant to suppress dissent and force compliance. I do not advocate for violence, but I do study history. And the history of every violent economic revolution is such that when the billionaire or elite class pushed working people to the brink of human desecration and berated them until they had nothing left to lose, the only people that actually lost everything, were the elites.
The fear we're seeing from corporations like UnitedHealth, BCBS, and other exploitative billion dollar corporations is because they know this history, but their greed is too strong a force to get them to stop exploiting us. But we cannot relent or slow down in our demands for justice and human dignity. As I've written before, this is a fight for human rights that we must win. It is a fight for our children, for the 70,000 Americans who die needlessly every year, for the 500,000 Americans who file medical bankruptcy annually, and for the tens of millions of families trapped in the cruel cycle of profit-driven exploitation. Let us demand better. Let us demand guaranteed universal healthcare--because our lives literally depend on it.

name: Kelsey Carolan
subject: A quick note before the holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
| Hey team, It’s Kelsey. I’m running around trying to wrap things up before the holidays – finalizing end-of-year plans, squeezing in errands, and shopping for a gift or two! But I wanted to reach out with a quick note before I get completely swept up. 2025 might feel like a ways off, but the work to protect all of the progress we’ve made starts right now. You’ve seen what Youngkin has done already: chipping away at voting rights, vetoing bills to protect abortion and raise the minimum wage, and so much more. **That’s why I’m asking you to step up today and join me as a recurring donor to support our work to win three critical elections at the beginning of the year AND win across the Commonwealth later this year.** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DPVA-ALL-Email-Dec2024-FR-December](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98652157/517364394/-807643367?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11733-20241211-QuickNote-SL-Other&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2QwYjU2Zi03YmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mx6HxXUt6qB9KFvTGkwCw64vUyTgFgv4i_XAzHGe_dU=) If you can commit to even $5 or $10 a month, you’ll help us lay the foundation for the big year ahead. These small, reliable contributions allow us to stay focused on the work and not scramble to hit our fundraising goals every month. I know it’s a busy time, and I hate to bug you while you’re probably running around too. But this is important, and I know you get it. Can I count on you to make a recurring gift today? Here’s a quick link to sign up: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DPVA-ALL-Email-Dec2024-FR-December](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98652158/517364395/-807643367?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11733-20241211-QuickNote-SL-Other&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2QwYjU2Zi03YmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mx6HxXUt6qB9KFvTGkwCw64vUyTgFgv4i_XAzHGe_dU=) Thanks for sticking with us. Around the country, schools are wrapping up for Christmas break, companies are closing their books for the year, and everyone is looking forward to 2025. Here in Washington, things are no different – but as we finish up for the year, I want to reflect on the monumental WINS we’ve had this year. So, I’m looking for you to grade Republican’s performance on this last cycle and share any feedback on what you’d like to see more of or less of in the coming year. |

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/13/2024
body:
Illegal immigrants straining education and healthcare, Common Sense report finds
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
It's been a busy week over here at Rocky Mountain Voice! I've also had the pleasure to co-host both the [Dan Caplis Show](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with Kristy Burton Brown (where we talked about what we'd do if we were Governor for the day) and [The Jeff and Bill Show](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with Jeff Hunt (where we talked all things RMV and interviewed several of our contributors)! Make sure you catch up on these conversations, you won't want to miss them.
Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** The Common Sense Institute’s report reveals the heavy strain illegal immigration places on Denver’s education and healthcare systems, [consuming millions in city resources](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, U.S. Rep. Jeff Hurd outlines his [legislative priorities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), focusing on border security, asylum reform, and H2A visa improvements to support agriculture in Colorado. House Republicans announced [committee assignments](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for the 75th General Assembly. On a different note, law enforcement in Western Colorado investigates the [mysterious disappearance of 200 head of cattle](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), pointing to potential modern-day cattle rustling.
**🗣️ RMV Original Commentaries...** Kelly Sloan reflects on the [fall of Assad’s regime in Syria](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), linking it to the long-term impacts of Obama-era foreign policy. Greg Walcher calls for cautious deliberation in [Colorado River negotiations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), rejecting rushed compromises on water management before a new administration takes office. ****
**More reading for you today...** Experts are calling for ["misdemeanor reform"](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to combat rising crime rates. [Governor Jared Polis faces backlash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for blaming ranchers for the soaring costs of the wolf reintroduction program, sparking rural unrest. Meanwhile, [Colorado's economic growth is slowing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with the state slipping in national rankings, raising concerns about long-term challenges and workforce imbalances.

This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, December 13, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Illegal immigrants straining education and healthcare, Common Sense report finds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Illegal immigrants have targeted Denver as a key destination since late 2022. The rate of new arrivals may have decreased in 2024, but the fiscal impact on the city’s finances, schools and healthcare systems has not.
A recent report by the Common Sense Institute (CSI) shows the fiscal burden on Denver. It found that, as of November 2024, $79 million was spent on services for illegal immigrants. This figure represents about 8% of the city’s 2025 budget. These funds were allocated to a variety of essential services, including:
➡️ Temporary shelter and housing assistance.
➡️ Transportation and food distribution.
➡️ Childcare and other support services.
City officials initially projected spending of $180 million through 2024. Actual costs came in below that estimate. However, the long-term costs of education and healthcare are straining Denver’s resources and planning.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[U.S. Rep. Jeff Hurd ready to get to work on border security, immigration in Congress](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* U.S. Rep. Jeff Hurd plans to collaborate with President Trump on closing the southern border, implementing legislative reforms to fix the asylum system, and expediting adjudication for asylum requests.
* Hurd advocates for merit-based immigration and the enhancement of H2A visa programs to address agricultural workforce needs, ensuring these programs benefit both employers and the economy.
* Hurd is prepared to address non-cooperation from sanctuary cities by exploring federal funding adjustments to encourage compliance with immigration enforcement laws.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[House Republicans announce committee assignments for 75th state legislative session](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado House Republicans unveiled their committee assignments for the 75th legislative session, highlighting a diverse group of legislators committed to addressing affordability, public safety, and taxpayer protections.
* Minority Leader Rose Pugliese emphasized the wealth of experience and dedication among committee members, reflecting the caucus's commitment to delivering thoughtful solutions for Colorado.
* Key committees such as Agriculture, Education, and Energy include conservative leaders aiming to promote responsible governance and address the issues most important to Coloradans.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Modern-day cattle rustlers? In Western Colorado, authorities want to know what happened to 200 head of cattle](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Authorities in Western Colorado are investigating the disappearance of 200 calves from federal grazing lands, suspected to be a case of large-scale cattle rustling.
* The missing livestock, mostly branded 6- to 9-month-old calves, represents a financial loss estimated in the hundreds of thousands of dollars for local ranchers.
* Law enforcement and brand inspectors are collaborating to trace the stolen cattle, urging ranchers to report suspicious activities and document details like license plates and vehicles to aid the investigation.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Sloan: Is the end of Assad the end of Obama foreign policy?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY KELLY SLOAN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Few tears, if any, will be shed for the demise of the Assad regime in Syria, save perhaps a few in Moscow and Tehran._
_The rapid success of the Syrian rebels last weekend took most everyone by surprise, not just the Biden administration to whom any world event not thoroughly discoursed upon The View or plastered on the front page of the New York Times apparently comes as a surprise._
_The fall of the Syrian regime is a strategic boon for the U.S.A., even though the U.S.A. had little, if anything, to do with bringing it about. The survival of the brutish, terror-sponsoring regime in Damascus was made possible only by the will and backing of Moscow and, later, Tehran._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Walcher: Time is on Colorado’s side – no need to rush](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY GREG WALCHER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_An early lesson I learned as a young staffer for the late Sen. Bill Armstrong was the importance of careful consideration. He disliked being rushed into hasty decisions and developed a standard response to any demand for immediate action._
_“If you need an answer right now,” he would say, “the answer is no.”_
_If there was time for more thought, homework, reading and studying all the implications, the answer could be different. He understood that rushed judgments are rarely good judgments._ ___Colorado River negotiators ought to keep that in mind as they are being prodded to make new interstate agreements that could supplant a century of western water law._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Devotional: We are all born to lead, with a servant mindset](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 13** _Through the years, I’ve attended countless leadership training sessions, courses and workshops. Most start with the same bold statement: “All leaders are born leaders!"_
__
**[State Rep. Brandi Bradley is fundraising, but this time to spread Christmas cheer](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | DECEMBER 12** _It’s a scene no parent wants to imagine: children sleeping on floors, wearing shoes three sizes too small or going without a warm coat during the winter.****Yet, for hundreds of children in Douglas County, this is a stark reality.****_
__
[**‘If you want the truth, seek the truth’: Mesa Co. Clerk Gross responds to article allegations**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY JEN SCHUMANN****| LOCAL |****DECEMBER 10** _Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk and a Gold Star mother with a clean prior record, has now served two months of a nine-year prison sentence. She was found guilty on seven charges related to the unlawful access she granted to the county’s election system._ __

The votes have been counted, and the races have been officially called. Thanks to the support from this grassroots team, both Democrats won, helping flip these two seats from red to blue! These two wins will mean more Democrats will be in Congress fighting like hell to protect our fundamental freedoms and support working families — and it gives the GOP one of the slimmest House majorities in history.
