Knowa understands something that many adults often forget: **_It's more important to protect the people affected by the policy than to gain more followers or appease the right._**

At Their Future PAC, we don’t back down from tough fights. We refuse to cave to the right. Instead, we work to elect Kids First Candidates who will fight for affordable healthcare, higher wages, safer schools, and opportunities for every child in America to thrive.

Our kids are watching, and they’re demanding change. They’re counting on us to deliver, **but we need your help to make that happen.**

name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Shelby County Republican Party News - December 2024
body:
Merry Christmas Everyone,

What an amazing election season we just navigated together! We have much to be thankful for!

Our local Republican Party team has been taking a much-needed break since the November meeting, and I wanted to let you know that our next meeting will be on Tuesday, January 21, 2025 at 6:00 PM at Calvary United Baptist Church, 9480 County Road 25A, Sidney. (No meeting in December)

The January meeting is a very special one. If you are concerned about the future of conservatism in our nation and the Republican Party, then this is a must-attend meeting for you. We all know that we must invest in preparing younger generations to fight to preserve the nation that our founding fathers gave us, and we have invited Adam Josefczyk, Co-Founder & President of the Forge Leadership Network, to come speak to us about the work they are doing on this front.

Please come, and please bring young folks who love their country and want to preserve it, whether they are interested in entering into politics or not. The Forge Leadership Network prepares future leaders to fight for conservatism in all walks of life, not just the political arena. Check them out at <https://forgeleadership.org>

Several people have been asking about our 200-Club invitations that traditionally come out in the Fall. With this having been a BIG Presidential Election year, followed quickly by the holiday season, we decided to wait until the new year to begin our annual 200-Club fundraising drive. Watch your mailbox after the holidays for information on our 200-Club!

In the meantime, have a Very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!!!

Cheers...Dan
Chairman, Shelby County Republican Party
(937) 206-2970
[cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)

name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: Donor Saves Babies, Finding a Pearl, and a Dick Van Dyke Dance
body:
Arthur Croft's blood donations [have saved the lives of thousands of women and children](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWd0BsBoYu3tK1o3UOR0xFILJpLL991Upd-wK_Pv0f1_lKKadyf6cH-3iPc4t1RoVGAkrQc6CUz9l0wUdmZN2xh0EbAD3aoVu9UwAm3hblXHB4MYN2pO2omexoA-gu-Z8aIGgYQaPrF8tkBrIBIhIhCKM4pFa3_rOm0laO-awv3vpbfXTZr609d6HfBE4Cp-M4elpufeHW05fAqfCxC5z-xGoQOFml5JJrDTLUQi3VssuNNpZUWlpqOOW2ypB2pp0FTqDMxRmF2G0-PI-Uc9ovgzDq_qCUfxntvzUvj98BAAD__wRlZAk) in New South Wales.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkb2O3CAQx58Gd17BAGtvQRHp5O7SpkRjz2CTYGMBupPfPvIldaSUI41-_68f7_4dY4rH-h13dmENvoXsQYLpFfRKe8KYLm86coEZWHfs1KCNUnq0Q7c5_ZppoCAt0IIWQUq2WkoFxvBo0XbR3TQFSqtRaXg9ZstoBrSkAiCCEkYyxZbL42eOR9s4pCt_cHksee-S21o7q9DfBEwCplZw-fWoDa-6YTmx4XHhyvevgIk1E5kRewyAvVEG-pFw6a2c5TxolmF8CT2dCRfe-WhCv9VW8KDd1zMfNRf_V_zgz5q4NS53J7d7MAKeSJGEftMhZ6oCnu3rpFh4abP_D5b_g-iKo_MzphTrcxBGrjvG9BW8_WuMDwe_AwAA__-vsZCZ) | |
# FRIDAY, DECEMBER 13, 2024
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** There's nothing like a genuine oyster pearl--and pearls of wisdom from a hardworking centenarian--to get your weekend off to a great start! The _Feel Good Flyover_ is back this week with more inspiring news--including a story about a man [whose blood](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWd0BsBoYu3tK1o3UOR0xFILJpLL991Upd-wK_Pv0f1_lKKadyf6cH-3iPc4t1RoVGAkrQc6CUz9l0wUdmZN2xh0EbAD3aoVu9UwAm3hblXHB4MYN2pO2omexoA-gu-Z8aIGgYQaPrF8tkBrIBIhIhCKM4pFa3_rOm0laO-awv3vpbfXTZr609d6HfBE4Cp-M4elpufeHW05fAqfCxC5z-xGoQOFml5JJrDTLUQi3VssuNNpZUWlpqOOW2ypB2pp0FTqDMxRmF2G0-PI-Uc9ovgzDq_qCUfxntvzUvj98BAAD__wRlZAk) has saved thousands of babies' lives. We're sponsored this afternoon by [Boston Brain Science](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkb2O3CAQx58Gd17BAGtvQRHp5O7SpkRjz2CTYGMBupPfPvIldaSUI41-_68f7_4dY4rH-h13dmENvoXsQYLpFfRKe8KYLm86coEZWHfs1KCNUnq0Q7c5_ZppoCAt0IIWQUq2WkoFxvBo0XbR3TQFSqtRaXg9ZstoBrSkAiCCEkYyxZbL42eOR9s4pCt_cHksee-S21o7q9DfBEwCplZw-fWoDa-6YTmx4XHhyvevgIk1E5kRewyAvVEG-pFw6a2c5TxolmF8CT2dCRfe-WhCv9VW8KDd1zMfNRf_V_zgz5q4NS53J7d7MAKeSJGEftMhZ6oCnu3rpFh4abP_D5b_g-iKo_MzphTrcxBGrjvG9BW8_WuMDwe_AwAA__-vsZCZ), offering nutritional advice to help fight memory loss.
|
---
## Man's Rare Blood Saves Babies
Arthur Croft's blood donations [have saved the lives of thousands of women and children](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWd0BsBoYu3tK1o3UOR0xFILJpLL991Upd-wK_Pv0f1_lKKadyf6cH-3iPc4t1RoVGAkrQc6CUz9l0wUdmZN2xh0EbAD3aoVu9UwAm3hblXHB4MYN2pO2omexoA-gu-Z8aIGgYQaPrF8tkBrIBIhIhCKM4pFa3_rOm0laO-awv3vpbfXTZr609d6HfBE4Cp-M4elpufeHW05fAqfCxC5z-xGoQOFml5JJrDTLUQi3VssuNNpZUWlpqOOW2ypB2pp0FTqDMxRmF2G0-PI-Uc9ovgzDq_qCUfxntvzUvj98BAAD__wRlZAk) in New South Wales. Croft is one of just 170 Australians capable of producing the anti-D antibody, essential for preventing [RH disease](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7FugzAQgOGnsbcg7s7gZPDQhS1dOyIHn-EqgxF2g_L2VSt17fgvn_R_3Me7lyTb_O5XdnGOY415xBbNBfACNAYv6TUaHVxkRibNDiwZALp2Vi-ui_Toe0PERDdsbwTWQt9OxNZzF3st7kcDBIIrEN6aR8feWN8FiOg9gjItB6n5aD6zbHXhmF75yUcz5VUnt9S6F0VvCgeFw3mezbTkveHwpXCY8hakSt7KJUhhX7goHI7lr_Thwn5KSlJ6q0w7r17SL1z_m306_A4AAP__KmZYKw) in pregnancies where a mother's blood type is negative and the baby's is positive. As part of the [Australian Red Cross Lifeblood](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kD2OgzAQRk8DHYgZm0AKF9vQZdst0QQPMCsbR_4Jyu1XyQG2-_QVT0_v5zbfSJwc2zd5Nuu2znkNM3aoG8AG1GxJ3GvWtTUrM7Kq2cCgNIAa-6Heje7Uqi309gJAI1_1oMcOiAHtqNS9r8W8aYCgYASF1_beM-mBegsrEiFUumMrOcT2N8iRd17dKzw5tkvwtTN7zo9Uqa8Kpwqn8zzbY_dxabfwbKlUONE9lNyUVOEUOYUSF35v8Q9acrNQ4iblYuXzxp1TSY14Xw5JlCUcDZWUIzmhOhr7OMU5SZeh0t3mSdxHI_-X5mnwLwAA__89L2nA) anti-D program, Croft donates blood every two weeks and travels to Sydney every six months for booster shots. He has donated blood 500 times, and each of his donations produces over a thousand antidotes, helping prevent stillbirths and complications for mothers and babies across the state.
## Centenarian's Kindness Goes Viral
Rewarding selfless acts of kindness have become the hallmark of YouTuber Zachery Dereniowski, aka [@mdmotivator](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z71ugzAUxfGnwVuQ77XByeChUpWNrh3R9RfcysQRcUC8fUUfoOs50k_6fw_jQJz5MX3REm2a0lhTGVGivgBeQI2BOB-jFsGmGDEqES0YpQHUtTNittLLQDr13gcfHPTOa4NkOieTUf2tE2xPDRAUXEHhrXVdJG2oC5CQCKHRMgauZW1_Cj_qHFM-yhbX1pdFZDvX-nw16qPBe4P3fd_bo7zr28XzP0cth8-hVN6ollWsNjx3zplfvWm0nBbi_CfV_-o2i78BAAD__9YwU3Q). In his latest video, Dereniowski visits a Home Depot in Ontario, where he [approaches employee David Frank](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8j7FuhSAUQL8GNoz3AiIDQxe317WjwXJRGhSjvGf8--b1A7qfnJPz9RgfPuW0zZ9-JRfnONZYRmxRCUABcgw-5XtUPLhIhCQ5OTBSAcheG744r3vodDRIkaZpoq630RqIPVjrNVme3NsGCBJ6kGibSZNXxusAEb1HYKqlkGo5mp-StrpQzHd50dF8l5Vnt9S6n0x-MBwYDtd1Nc_9Kkdd7jfAcCg50FnFUlYSgfZSBa17LjeRqM9jOwW0LT9c2K-Uczo7w1Q7rz7lv0D9b_rl8DcAAP__DHBcSA), asking for a dollar to buy a bolt while pretending to have left his wallet at home. Frank, who recently turned 100 and gained recognition as [_" Home Depot's Oldest Employee"_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLGOpDAQBb8GMiN3GzATOLiEbC69EDW4AZ-MjWzvIPbrV7PaeMMnPZVK9e85Pcl5F7a_dLBZt3Uqa5xQYisABajJkvP31NbWrMzIqmYDWrUAauh0vZtOP2YpGaGXSoMcYEXd67lVQ9_pGR61M28aICgYQOGjmTumVlNnYUUihKqVbF2JqfkfXSg7r_6OL07NEo_am72UM1fqT4VjheN1XU0uicqe4k0bW5dPKsv-Plc4Br5yhaOPC3nxM-igTxc2cXLKMYg9Hiwsn7FkEb3lXESIqeyCDk5uoSD4OH28mUX5SCELkFK4IC4XbI6pTsael_Pe5V5XrdwOcv5btfyW72XwKwAA__8PZHaz) not only covered the cost himself but personally escorted Dereniowski to the correct aisle to help him find the right bolt. Dereniowski then surprised Frank with $1,000, which Frank said he plans to pay forward. When later asked about the secret to a long life, Frank shared his heartfelt advice: "Treat the world like your family. Be nice to them. Be sensible. That's all."
## Cowboy Rescues Child Locked in Car
A Nebraskan cowboy on horseback [wrangled up](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DEOnDAQheHTQDcIj1lgCxdp6DZtSjTgAU8weGU7IHL6aPcAqX_p09P79RpfJF6O9SftbJZ1GfMSRqyxAYWg9GhJ_D02pTULM7Iu2ahON0rp_tGVzvCzfbakFdaaOp47rEnPjNij7bu2r0sxH02h0qpXGp_V9GBqOnpYtSARqqKp2UoOsfod5MiOF3-Hk2M1h730xuX8ToX-UeBQ4HBdV7VxPj-xwIFiltlzgcPBU6S0UYJZsvzlAxzHAEuI4P6kjWMCR9fGN6dv4QQr7QyJTrZAMNF0w-XEM0SxcqxA4EJMH7vVddNq7Mto7PsS7yW1XdHU607ivzPz_647Df4LAAD__zl-c7U) a heroic performance when he saved a baby trapped in a dangerously hot car. While preparing for the second round of a roping tournament in Bertrand, Nebraska, Edgar Estrada heard faint cries. He trotted toward the sounds on his trusty horse, FJ, and discovered a baby locked inside a hot car. Estrada pulled out a knife, pried down the window, and opened the door. He then [moved the child](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kEsK2zAUAE8j72SsJ_mThRZJwKSLtNAWujTP1pOjRpaM5MS4py_pAbofhmF-3Yc7Ou_C_BUX0na2w2bjABUoLoALORh0_hhUYbQlApIFadFKJYTs6rZ4aKqbrh1lpfAkm1G1tm6bmiokYzqLxhZOf2wChBSdkHAqx5pQtVgbYQERBFMVGbfFVP6OLmwPsv6Ib0rlFJfC68e2rZnJM4OeQb_ve5lfIRz5efz5EAz6OUbDA-2ZQV83IBj017iP8eDfAr_FlGnE6ckvNMWFMj_zG6XIv1OeXpT5BceD_0y4rmT4l8B_7OQ3Si7M_IqpSNqsu_Pe5aZlqpoXdP5f2fa_W28NfwMAAP__pdJvcg) to an air-conditioned area and alerted onsite first responders. "I just took action," he said, adding that he was told the baby is doing well and living in a foster home.

clean_body: Arthur Croft's blood donations in New South Wales. | | | | | | FRIDAY, DECEMBER 13, 2024 ---|--- Good Afternoon! There's nothing like a genuine oyster pearl--and pearls of wisdom from a hardworking centenarian--to get your weekend off to a great start! The Feel Good Flyover is back this week with more inspiring news--including a story about a man has saved thousands of babies' lives. We're sponsored this afternoon by , offering nutritional advice to help fight memory loss. | Man's Rare Blood Saves Babies Arthur Croft's blood donations in New South Wales. Croft is one of just 170 Australians capable of producing the anti-D antibody, essential for preventing in pregnancies where a mother's blood type is negative and the baby's is positive. As part of the anti-D program, Croft donates blood every two weeks and travels to Sydney every six months for booster shots. He has donated blood 500 times, and each of his donations produces over a thousand antidotes, helping prevent stillbirths and complications for mothers and babies across the state. Centenarian's Kindness Goes Viral Rewarding selfless acts of kindness have become the hallmark of YouTuber Zachery Dereniowski, aka . In his latest video, Dereniowski visits a Home Depot in Ontario, where he , asking for a dollar to buy a bolt while pretending to have left his wallet at home. Frank, who recently turned 100 and gained recognition as not only covered the cost himself but personally escorted Dereniowski to the correct aisle to help him find the right bolt. Dereniowski then surprised Frank with $1,000, which Frank said he plans to pay forward. When later asked about the secret to a long life, Frank shared his heartfelt advice: "Treat the world like your family. Be nice to them. Be sensible. That's all." Cowboy Rescues Child Locked in Car A Nebraskan cowboy on horseback a heroic performance when he saved a baby trapped in a dangerously hot car. While preparing for the second round of a roping tournament in Bertrand, Nebraska, Edgar Estrada heard faint cries. He trotted toward the sounds on his trusty horse, FJ, and discovered a baby locked inside a hot car. Estrada pulled out a knife, pried down the window, and opened the door. He then to an air-conditioned area and alerted onsite first responders. "I just took action," he said, adding that he was told the baby is doing well and living in a foster home. | Flying together with our sponsor Why do some seniors maintain razor-sharp memory while others struggle to remember basic things? A groundbreaking Harvard study suggests it's not about age--it's about what's on your plate. Boston physician Dr. George Karanastasis has identified three specific foods that could be the key to fighting memory loss. "Your brain needs specific nutrients to create new cells and maintain cognitive function," explains Dr. K. "Without these nutrients, your brain literally starts to starve, leading to those embarrassing senior moments." The consequences? Walking into rooms and forgetting why you're there. Getting lost on familiar routes. Struggling to remember names of people you've known for years. But here's the good news: Dr. K has developed a simple protocol requiring no major lifestyle changes--just adding three specific foods back into your diet. His breakthrough discovery has already helped thousands reclaim their mental clarity. "The transformation I've seen in folks is remarkable," says Dr. K. "Family members often notice the difference before they themselves do." Ready to discover these memory-boosting foods? Watch Dr. K's presentation now and learn how to help your brain stay as young as your spirit. [[WATCH THE PRESENTATION NOW]]() | ➤ A 9-year-old boy hosted a lemonade stand to raise money for the family of a Florida deputy who died after being struck by a Jeep SUV. The deputy's son attends the same daycare as the boy's younger sister. () ➤ A mother of six credited a first responder on vacation for helping save her newborn son by suggesting the boy needed to see a doctor. The appointment led to an eventual diagnosis of Alagille syndrome, a rare genetic disorder. () ➤ An 80-year-old woman who became the sole resident of a remote Greek island after her husband died 10 years ago was gifted a donkey for companionship. () ➤ A North Carolina woman dining on oysters at a Morrisville restaurant found a pearl in one. She described it as a message from the universe to keep living positively. () ➤ Ethiopian wolves could be the first large carnivore pollinators, after being found regularly feeding on plant nectar, then visiting as many as 30 blooms in a single trip. () ➤ Two adventurous dogs were rescued by their owners after falling into an icy Colorado lake while attempting to retrieve two tennis balls they spotted on the ice. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Make Your Microwaved Food Taste Better (And So Much More!) is a next-generation microwave food cover that gives you better-tasting leftovers, a splatter-free microwave, and finger protection from hot dishes -- all in one convenient plastic-free device. | Dick Van Dyke turned 99 today, and he's still dancing! | Why are crabs so bad at sharing? | Flying together with our sponsor Struggling with memory loss? Harvard researchers have uncovered a surprising truth: it might not be your age that's the problem--it's your diet. Dr. George Karanastasis, a respected Boston physician, has identified three specific foods that could be the missing link in maintaining sharp memory and mental clarity. His simple protocol doesn't require drastic changes--just adding these crucial nutrients back into your diet. The results? Thousands of seniors are reporting dramatic improvements in their memory and cognitive function. No more forgotten names, misplaced keys, or embarrassing senior moments. [[WATCH THE PRESENTATION NOW]]() | "You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream." -- , acclaimed author of The Chronicles of Narnia series. | | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | ---|---

name: Sean Feucht
subject: TONIGHT IN TEXAS: Peace on Earth Dinner and Worship
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b1367d15acb5489ca683906885dfb792&_e=OzdIFMjRmuxduulsiKIuVkLTnZZRgn6pEzUuOjMFkyfC5Ki7EZdkfnaKAMq2JlNG0duY0OAMTdVVrjT-Qc1vOU9KoziWTjMR5bVY5uWS0Gx8vSHSM2QAAKLxzqDrYypZ5-QDbsnYfJ__hqHO03MwdaZ_RTS7LIEGhnXVS2d3Z4jD3wefZTRI_SZwUfNDwHt9puPpAYPKJLSDJXa9j-nXx8fvOKkWEW2qV29mtL4gsIkVo248GJ_OKZPQ-9hHwFh5O-RLdB4pDGpWuG-0SxV4wSaLWxyMOWqOo4HlyhEa8S9HNjg8Aay46gjbEsARXlZaXLKzbIfXnIG_-CBLOIUK2Q%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
TONIGHT, we are gathering in Texas to PRAY FOR PEACE and to implore heaven to protect the persecuted church. Recently released footage in Syria shows Christians being captured by Islamic Terrorists, and we are gathering to pray for their safety, protection, and release!

If you can't attend, I ask that you lift up our Brothers and Sisters in Christ in prayer. They are facing life and death threats of violence, and while they are willing to lay their life down for the Gospel, we pray that God protects them and keeps them safe through all adversity. I put together a short video on how we can be praying for the persecuted Church in the Middle East.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b1367d15acb5489ca683906885dfb792&_e=OzdIFMjRmuxduulsiKIuVkLTnZZRgn6pEzUuOjMFkyfC5Ki7EZdkfnaKAMq2JlNG0duY0OAMTdVVrjT-Qc1vOU9KoziWTjMR5bVY5uWS0Gx8vSHSM2QAAKLxzqDrYypZ5-QDbsnYfJ__hqHO03MwdaZ_RTS7LIEGhnXVS2d3Z4jD3wefZTRI_SZwUfNDwHt9b-yBuzCByinQvi3Dnc8yGWvfU7rd-aFMwhNZyGzF5yqXipSnDvMcLDluA0nb3CnWe4itc2IJeb37Smi7EN4Y_ae2ToEDnFAve-UmMjqjxXFiEquqrPZqVu3T4C9xCgYLCr-u_wDsROHj_f5BRxvcoA%3D%3D)
---
We want to pack the house with Believers interceding on behalf of our brothers and sisters in Christ. These calls to heaven will be heard! In Matthew 18:19-20, Jesus says, “Again, truly I tell you that if two of you on earth agree about anything they ask for, it will be done for them by my Father in heaven. For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.” Will you join us in person, in prayer, or with provisions to hold this time of prayer? _**PEACE ON EARTH DETAILS**_ Date: Friday, December 13, 2024 Time: 7:30 pmLocation: Vintage Church 171 Farm to Market 3219, Harker Heights, TX We're holding a Nations Dinner as well! The dinner starts at 5:30, and tickets include a bonus -- reserved seating in the main event AND a discount coupon to use at the merch table. Come and meet me and one of our missionaries from Iraq and hear testimonies we can not share publicly as well as an insight into what God is doing in the midst of persecution! Order your Nations Dinner ticket **[HERE.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b1367d15acb5489ca683906885dfb792&_e=OzdIFMjRmuxduulsiKIuVikCl1nPQ9Dz-STD9ypo82JpJvS3ZwL1gJc7uBoQo372eiB1axtymbwABvXK1SgSeETFoDRF9CBQmrzVbF-RXurhInRC3enz9EXGZ0CH8r7Dggn7kttZjNPAOvlLBsFeZBzyXTdMY3sNd7kmYX1K4GC_mqtjLIUp4zHNxS7eAJic-OTZ0kAkmXImeeCb2UjrkEjnnhFQ4DO1RR2aMP_B9iQVyYDZpP0gR0L2_ZAbAbc6oyC_NWs8B9Hh2GbYvwXdc-hDV-LcPnoVem0MdilgmQTxsebu7KscTpprxLy1_BsoLgzngJBZ3fBnDp_CkKiPldyjJfah6XoOLsxec2vRwcTGubMxQ8ZNgSDzx3YEKX1Oc0hOLnqrZA2JczKW6VIHaiVdMCGjEknBKrgZUxau5EQ%3D)**
---
[**SUPPORT THE LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b1367d15acb5489ca683906885dfb792&_e=OzdIFMjRmuxduulsiKIuVkLTnZZRgn6pEzUuOjMFkyfC5Ki7EZdkfnaKAMq2JlNG0duY0OAMTdVVrjT-Qc1vOU9KoziWTjMR5bVY5uWS0Gx8vSHSM2QAAKLxzqDrYypZ5-QDbsnYfJ__hqHO03MwdaZ_RTS7LIEGhnXVS2d3Z4jD3wefZTRI_SZwUfNDwHt9AaENWX_Fs1Ra7oGRHO6pGyeQBhR-GkoqvPynRS1XTFwhZuDaOOA_efH464h2s3y0M5laKkIQzGqJ8Wf09PF-TKw2OunqL3C4zoJC60ulCySqfMLqkw0JHZ3KtXVgugl-Lb7EULlGpX9mp3yEhrwmrQ%3D%3D)

Till all hear,

Sean

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hi friends,
How are you doing? (I hope you’ll respond and let me know!)
Like many of you, I’ve been processing the election results and reflecting on our country’s future – and how I can help create progress amid uncertainty.
Here’s where I landed: We may not know what the future holds, but I am 100% sure that to navigate it, we’ll need to work together. We’ll need to rely on our community, and we’ll need to trust one another.
That’s always true, but especially so during challenges or hardship. Alone, our actions are often limited. Together, we hold real power.
Community and trust don’t just emerge fully formed, though – so right now, one of my priorities is to connect with those around me, nurture the trust we’ve built, and work to rebuild it where we’ve fallen short.
I’d love to hear from you – about how you are, and any thoughts, feedback, or advice you have for me and our community as we close out 2024.
If you’d like, please reply to this email and share!
Thanks, and talk soon.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Save USPS via Our Revolution
subject: He actually covered his ears
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Postmaster General Louis DeJoy — still in office since being appointed by
Trump in his first term — is running USPS into the ground.

This week when he was facing heated questions at a Congressional hearing
he responded by literally covering his ears.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20703?t=1016&akid=7389%2E5885482%2E8F2Pc- ][IMG]

Since DeJoy took over USPS in 2020, he’s set USPS on a disastrous path to
privatization that has caused mail delivery to slow and prices to
skyrocket. It’s gotten so bad that even some Republicans are up in arms
about his performance.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20703?source=email-121324&t=1017&akid=7389%2E5885482%2E8F2Pc- ]Bernie’s been shouting from the rooftops for years that DeJoy has got
to go, but now the pressure is at a boiling point. Will you call on the
USPS Board of Governors to fire DeJoy NOW, before it’s too late to save
the postal service?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20703?source=email-121324&t=1018&akid=7389%2E5885482%2E8F2Pc- ]ADD YOUR NAME

Louis DeJoy is the first postmaster general in two decades with NO prior
USPS experience, and it’s no secret why he got the job – he’s a Republican
mega-donor who wrote massive checks to Trump.

Bernie’s been clear from the beginning that he must be removed, and with a
disastrous Congressional hearing this week, pressure is growing.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20703?t=1019&akid=7389%2E5885482%2E8F2Pc- ][IMG]

DeJoy has tried to run USPS like a for-profit company, jacking up prices,
closing down essential locations, and slashing hours for rural employees.
Now all of us are paying the price as we experience delays on everything
from prescription drugs to social security checks to passports.

But instead of moving away from DeJoy’s disastrous privatization plan,
some MAGA Republicans like Elon Musk are doubling down, developing plans
to privatize USPS even more as soon as Trump gets into the White House.

Privatizing this essential public service would be a direct attack on
rural communities because it is not profitable to deliver mail to low
population areas. Which is why Our Revolution will fight tooth and nail to
stop DeJoy and Musk’s plans.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20703?source=email-121324&t=1020&akid=7389%2E5885482%2E8F2Pc- ]It’s time for DeJoy to go BEFORE Trump takes office and the USPS Board
of Governors is the only body with the power to fire him. Will you stand
with Bernie and help us amplify the urgent call to save USPS NOW?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

group in America.

name: VoteVets
subject: Trump and his billionaire buddies want to destroy the VA to make a quick buck....
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump’s appointees — the architects of Project 2025 — are getting ready to execute their plan to slash benefits for Veterans, gut the agency of career public servants, replace them with Trump loyalists, and privatize care. And we’ll just let you guess who will pick up those contracts when privatization comes around...
#
Peter —
Trump has tasked Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy — two filthy rich, unelected bureaucrats — with dismantling the federal government and slashing trillions in spending.
They’re going to start by destroying the VA.
**FIRST:** Ramaswamy put the Veteran's Health Care Eligibility Act, a $119 billion program that funds medical services for Veterans, on the chopping block.
**THEN:** Trump’s team soft launched a hit campaign at the “absurdly generous” disability benefits Veterans receive in an uncredited editorial from The Economist.
**NOW:** Trump’s appointees — the architects of Project 2025 — are getting ready to execute their plan to slash benefits for Veterans, gut the agency of career public servants, replace them with Trump loyalists, and privatize care. And we’ll just let you guess who will pick up those contracts when privatization comes around...
So, they’ve told us what they want to do. Trump campaigned on it. Project 2025 goes into exacting detail about it. And now, with weeks until they take office, his team is finalizing their plans.
It’s a complete and total betrayal of the pact we made with our Veterans, and VoteVets will do everything we can to stop it.
If every person reading this email chipped in $5 or $10, we’d raise enough to put these charlatans and hucksters on blast — on television, radio, social media, and beyond.
But that’s just the problem. Not everyone donates. And that’s why it is so important that you chip in if you can, Peter.
[**Can we count on you to chip in $15 and help us fight back against Trump and his administration's plans to gut care for Veterans?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241213-1-30&t=1&akid=34024%2E3013755%2EeBuMeD)

Peter,

I emailed you __**specifically**__ because I was hoping I had earned your support. I don't take this lightly, so let me tell you why I believe I've earned your respect & support.
● I served as a Navy SEAL for over 2 decades
● My favorite title I've ever held is "Grandpa"
● I fight tirelessly for our dairy and family farms
● I want to make sure every veteran has access to quality care when they get home
● I always speak my mind, and my opinion and my vote are not for sale
---
| | | [SUPPORT DERRICK >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=80cec3c0b7584570a6c504cfe529e91b&_e=bWLw08Bx9Yrtt0POyz6ejuekiM0gbnQlEZV3O6qIh7bisH6BSpZRgVyShkBtc3BXhEz-r4umgEy7Yu8b0UKZ5GpSx01zK0osgYC_RVsCIAi9GEX-XQAhEiiVUS6f1KdIN6cDh8l7razNQ2P5LgPHnnsF0jLjf0Bt5Z14VIFSNd8GMrH6mB-jhL1Udr9-hiociOgai_6rP5WSP7ZkXEx36Stj5KTaY0Fu5WFvGXLb94xbmivPSFlT-UjQ5jNVwx--ATi9CyiVx5GNNX_Dbv88waWkXYLBo49ywfjy7MYZuyD5g-9o1gq807PKKJSooNMN64RDLD6vNOZ7snMgM07wQvaEPHgtxP1Af4UqHFaVGpvLEQzHQRhClnhmjb4g6zjy6Wa9WubqVv6Nc3AS7wIuQuyo58i2w9KDnV7gCg-LED6N67sBQEeNEUBJxrXYHb_4 "SUPPORT DERRICK >>")

Have a good rest of your Sunday!

Derrick Van Orden

name: Wes Moore for Maryland
subject: Maryland’s decade
body:
Friend, you’ve heard Wes say this before, but it’s worth repeating.

It’s Maryland’s decade.

But exactly does that mean?

It means setting up our students for long-term success. It means investing in programs to prepare Maryland’s youth for a lifetime of service. It means increasing funding for public transit, economic mobility, and increasing access to opportunity.

Maryland will continue leading the way so that this decade will be our best. We’re going to come out strong in support of our unions, protect reproductive rights, and expand gun safety laws.

The team is moving fast to cut past red tape and increase equity, not only in our state but in the whole country. With Maryland as an example, our country can prosper. If you believe in our mission to make this Maryland’s decade, make a $10 gift now to power our work. Your contribution now will help us make the change we want to see for generations to come. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=75]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241213-1?refcode=em20241213-1-el-other]

We can’t wait to reflect in 2030 on the decade of progress we made in Mayland.

Thanks for joining us every step of the way,

Team Moore

If you believe in our mission to make this Maryland’s decade, make a $10 gift now to power our work. Your contribution now will help us make the change we want to see for generations to come. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Donate $10 [] Donate $25 [] Donate $50 [] Donate $75 [] Donate $100 [] Other Amount [] We can’t wait to reflect in 2030 on the decade of progress we made in Mayland. Thanks for joining us every step of the way, Team Moore

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_e=lZJm9bnN5bU8aZI9N8FrFe9VtLVZRDWIQ5pV4lSnXA3WjHT23Yws9FEIYQTZum7VA_eDA5iqdA2Sbef8Y6fIW7XTI48b7YZOG--tSORfU1dMbWAgv2bNNgyF7VCsUoTVl5WCrneEa5mhH6XqtS1eVbe78Zhy84WMgeqgmNjpW5MFgK71tku7zz5ji2hGb2aNDBeO9yfmNkgcK3UCDuaUB0h2A_9W68e1c3s_QsV4XvSihKmMEeDHI8sGpdhI4Uc4OcMWATsbPmjl2zlJ82LRi2VJZymh1KGoVDeZ_LdZKcwLyixYfNVyRPrWx-voRPJ0fJZof2PeYjM-dExaI5sm8TNHzD3q5yWkwW1HyL6VHWXFgVr3HJAoRwfGCs9jjTFPIMzLfmZr_Nw4vvqFdRkR7Q%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_e=lZJm9bnN5bU8aZI9N8FrFe9VtLVZRDWIQ5pV4lSnXA3WjHT23Yws9FEIYQTZum7VA_eDA5iqdA2Sbef8Y6fIW7XTI48b7YZOG--tSORfU1dMbWAgv2bNNgyF7VCsUoTVl5WCrneEa5mhH6XqtS1eVbe78Zhy84WMgeqgmNjpW5MFgK71tku7zz5ji2hGb2aNDBeO9yfmNkgcK3UCDuaUB0h2A_9W68e1c3s_QsV4XvSZrPI9lXUxJaiRUZXyh_2iyxo8p8qWCQu1i97QOzMy8TA0ah8C-rR0lOWb4rTdwTJZePuGlkIKrA7E__9k5EXhSX9JqXyEzhB4e5kwQxadUgJ-ZiD4JtgCGBgtszeVORf5he3Ue-YYALg8yrIOw8wf-5RT8uauEpqaQIO50BV9Jg%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_e=lZJm9bnN5bU8aZI9N8FrFe9VtLVZRDWIQ5pV4lSnXA3WjHT23Yws9FEIYQTZum7VA_eDA5iqdA2Sbef8Y6fIW7XTI48b7YZOG--tSORfU1dMbWAgv2bNNgyF7VCsUoTVl5WCrneEa5mhH6XqtS1eVbe78Zhy84WMgeqgmNjpW5MFgK71tku7zz5ji2hGb2aNDBeO9yfmNkgcK3UCDuaUB0h2A_9W68e1c3s_QsV4XvRrRSZs6sKyIt70Er06Zz_8Hmi_vTnaLIpSKN2y3qc8RV_4_7m1JanJiDx7eqJ2okkFt_GtTuXiJhdyxnb8f9hLmEpYX45t2nv6aXrZPdnYPMlDnFRxGA7rnZq1N5e_S_tF1NW590BsKq0ZCLqLEpKhDBSA7V8zpXTsNFJFlg8lpg%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_e=lZJm9bnN5bU8aZI9N8FrFe9VtLVZRDWIQ5pV4lSnXA3WjHT23Yws9FEIYQTZum7VA_eDA5iqdA2Sbef8Y6fIW7XTI48b7YZOG--tSORfU1dMbWAgv2bNNgyF7VCsUoTVl5WCrneEa5mhH6XqtS1eVbe78Zhy84WMgeqgmNjpW5MFgK71tku7zz5ji2hGb2aNDBeO9yfmNkgcK3UCDuaUB0h2A_9W68e1c3s_QsV4XvTt7B_DkPVpUSfxQBJP_eFmrFxMt5Gf6Pw2ru-x1Cp_K6Uc5Q-378vl0jxUjRQPCP7LABgLYkSnDt8VCtegdPwx6bPtEch0WT7FhX6I4JvhkDOBrUHlHjPteNVNKb9Ji-F_sSII83kvaYLHJly9czok6a9DAe39dz7C-1AU3KpFhA%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_e=lZJm9bnN5bU8aZI9N8FrFe9VtLVZRDWIQ5pV4lSnXA3WjHT23Yws9FEIYQTZum7VA_eDA5iqdA2Sbef8Y6fIW7XTI48b7YZOG--tSORfU1dMbWAgv2bNNgyF7VCsUoTVl5WCrneEa5mhH6XqtS1eVbe78Zhy84WMgeqgmNjpW5MFgK71tku7zz5ji2hGb2aNDBeO9yfmNkgcK3UCDuaUB0h2A_9W68e1c3s_QsV4XvQyWGszt7wOUShiksxULBKGu21IS__K2KYo8yc7mSt674i_1JZQCeLV3VY_m2I1ASxsQvYfEzfSHOWf7dvOZfoQ6e1GXlx4Go3jKvWxR-3iLUONtpY5hACZUntpeZ_PsOupi42vjwKzUboY9NxiwZhZzuHrhOm9DMLPVUIia2SoWg%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_e=lZJm9bnN5bU8aZI9N8FrFe9VtLVZRDWIQ5pV4lSnXA3WjHT23Yws9FEIYQTZum7VA_eDA5iqdA2Sbef8Y6fIW7XTI48b7YZOG--tSORfU1dMbWAgv2bNNgyF7VCsUoTVl5WCrneEa5mhH6XqtS1eVbe78Zhy84WMgeqgmNjpW5MFgK71tku7zz5ji2hGb2aNDBeO9yfmNkgcK3UCDuaUB0h2A_9W68e1c3s_QsV4XvRDf8bP2lkT6xIlmMPkp2DCcSdujy1qwIEOjBEmOf4JpS9VA2znogjX8kA3Q1SKVssJdP9CFUlXKBMhlXz_dCXdBJjD3oxC0uStHJXWfgZ7R6O31OZU0gUQv-KT283ROOzBtJt5uuOGAjtOB0OFYMRzbAtrqnruCwha8oJ85qcH3w%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_e=lZJm9bnN5bU8aZI9N8FrFe9VtLVZRDWIQ5pV4lSnXA3WjHT23Yws9FEIYQTZum7VA_eDA5iqdA2Sbef8Y6fIW7XTI48b7YZOG--tSORfU1dMbWAgv2bNNgyF7VCsUoTVl5WCrneEa5mhH6XqtS1eVbe78Zhy84WMgeqgmNjpW5MFgK71tku7zz5ji2hGb2aNDBeO9yfmNkgcK3UCDuaUB0h2A_9W68e1c3s_QsV4XvQ5SHOizxtq8Ek-mtZea1zcXRP7FtYpR176uFkrixU9JbCLLIJup5KkPmMxgCnxzsXZJX6ReSgm4yo8Lzpgy8TR9ovlZAPhIPHOxFf_rF6sXkqbCW2NVf94LoRHvxOxc71cUj5rr9yzTHp0PmrIdw8eq5bumXY1edwGxJSVK9FlTg%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_e=lZJm9bnN5bU8aZI9N8FrFfGUgLQKuDhlOC0KKqdEwB_oYacuiud2ZZT5D7Hfc6ODiVyhlyRJnzfmcOm2bsOM5G_KJ6O9tFZOVTuh_JEQVtfHOb4RVxaMSenfB3zBqW5VbR6YQa-JmtbAmsttXzOlhNB7k7bvUvmdWXUo6s4SQsmk9Ko97_4rAN4APTTo6FlM98vEd3ijeKK4rvN9yGQ4_w%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click [here](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=90aaf912410f41ea8c18edb674f149dd&_t=Kisdno9LNpQiEqA7ynT07o5359R4COST7OFibhEGcdsPrbEFrUxd3RUbBXh9-9aMPJK-Y7QL6bfEr3EB3B0wah4aMQkUABZ1JyC5R3dvgyKxbRxmTfCTZnKHiG92rnYz) to unsubscribe

Peter -

Around the country, schools are wrapping up for Christmas break, companies are closing their books for the year, and everyone is looking forward to 2025.

Here in Washington, things are no different – but as we finish up for the year, I want to reflect on the monumental WINS we’ve had this year.

So, I’m looking for you to grade Republican’s performance on this last cycle and share any feedback on what you’d like to see more of or less of in the coming year.

clean_body: Around the country, schools are wrapping up for Christmas break, companies are closing their books for the year, and everyone is looking forward to 2025. | Peter - Around the country, schools are wrapping up for Christmas break, companies are closing their books for the year, and everyone is looking forward to 2025. Here in Washington, things are no different – but as we finish up for the year, I want to reflect on the monumental WINS we’ve had this year. So, I’m looking for you to grade Republican’s performance on this last cycle and share any feedback on what you’d like to see more of or less of in the coming year. I’m so proud of our team and want to continue building the most successful party in the country. Gratefully, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. clean_body: | =# Folks – this is making me sick: = Bennie Thompson, Adam Schiff, Pete Aguilar, Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger and other selfless members of Congress painted a huge target on their backs when they formed the January 6 committee. But they did it because of the pain, the trauma, that me and my fellow officers endured. They did it because our democracy was under threat. And now, Donald Trump is reviving that threat. I've never been more certain of this: If we do not act now, Donald Trump will take our democracy and demolish it right before our eyes. = | = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Together, Harry = = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Kim Ogg seeking death penalty in Jocelyn Nungaray killing,** " Houston Chronicle's **Nicole Hensley** -- "Harris County prosecutors are expected to seek the death penalty against two men charged in the death of 12-year-old**Jocelyn Nungaray** , according to officials.

The option to seek the death penalty at trial means jurors can consider to sentence **Johan Jose Martinez-Rangel** and**Franklin Pe ña** to die as a form of punishment. Court filings are expected Friday to elaborate on their decision to seek the death penalty, according to a Harris County District Attorney's Office news release.

Peña's defense attorney**Daniel Werlinger** said he and other lawyers received notice in November through the trial prosecutors that the punishment would be sought.

"We see this as old news. We knew we were going to be in this position from Day 1 but now it's official," Werlinger said.

* **TOP NEWS**

“**Kim Ogg seeking death penalty in Jocelyn Nungaray killing,** ” Houston Chronicle's **Nicole Hensley** — “Harris County prosecutors are expected to seek the death penalty against two men charged in the death of 12-year-old**Jocelyn Nungaray** , according to officials.

The option to seek the death penalty at trial means jurors can consider to sentence **Johan Jose Martinez-Rangel** and**Franklin Peña** to die as a form of punishment. Court filings are expected Friday to elaborate on their decision to seek the death penalty, according to a Harris County District Attorney's Office news release.

Peña's defense attorney**Daniel Werlinger** said he and other lawyers received notice in November through the trial prosecutors that the punishment would be sought.

"We see this as old news. We knew we were going to be in this position from Day 1 but now it's official," Werlinger said.
The original charge against both men was filed as capital murder of a person older than 10 and younger than 15 years old, which excluded prosecutors from seeking death as a possible punishment before a jury. The charges were clarified in September to reflect Jocelyn was sexually assaulted.

The Venezuelan nationals were arrested within days of the girl’s June 17 death. Her body was found in shallow water near a bridge in the 400 block of West Rankin Road." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) | TOP NEWS “Kim Ogg seeking death penalty in Jocelyn Nungaray killing, ” Houston Chronicle's Nicole Hensley — “Harris County prosecutors are expected to seek the death penalty against two men charged in the death of 12-year-oldJocelyn Nungaray , according to officials. The option to seek the death penalty at trial means jurors can consider to sentence Johan Jose Martinez-Rangel andFranklin Peña to die as a form of punishment. Court filings are expected Friday to elaborate on their decision to seek the death penalty, according to a Harris County District Attorney's Office news release. Peña's defense attorneyDaniel Werlinger said he and other lawyers received notice in November through the trial prosecutors that the punishment would be sought. "We see this as old news. We knew we were going to be in this position from Day 1 but now it's official," Werlinger said. The original charge against both men was filed as capital murder of a person older than 10 and younger than 15 years old, which excluded prosecutors from seeking death as a possible punishment before a jury. The charges were clarified in September to reflect Jocelyn was sexually assaulted. The Venezuelan nationals were arrested within days of the girl’s June 17 death. Her body was found in shallow water near a bridge in the 400 block of West Rankin Road." ($) | » FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. body:
Anyone with a level-headed perspective would say Pete Hegseth is unqualified and too extreme for this position, but in the modern-day Republican party, it’s MAGA or bust. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98657778/517379586/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20241213_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWZhYWRhOC04NGI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU8eu3VXyf4fotTM_wakYGz8NuPU61QvsBRItULbY1s=)
---
Peter, You’ve probably already heard of Donald Trump’s defense pick, Pete Hegseth, by now. If not, all you need to know is that he’s a former Fox News personality who has a track record of sexual abuse and alcoholism. _This_ is who Donald Trump nominated to lead our military. Clearly, he’s unfit for the role, but that isn’t stopping Thom Tillis. In fact, he said he’s “inclined” to support Pete Hegseth. **This is extremism. Plain and simple.** Anyone with a level-headed perspective would say Pete Hegseth is unqualified and too extreme for this position, but in the modern-day Republican party, it’s MAGA or bust. **[We have to hold Donald Trump and his allies accountable, Peter, and that starts with defeating Thom Tillis. body:

name: Dyneco Gibson
subject: Reminder: You're Invited to an Exclusive Virtual Townhall on December 19th
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | Good Afternoon, Are you asking yourself how together we can continue to defend democracy and ensure our freedoms and rights remain intact? If the answer is yes, we would like to invite you to join “**Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall.”** **When:** Thursday, December 19, 2024** ****Time:** 6:30-8:00PM on ZOOM **Invited Speakers:**
* Keith Thirion, Interim Co-President and Vice President of Strategy, Alliance for Justice
* Kadida Kenner, Founder and Chief Executive Officer, New Pennsylvania Project and New PA Project Education Fund
* Mohan Seshadri, Executive Director, Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance

It’s important that our communities are fully informed about the importance of our state and federal courts to ensure they remain fair and independent. In 2025, Pennsylvania will elect judges and justices in partisan elections, and participate in nonpartisan judicial retention elections, including three PA Supreme Court seats. A more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in PA’s 2025’s judicial elections. Conversely, federal judges are nominated and confirmed for lifetime appointments. Their rulings have an expansive impact on our daily lives.
Please register at the link below, and invite a friend. We need more people to join the movement.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Good Afternoon, Are you asking yourself how together we can continue to defend democracy and ensure our freedoms and rights remain intact? If the answer is yes, we would like to invite you to join “Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall.” When: Thursday, December 19, 2024 Time: 6:30-8:00PM on ZOOM Invited Speakers: Keith Thirion, Interim Co-President and Vice President of Strategy, Alliance for Justice Kadida Kenner, Founder and Chief Executive Officer, New Pennsylvania Project and New PA Project Education Fund Mohan Seshadri, Executive Director, Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance It’s important that our communities are fully informed about the importance of our state and federal courts to ensure they remain fair and independent. In 2025, Pennsylvania will elect judges and justices in partisan elections, and participate in nonpartisan judicial retention elections, including three PA Supreme Court seats. A more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in PA’s 2025’s judicial elections. Conversely, federal judges are nominated and confirmed for lifetime appointments. Their rulings have an expansive impact on our daily lives. Please register at the link below, and invite a friend. We need more people to join the movement. | | When: Thursday, December 19th**Time: 6:30-8:00pmWhere: via ZOOM Zoom Registration Link: We hope you will join us for this meaningful virtual townhall! | In Solidarity, Dyneco Gibson Director of Campaigns and Engagement dyneco@newpaproject.org ; (717) 847-1201 The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4) non profit organization, contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. name: gop-watch@cadem.org
subject: you narrowed Mike Johnson’s majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Here’s an encouraging statistic going into 2025:
Speaker Mike Johnson is going to have the smallest House Majority of all time.
And it’s because of the organizing and mobilization work we were able to do here in California.
Democrats left the 2024 Election with more U.S. House seats than we had when we came in, and with Donald Trump appointing GOP Members of Congress to his administration, Speaker Mike Johnson will be left with a one-seat majority .
We were able to chip away at Mike Johnson’s Republican Majority and flip seats because we started organizing earlier than ever — and we can’t let our mobilization programs fall by the wayside in 2025. We are going to need to keep our Forever Organizing initiatives running at full speed to hold Trump accountable and begin laying the groundwork for flipping more seats. Will you consider making a generous $ donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]Let's do some math:
The 2024 Election left Speaker Johnson with 220 seats to Democrats’ 215 seats.
But Rep. Matt Gaetz resigned in an attempt to become Attorney General (which crashed and burned). That takes Republicans to 219 .
Donald Trump has announced that he will appoint Representatives Elise Stefanik and Mike Waltz to his administration. That takes Republicans down to 217, on par with the narrowest controlling margin in House history.
Simply put, Speaker Johnson won’t be able to afford a single defection on the House floor.
That’s how close we are to taking back control of the U.S. House of Representatives. But we can’t take our eyes off the ball and let our organizing programs get shuttered or mothballed. We need to keep our operations running, which is why we are asking for a generous donation of $ or more today. What do you say? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: More bad news from North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121324_2&amount=25]
NC Newsline: Proposed constitutional amendment to require photo ID for mail voting passes legislature [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121324_2&amount=25]
No beating around the bush on this one, Team: Opponents of voting rights in the state legislature have approved a proposed constitutional amendment that asks North Carolinians to approve photo ID for those voting by mail. It only needs a majority vote in the 2026 general election to be added to the state constitution.
Current North Carolina law already requires ID for all forms of voting, so a voter has previously supplied their ID to register. But opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are worried about their suppressive laws being overturned when the new governor takes office next year, so they're looking to put voter suppression directly in their state constitution, where it will be harder to remove.
North Carolina's voter suppression laws -- dating back to 2018 -- are still being challenged in the courts. But we need to start talking to voters now about this constitutional amendment that they'll be voting on so that everyone knows what's at stake.
This is just the beginning, and in North Carolina and beyond, opponents of voting rights are gearing up to make voting harder. Fuel our efforts to protect and expand the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can right today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121324_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] NC Newsline: Proposed constitutional amendment to require photo ID for mail voting passes legislature [] No beating around the bush on this one, Team: Opponents of voting rights in the state legislature have approved a proposed constitutional amendment that asks North Carolinians to approve photo ID for those voting by mail. It only needs a majority vote in the 2026 general election to be added to the state constitution. Current North Carolina law already requires ID for all forms of voting, so a voter has previously supplied their ID to register. But opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are worried about their suppressive laws being overturned when the new governor takes office next year, so they're looking to put voter suppression directly in their state constitution, where it will be harder to remove. North Carolina's voter suppression laws -- dating back to 2018 -- are still being challenged in the courts. But we need to start talking to voters now about this constitutional amendment that they'll be voting on so that everyone knows what's at stake. This is just the beginning, and in North Carolina and beyond, opponents of voting rights are gearing up to make voting harder. name: Indiana GOP
subject: Continuing the Momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Continuing the Momentum**_
---
Friends, Recently, Chairman Randy Head announced his decision to step down from his role to return to his full-time profession. We are deeply grateful for Randy’s leadership and dedication, which led us to historic victories across the ballot this year. His unwavering commitment to our party and its mission has left a lasting mark, and he will be greatly missed. Thank you, Randy, for your tireless work and the legacy you leave behind.

As the Indiana GOP Vice Chair, it is my role to fill in as acting Chairwoman until the State Committee reconvenes. This is a moment of transition, but our focus remains on sustaining the incredible momentum and hard work that have been accomplished over the past year. Together, we will continue to strengthen our grassroots efforts, grow our impact, and deliver results for Hoosiers across Indiana. Thank you all for what you do!
---
| |
---
| | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor-Elect Mike Braun**_ _**Gave His Farewell Speech on the Senate Floor**_
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [gave](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=67cfd24e6bbf4e5bbb1f822fc4e540ec&_e=kCpQV4JFns2Gzb6rsc7rxIG92tdOoiMv8zEjooQLibQMGinrxYcVZo0cHal26XbAm8tnscRsaDZ1sGI5IoTiZiFdAmcfsJ_u8m94AHM6mjRthNjNcntV12dojo-fEpj7nJEepKFfrZFjd_z66R66wnYXtt9DO9NCBfKDKwckHADD1bHv9D6HphOD0s5ayLNVJ9pWz2wl827C1NwSYW-jBY0q7p9xN4FYowZj7ZLurXWjAm864qfuAZFlKsDefYN7) his farewell speech on the senate floor. **What's he saying** : "Today I gave my farewell speech as a Senator. Indiana is a truly incredible state filled with the most goodhearted, hardworking people in the world. It was my honor to serve you in the U.S. Senate, and I can’t wait to continue the adventure back home again in Indiana." \- **Governor-elect****. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=67cfd24e6bbf4e5bbb1f822fc4e540ec&_e=kCpQV4JFns2Gzb6rsc7rxIG92tdOoiMv8zEjooQLibQMGinrxYcVZo0cHal26XbAm8tnscRsaDZ1sGI5IoTiZryxmvfygV6V6T0QxR1cuCensHVFcEFRF19uDGYRsZKvTfvTzZdRcUK-KJX4zv99_5gCqhznA4P8aoxPxGUdwllmSdK2iVCRnSGqpTvG_mJ8D4iHflV_B33_IwStxJmRMJTxJyn8WP3ovQ5O6QzTZTMnk7eWk9Oa81M_5-q7xO6-).

_**Governor-Elect Mike Braun**_ _**Celebrated the 208th Year of Statehood for Indiana**_
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [celebrated](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=67cfd24e6bbf4e5bbb1f822fc4e540ec&_e=kCpQV4JFns2Gzb6rsc7rxDPEroxcSVK-CGXOpJyNLBzlVMxtWu_QSnY5-qjJ1psp5CdcMEEAsIQrztd9aj29ePD6z1tXAEUTdIWmK07Z4dBF2bNRY6t6XbrPOKaCtmNuPij8t-eUtygewIxtdKZBzx5vUeXuHnowDdWzu8yRkQ2yf_4z6c2cGJaVQw4ERY_2iaRX_PJBysHKJ_WFz_t_tY_orrnA66__gYkGNEUixxofhPn55mf15JVkuDAbqyAZ) Indiana's 208th year of statehood. **What's he saying** : “Happy Statehood Day, Indiana!

Today, we celebrate 208 years of Hoosier pride, resilience, and community. From our small towns to our cities, Indiana’s spirit shines bright, rooted in hard work and Hoosier hospitality.

Here’s to honoring our rich history and building a future filled with Freedom and Opportunity!” \- **Governor-elect**** Braun** said via [X.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=67cfd24e6bbf4e5bbb1f822fc4e540ec&_e=kCpQV4JFns2Gzb6rsc7rxDPEroxcSVK-CGXOpJyNLBzlVMxtWu_QSnY5-qjJ1psp5CdcMEEAsIQrztd9aj29eAQfPhGNYylbq-NyXQs67LTrzsuWl5BU9jfgulus5M41bnqtn3794677l6upp2pq3Vvp65D6Ec037jzWJNPx_HjKZEfe6FnraLIkcyGLuX0_m8M53x7UWqtsVsuUPItBfOu1FW1jpX8Y6o5XKzM0t7pk34i0zCYp4SzNjh4MLOqG)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Continuing the Momentum Friends, Recently, Chairman Randy Head announced his decision to step down from his role to return to his full-time profession. We are deeply grateful for Randy’s leadership and dedication, which led us to historic victories across the ballot this year. His unwavering commitment to our party and its mission has left a lasting mark, and he will be greatly missed. Thank you, Randy, for your tireless work and the legacy you leave behind. As the Indiana GOP Vice Chair, it is my role to fill in as acting Chairwoman until the State Committee reconvenes. This is a moment of transition, but our focus remains on sustaining the incredible momentum and hard work that have been accomplished over the past year. Together, we will continue to strengthen our grassroots efforts, grow our impact, and deliver results for Hoosiers across Indiana. Thank you all for what you do! | | | | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor-Elect Mike Braun Gave His Farewell Speech on the Senate Floor Governor-elect Mike Braun his farewell speech on the senate floor. It was my honor to serve you in the U.S. Senate, and I can’t wait to continue the adventure back home again in Indiana." \- Governor-elect. To prevent him from facing accountability for the greatest cover-up in modern medical history. For years, Dr. Fauci lied about the NIH funding dangerous gain-of-function research at the Wuhan Institute of Virology, and indicated over and over there was no possible way COVID-19 was the result of the lab leak. Many years and FOIA requests later we know Dr. Fauci did EVERYTHING in his power to escape culpability for his role in unleashing the pandemic. Friend,
According to our records, you haven’t made a donation to the House DFL this year and I want to make sure you don't miss out on a great opportunity. Minnesotans can donate up to $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded through the Political Contribution Refund program. That’s right, you can donate $75 and have it refunded by the state! You’re running out of time to make that 2024 donation though, friend. Will you make your refundable donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=121324]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately Donate $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=121324] Donate $150 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=121324] Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane_other=true&refcode=121324]

Mark Warren

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98660340/517388141/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhMjhhMS04ZWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7clJGf8LXXff_yh69eJmM9kWEFbk3MZBw4_IAUhqm8=&emci=463de87c-8ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=494a28a1-8eb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4925535)_ ****
_Democrats Prepare For Upcoming Budget Session_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98660341/517388142/86436436?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhMjhhMS04ZWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7clJGf8LXXff_yh69eJmM9kWEFbk3MZBw4_IAUhqm8=&emci=463de87c-8ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=494a28a1-8eb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4925535)**
[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98660342/517388143/86436436?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhMjhhMS04ZWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7clJGf8LXXff_yh69eJmM9kWEFbk3MZBw4_IAUhqm8=&emci=463de87c-8ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=494a28a1-8eb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4925535) It is an odd-numbered year in 2025, and that means a budget year for the State of Indiana. Passing a budget will be the main agenda item for lawmakers as they return to the Statehouse next month. As we know, a budget is a reflection of a state's values and priorities. And this Republican supermajority is not prioritizing families or our most vulnerable. Wait lists are expanding for basic health and child care needs, and our state’s public schools are increasingly under a crunch. Democrats, however, are preparing to push back with an agenda to protect families and bring more transparency to our system. ****_Waitlists Returning to FSSA Child Care Program_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98660343/517388144/664053588?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhMjhhMS04ZWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7clJGf8LXXff_yh69eJmM9kWEFbk3MZBw4_IAUhqm8=&emci=463de87c-8ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=494a28a1-8eb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98660344/517388145/664053588?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhMjhhMS04ZWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7clJGf8LXXff_yh69eJmM9kWEFbk3MZBw4_IAUhqm8=&emci=463de87c-8ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=494a28a1-8eb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4925535) For the first time since 2018, Hoosiers looking for assistance with child care expenses through FSSA could be placed on a government waiting list. This is despite the state having billions in surplus, and lawmakers passing child care legislation in recent years. The problem is this is another unfunded program of the supermajority, and without the funding the program was always bound to struggle. It’s time to fully fund the policies for the families that need it most. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98660345/517388146/1619077860?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhMjhhMS04ZWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7clJGf8LXXff_yh69eJmM9kWEFbk3MZBw4_IAUhqm8=&emci=463de87c-8ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=494a28a1-8eb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98660346/517388147/1619077860?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRhMjhhMS04ZWI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7clJGf8LXXff_yh69eJmM9kWEFbk3MZBw4_IAUhqm8=&emci=463de87c-8ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=494a28a1-8eb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4925535) Rep. Frank Mrvan is continuing his efforts to bring dollars back to the NW Indiana communities he represents, including this latest batch of funding for projects in Whiting and Michigan City. These funds will be used to help access the lakeshore and improve public safety in both communities for a safer, healthier Region. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Democrats Prepare For Upcoming Budget Session It is an odd-numbered year in 2025, and that means a budget year for the State of Indiana. Passing a budget will be the main agenda item for lawmakers as they return to the Statehouse next month. As we know, a budget is a reflection of a state's values and priorities. And this Republican supermajority is not prioritizing families or our most vulnerable. Wait lists are expanding for basic health and child care needs, and our state’s public schools are increasingly under a crunch. Democrats, however, are preparing to push back with an agenda to protect families and bring more transparency to our system. Waitlists Returning to FSSA Child Care Program For the first time since 2018, Hoosiers looking for assistance with child care expenses through FSSA could be placed on a government waiting list. This is despite the state having billions in surplus, and lawmakers passing child care legislation in recent years. The problem is this is another unfunded program of the supermajority, and without the funding the program was always bound to struggle. It’s time to fully fund the policies for the families that need it most. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Rep. Frank Mrvan is continuing his efforts to bring dollars back to the NW Indiana communities he represents, including this latest batch of funding for projects in Whiting and Michigan City. These funds will be used to help access the lakeshore and improve public safety in both communities for a safer, healthier Region. ** RSVP for IDP’s Holiday Party = Reserve your spot at our annual Holiday Party TONIGHT to hear from Democratic leaders from across Indiana. = Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, January 9th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. The Tide is Turning in America
[IT’S ONLY THE BEGINNING](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fought_for_12_13_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
The tide is turning in America. Can you feel it?
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ignited a movement—a sea change—demanding truth, transparency, and accountability in every corner of Washington.
Despite relentless opposition, RFK Jr. stood firm, exposing corruption in our regulatory agencies and challenging the status quo to protect our health and freedoms.
**And through it all,_you stood with him_.**
Now, the impact is undeniable.
Dr. Robert Califf, the outgoing FDA chief, has publicly echoed what RFK Jr. has been saying for years: America’s food system is broken. Harmful chemicals like Red No. 3, banned in other nations, are still being served to American families.
_But a sea change is only the beginning_. We have an opportunity right now to ensure this momentum turns into lasting action that promises safer food, cleaner water, and healthcare that puts YOU first.
[**We built this movement together, supported by your belief in what’s right. But there’s more work to be done.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fought_for_12_13_24_nd1&n=6)
[Help Retire Kennedy Debt](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fought_for_12_13_24_nd1&n=7)
The campaign debt we face now is a direct consequence of the hard-fought progress we’ve made.
Together, we can pay Kennedy’s private security debt before he is confirmed, allowing him to focus fully on transforming this movement into meaningful action for the American people.
Team Kennedy

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. Hi there, it’s Team Ruiz, writing out of California’s 25th. We’ll be frank: Though the past few weeks have been nothing short of a whirlwind, it pales in comparison to what we’re going to face over the course of the next month. Since the election, Donald Trump has been preparing to enact his Project 2025 agenda by packing his cabinet full of staunch MAGA loyalists. From Wall Street executives out of touch with the needs of everyday Americans to Fox News hosts with a history of backing his every move, Trump will have all the tools he needs to make good on his campaign promises. The same promises that fundamentally threaten our freedoms, our democracy, and our future. **We have to be prepared.** That’s why we need all the help we can get to reach our final mid-month fundraising goal before the end of the year. Hitting our $15,000 benchmark before Sunday at midnight is what will put us on track to finish 2024 strong, and enter the new year with the support we need to be a firewall against his dangerous agenda. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

clean_body: Since the election, Donald Trump has been preparing to enact his Project 2025 agenda by packing his cabinet full of staunch MAGA loyalists. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi there, it’s Team Ruiz, writing out of California’s 25th. We’ll be frank: Though the past few weeks have been nothing short of a whirlwind, it pales in comparison to what we’re going to face over the course of the next month. Since the election, Donald Trump has been preparing to enact his Project 2025 agenda by packing his cabinet full of staunch MAGA loyalists. From Wall Street executives out of touch with the needs of everyday Americans to Fox News hosts with a history of backing his every move, Trump will have all the tools he needs to make good on his campaign promises. The same promises that fundamentally threaten our freedoms, our democracy, and our future. We have to be prepared. That’s why we need all the help we can get to reach our final mid-month fundraising goal before the end of the year. Hitting our $15,000 benchmark before Sunday at midnight is what will put us on track to finish 2024 strong, and enter the new year with the support we need to be a firewall against his dangerous agenda. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR.
