name: Adam Schiff
subject: My journey to the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

When I first entered public service in 1996, I spent countless hours
knocking on doors, meeting voters, and placing yard signs in every corner
of my State Senate district. I made it my mission to connect with every
single person I could — to listen, to learn, and to fight for the issues
that mattered most to my neighbors.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241213_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]Adam and Eve posing for a photo with Adam's State Senate sign

But it wasn’t the first time I had run for office. I had run twice before
— and lost! It was a humbling experience and taught me a valuable lesson
in persistence.

Flash forward to today: I’m honored to now serve as California’s U.S.
Senator. This journey, from a small district in California to representing
our entire state, has been nothing short of extraordinary.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241213_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]Adam Schiff

While the challenges have grown, so has my determination. I’m proud of all
I have been able to deliver with governors and presidents of both parties
— from new textbooks in schools, to a patient’s bill of rights, to funding
for housing, healthcare, and an early earthquake warning system. Through
relentless attacks from Trump, a partisan censure, and even being removed
from the House Intelligence Committee, I’ve never wavered in my commitment
to serve California and stand up for our democracy.

Your support has fueled me every step of the way. I couldn’t have
persevered without the incredible grassroots movement that believed in me
and our shared vision for a better future.

As I enter my new role as Senator, I’m reminded of how much work we still
have to do: making the economy work for everyone and bringing down costs,
protecting reproductive rights and addressing the climate crisis, and
ensuring every Californian can afford a place to live.

I’m ready to fight for California in the Senate. But I can’t do it without
your continued support — you’ve had my back all this time, and I’m asking
once again for you to stand with me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241213_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]Will you pitch in
$10 or any
amount today to help me build a brighter future for our state and nation?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241213_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241213_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1009&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241213_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1010&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241213_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1011&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241213_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8217%2E5257348%2EgEB_PR ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for believing in me, for standing with me through every
challenge, and for continuing to fight alongside me.

— Adam

subject: Here’s the situation:
body:
---
Derek — We're about to ask you to [**donate directly to the DNC before our final mid-month deadline of 2024.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241213_2395_fr&refcode2=2395_22930333_Mp0URT&akid=2395%2E22930333%2EMp0URT) If you give us a moment of your time, we’ll explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: When this month ends, we’ll be legally required to report how much we’ve raised. As they prepare to roll out their Project 2025 agenda, Trump and his allies would love nothing more than to see that Democrats are exhausted and ready to throw in the towel. They’re counting on all of us giving up. We can't let that happen. That’s why reaching our mid-month fundraising goal is so important. We need to show everyone that **Democrats are not done fighting.** We hope this message has shown you the urgency and importance of your contribution. name: Team Freedom VA
subject: ⏰It’s time for Virginians to Get Ahead!⏰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
freedomva.org [freedomva.org]
Yesterday, we joined with legislators and other advocacy organizations to announce our ‘Get Ahead’ agenda for the 2025 legislative session and call upon the Governor to prioritize hardworking Virginia families in his upcoming budget.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/LOWER%20THE%20COST%20OF%20MEDICINE.png]
The 'Get Ahead' Agenda is a 5-part plan to lower costs in Virginia and empower working families to get ahead. It will:
- Lower the cost of medicine with a Prescription Drug Affordability Board
- Save parents money with a new child tax credit and childcare cost-savings programs
- Help renters afford to buy a house with a first-time homebuyer’s tax credit.
- Ensure more people can retire in dignity through the expansion of the RetirePath program to part-time workers who work at least 20 hours per week.
- Ask corporations and the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share to fund the right priorities by instituting a fair tax on earned income surpassing $1 million per year and closing a key corporate tax loophole by instituting combined reporting.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/Screenshot_20241212_143806_Gallery.jpg]
Left to Right: Delegate Joshua Cole, Senator Ghazala Hashmi, Senator Aaron Rouse, Ryan O’Toole, Rodrigo Soto, Chad Stewart, and Rachael Deane
Thank you to Senator Ghazala Hashmi, Senator Aaron Rouse, and Delegate Joshua Cole, as well as Voices for Virginia's Children, the Virginia Education Association, and the Commonwealth Institute for Fiscal Analysis for joining us to spread the word about affordability initiatives in Virginia.
Read More Here [https://www.wric.com/news/politics/capitol-connection/democrats-unveil-their-agenda-to-help-virginians-get-ahead/]
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva] https://www.linkedin.com/company/freedom-virginia [https://www.linkedin.com/company/freedom-virginia]

Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102
Norfolk, VA 23513
United States

clean_body: freedomva.org [freedomva.org] Yesterday, we joined with legislators and other advocacy organizations to announce our ‘Get Ahead’ agenda for the 2025 legislative session and call upon the Governor to prioritize hardworking Virginia families in his upcoming budget. [] The 'Get Ahead' Agenda is a 5-part plan to lower costs in Virginia and empower working families to get ahead. It will: - Lower the cost of medicine with a Prescription Drug Affordability Board - Save parents money with a new child tax credit and childcare cost-savings programs - Help renters afford to buy a house with a first-time homebuyer’s tax credit. - Ensure more people can retire in dignity through the expansion of the RetirePath program to part-time workers who work at least 20 hours per week. - Ask corporations and the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share to fund the right priorities by instituting a fair tax on earned income surpassing $1 million per year and closing a key corporate tax loophole by instituting combined reporting. [] Left to Right: Delegate Joshua Cole, Senator Ghazala Hashmi, Senator Aaron Rouse, Ryan O’Toole, Rodrigo Soto, Chad Stewart, and Rachael Deane Thank you to Senator Ghazala Hashmi, Senator Aaron Rouse, and Delegate Joshua Cole, as well as Voices for Virginia's Children, the Virginia Education Association, and the Commonwealth Institute for Fiscal Analysis for joining us to spread the word about affordability initiatives in Virginia. Read More Here [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc. Freedom Virginia PO Box 10102 Norfolk, VA 23513 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
We don’t need to wait for Donald Trump to be sworn in next year to know what’s coming.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=PT58o%2FsBnxIMg%2BXYUMXRphNjz3StB9FNpfmndhjDs8E0UXJtsU%2FINBE2tjXDcLI1l5s8cl6HjdfRWpUWgTthskyt9phsblB3ILlLzTLwjyLrSgFSdJ4D%2Bc8TVB3ihPnV0xeG3leVtOq%2BppjfjbRnDP0IFWtRY3Zjn17PGCo4vbE4q4LLQvTLqgNXex%2BMPOvR0tCBO2DGSx6VGzaMNVsrLVe8oIT9DY080gvJrmIIW1Z8eGzeVWQ1kbhmwb%2B1Q0o%2FiymBIvSUcX5cDpKFr5TD5dN9u%2BIPpSaJCm%2Bx5ih%2Bg1EMzLrpxtyfUKgVZ1yR%2BokhIt86%2BsWQEBhMrh5S9%2FjEGgAEhn0Me98ZYIl0EfVI01LKhuXJ9PleW8noQjNdfX1ahqj8GlQVmAI2ccxvJnxP7MCo2VR0rClKzzCw38VP%2FUhSMj1D1v6g6heH2fpnr9Dt)

Peter, As we wind down the final few weeks of this year, I know for many of us, there’s a heightened sense of anxiety. We don’t need to wait for Donald Trump to be sworn in next year to know what’s coming. His outrageous slate of cabinet picks, like RFK Jr., Pete Hegseth, and Dr. Oz, tell us everything we need to know: **we’re in for another term of chaos and uncertainty.** **I’m no stranger to this fight, Peter.** 12 years ago, I won a tough battle to win a seat in the State Senate in November 2012, before defeating a MAGA Republican in 2017 to become Westchester County Executive. Throughout my time as County Executive, I successfully led the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican county, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves. So rest assured, Peter, I’m committed to fighting for you and to take back the House majority. We’re approaching our FINAL mid-month fundraising deadline of 2024, and I need your help to ensure we finish the year strong. [Will you chip in $5 or any amount you can spare, to help us reach our $5,000 goal? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98661232/517391148/-2078637569?amount=5&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_NTLNDRS_121324_1_1_MM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmU4MDIwYTAtOTJiOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GLUOJztYhnUd5y50qQjS0bOp0Vp4qaBy7EJNJOZ1f7k=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

One of the core tenets of our American democracy is the peaceful transfer of power after an election, even if the outcome is not what we wanted.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=vzQJZ0mJOYBI55r26269V%2F5bp%2FKM7iUNAOsOGwaf5dlYD8txPfG3ZoT5fIQBbdgpHdAMabgm1fsGegzP4s2FbjnqSaocl1xkgx2BaNoXC3rKCoTEwbwAmslMcFs%2Fvl%2FY5eIgXgcgWwjaQmB26Qni49KhPDX8CYzotx%2B1Gn4xPJzpMaEEz0ExT6pfJEmbjcaed1u6uCS62mIAiaAN0hXrxWJGqt8MIygobrgrcSmiOrz28ms1kvGQjzZlQ6Sg5rhhSHdDw7hX%2BPf4s3dWAtgnezqalJiVxr1O0hQ488qE2v26%2FsWqF2xkRD6W2m2donFy8oDNaGzOutOBFLUrUgVZWTDtTzCV%2FOGW9KYRSA60%2FuwIfFB4pJaXH2t3gisU8aLTMQNLXm0FKMNb2wZ4BYl9WjlXt6PNZccL%2BQ8DU7VxE%2B8%3D)

Peter, One of the core tenets of our American democracy is the peaceful transfer of power after an election, even if the outcome is not what we wanted. What Republicans are doing in North Carolina this week is in direct opposition to that. Democracy is not ripping away power from incoming elected officials so that you can push through your own agenda. It isn’t trying to rig the system in your favor. **And it certainly isn’t sneaking those things into legislation that was designed to help people who are still suffering in the aftermath of a natural disaster.** North Carolinians deserve better, Peter. I’m honored to continue working in Congress for the future of our state, but I need your help in this fight for progress. [If you’re with me, will you make a donation of $5 or any amount before Sunday’s mid-month fundraising deadline? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98661447/517391847/-1501998833?amount=5&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_121324_1_1_MM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjI3NzY0Zi05NGI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCaVhthUcAVCg8tWratEZnqjZYGUw1XrKP4c6BLeRJU=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Since day one, my work in Congress has been guided by the principles I grew up on. I’ll never lose sight of what it means to look out for your neighbors and ensure everyone has a seat at the table. In a district as diverse as NC-04, it takes a whole lot of perseverance to usher in progress that accounts for everyone.
But that’s exactly what keeps me going in this work. I’m fueled by my commitment to building a better future for our children, and a better life for our communities. **I’m here to fight for you — not to rig the system to keep myself in power.**
[Sunday marks our final mid-month fundraising deadline of the year, and while I know the next Election feels light years away, I count on donations from folks like you year-round to keep our campaign running. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to keep me fighting? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98661454/517391854/-1501998833?amount=5&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_121324_1_1_MM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjI3NzY0Zi05NGI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCaVhthUcAVCg8tWratEZnqjZYGUw1XrKP4c6BLeRJU=)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/497966903baa536c/?utm_campaign=20241119&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card,
and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

But there’s one thing I want to make clear...

...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal
Defense Trust.

_THAT’S A LIE. _

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,
I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of
course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to
contribute, please don’t. End of story.

But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my
freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice,
and rights of every U.S. citizen.

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND, BECAUSE
EVEN AFTER EVERYTHING THE LEFT HAS DONE TO ME, I WILL _NEVER_
SURRENDER THE FIGHT FOR FREEDOM AND JUSTICE.

Unfortunately, my hands are tied.

We're barreling toward our last deadline of 2024 and our fundraising has fallen off a cliff.

This is our **FINAL DEADLINE** before President Trump's inauguration.

This is our **FINAL DEADLINE **before the new Congress is sworn in.

And this is our **FINAL DEADLINE** before early voting begins in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat.

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Leaked: DCCC 2026 Memo
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQlrkBGIy40Agg4okkrdEL3SLA6fQa6VO12T_TB5cM7qgjkzIl-GMY9U5OFHQ)

I just uncovered something alarming: House Democrats’ main campaign super PAC has put _our district_ on their 2026 target list.
This isn’t speculation; it’s a calculated move to take us down.
They see our values as a threat, and they’re coming for us.
I refuse to let them dismantle everything we’ve fought for, but the only way to fend them off is to show our strength right now. **[Please make a contribution and let’s show them that we’re up for the fight and ready for anything that the Left may throw at us.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQlrkBGIy40Agg4okkrdEL3SLA6fQa6VO12T_TB5cM7qgjkzIl-GMY9U5OFHQ)**

---
They’ve already decided we’re in their crosshairs because they think I’m vulnerable.
They want to silence our pro-America, pro-Minnesota voice and replace it with their radical agenda of open borders, higher taxes, and government overreach.
The Democrats are watching our numbers going into 2025. If they see weakness, they’ll unleash everything they have.
But if we stand together and show strength, they’ll think twice about targeting this district.I’m standing strong, but I need your support to keep up this fight. **[Please make a contribution to ensure they don’t get the upper hand.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQlrkBGIy40Agg4okkrdEL3SLA6fQa6VO12T_TB5cM7qgjkzIl-GMY9U5OFHQ)**

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Another day, another sham investigation by Jim Jordan
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
Earlier this week, we brought you the news that Jim Jordan hasn’t slowed down in his relentless obsession with useless political theater and partisan stunts.
Well, breaking news: he’s at it again.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241213_sham_investigations_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241213_sham_investigations_image]
The worst House Judiciary Chair in history just announced that even though Trump appointed FBI Director Christopher Wray is stepping down, he still plans to investigate Wray’s tenure.
That’s right – our so-called representative is preparing to burn more time and taxpayer dollars chasing conspiracy theories instead of addressing the issues that actually matter.
We’re tired of the spectacle. That’s why we’re gearing up to launch the next phase of our movement – a bold, grassroots effort to counter Jordan’s nonsense and fight for the real needs of Ohioans. But we need your help to make it happen.
Can you rush a contribution right now to help us fund the work ahead and hold Jim Jordan accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241213_sham_investigations_link1]
Ohio’s families are struggling with rising costs, seniors can’t afford their medications, and veterans are waiting for the care they were promised.
But instead of rolling up his sleeves and doing something about it, Jim Jordan is hyper-focused on appeasing Donald Trump and his ULTRA-MAGA allies.
Let’s be real: these endless investigations are nothing more than expensive, taxpayer-funded publicity stunts.
They don’t create jobs. They don’t fix our roads. They don’t help our kids’ schools.
All they do is distract from the fact that Jim Jordan has done nothing for Ohio in his 17 years in office.
Everyday Americans are left asking: 'Where’s my representative?' How will he fight for working families, protect our seniors, or support our farmers when all he cares about is playing Trump’s errand boy?”
This is the guy who voted against the PACT Act for veterans, against capping prescription drug prices for seniors, and against every Farm Bill that could have supported Ohio’s rural communities.
We’ve had enough. We deserve a leader who will fight for better jobs, affordable healthcare, and strong schools – not someone who treats his congressional role like a cable news audition.
Help us send a loud and clear message: Americans are done with Jim Jordan’s games. Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to fund the fight for real representation in Washington. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241213_sham_investigations_link2]
Together, we’ll expose Jordan’s failures and build a movement that puts US first.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

clean_body: alt [] Friends, Earlier this week, we brought you the news that Jim Jordan hasn’t slowed down in his relentless obsession with useless political theater and partisan stunts. Well, breaking news: he’s at it again. [] The worst House Judiciary Chair in history just announced that even though Trump appointed FBI Director Christopher Wray is stepping down, he still plans to investigate Wray’s tenure. That’s right – our so-called representative is preparing to burn more time and taxpayer dollars chasing conspiracy theories instead of addressing the issues that actually matter. We’re tired of the spectacle. That’s why we’re gearing up to launch the next phase of our movement – a bold, grassroots effort to counter Jordan’s nonsense and fight for the real needs of Ohioans. But we need your help to make it happen. Can you rush a contribution right now to help us fund the work ahead and hold Jim Jordan accountable? [] Ohio’s families are struggling with rising costs, seniors can’t afford their medications, and veterans are waiting for the care they were promised. But instead of rolling up his sleeves and doing something about it, Jim Jordan is hyper-focused on appeasing Donald Trump and his ULTRA-MAGA allies. Let’s be real: these endless investigations are nothing more than expensive, taxpayer-funded publicity stunts. They don’t create jobs. They don’t fix our roads. They don’t help our kids’ schools. All they do is distract from the fact that Jim Jordan has done nothing for Ohio in his 17 years in office. Everyday Americans are left asking: 'Where’s my representative?' How will he fight for working families, protect our seniors, or support our farmers when all he cares about is playing Trump’s errand boy?” This is the guy who voted against the PACT Act for veterans, against capping prescription drug prices for seniors, and against every Farm Bill that could have supported Ohio’s rural communities. We’ve had enough. We deserve a leader who will fight for better jobs, affordable healthcare, and strong schools – not someone who treats his congressional role like a cable news audition. Help us send a loud and clear message: Americans are done with Jim Jordan’s games. Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to fund the fight for real representation in Washington. [] Together, we’ll expose Jordan’s failures and build a movement that puts US first. Working for US, Tamie Wilson alt [] Donate to Tamie Today [] ©2024 Tamie Wilson for US, all rights reserved To contribute via check, please address to: Tamie Wilson For US 273 Saratoga St Delaware, OH 43015 United States www.tamiewilson.com [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

name: Katie Porter
subject: As a consumer protection attorney, this news made my day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39347%2E3422442%2ESyQL5T)
Derek,
While it feels like there’s not a lot of good news going around, here’s a recent win for consumers that I wanted to share:
Huge grocery store chains getting even bigger would reduce competition--driving up prices of everyday items and giving consumers fewer options.
I know working people are already struggling to make ends meet. There's certainly much more that needs to be done to lower food costs, but I’m relieved the judge heeded our call to halt this merger and I’m proud of the work we did for years to advocate against the deal.
Onward,
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241213-39347&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39347_3422442_SyQL5T&akid=39347%2E3422442%2ESyQL5T)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39347%2E3422442%2ESyQL5T).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Donald Trump is NOT a king!
| We still haven’t received your response to our urgent poll.

We only have 7 weeks before Donald Trump takes office, _and the Supreme Court’s disastrous immunity decision gives him free reign to commit whatever crimes he wants._

**The No Kings Act would REVERSE this decision and ensure NO President is ever above the law! But we need YOUR help to pass this bill!** **[Should Congress Pass the No Kings Act?](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241213_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18204%2E878179%2EnTqPYT)** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241213_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18204%2E878179%2EnTqPYT) | [YES, TRUMP IS NOT A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241213_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=18204%2E878179%2EnTqPYT)

---

Kellyanne Conway, _**[like a bull in a china shop,](https://substack.com/redirect/90582a48-5ea0-4758-93d8-eb109bf50699?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ told a panel full of democrats why they lost the 2024 election so badly.
"The democratic party right now, every day they wake up it's still January 6th, 2021 on the calendar, they get in an electric vehicle, they go get an abortion," Conway said bluntly. "You're out of touch with the American people!"
_**[They just sit there in silence... Watch:](https://substack.com/redirect/90582a48-5ea0-4758-93d8-eb109bf50699?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/90582a48-5ea0-4758-93d8-eb109bf50699?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Conway continued to explain how the election results were a "rejection of wokeness" and democrats are refusing to admit why they really lost.
Panel guest and CNN pundit Van Jones particularly didn't like what Conway was saying, cutting her off at one point and asking "how many 'last points' are you going to do?"
Conway's response is absolutely brutal... _**[Watch her GO OFF!](https://substack.com/redirect/90582a48-5ea0-4758-93d8-eb109bf50699?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/90582a48-5ea0-4758-93d8-eb109bf50699?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
| | POLL
---
Was the election a "rejection of wokeness" as Conway argued?
| [Yes, America is done with that](https://substack..9dqKdNP9T9GFmFwbhH2w0ryhtPNoWcno74AXGeJ8aOo?)
---
[No (comment why not)](https://substack..TCAKoObNRGu9p7MnUZ73evlbVLZoTHYFihPLBGqgK3M?)
[Not sure...](https://substack..0PEzxyLD6LWqJtbvHOF4dZoJvDrEBztfNgkRr_pjPos?)
* * *
# **Piers Morgan CONFRONTS journalist who "felt joy" from CEO shooting**
Piers Morgan _**[confronted left-wing journalist Taylor Lorenz](https://substack.com/redirect/fcab3af2-315a-4e3b-b1a8-dd4415816bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ for a shocking comment she made in response to the fatal shooting of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson.
"That's why I felt, along with so many other Americans, joy," Lorrenz said of the horrific shooting.
Watch her try to back peddle _**[her disgusting remarks](https://substack.com/redirect/fcab3af2-315a-4e3b-b1a8-dd4415816bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **_after Piers challenges her:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fcab3af2-315a-4e3b-b1a8-dd4415816bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fcab3af2-315a-4e3b-b1a8-dd4415816bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Many on the left have celebrated the CEO assassin Luigi Mangione as a sort of twisted hero for bringing attention to issues within America's healthcare system.
A ultra-woke University of Pennsylvania professor is now embattled after she reportedly posted several social media posts glorifying Mangione.
She made several of her accounts private after posting a video with text that read, "Have never been prouder to be a professor at the University of Pennsylvania," Fox News **[reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/826a6675-1095-4829-8b5d-0f694b380589?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| | POLL
---
Is Luigi Mangione a hero or villian?
| [Hero](https://substack..u0vdGi3-tZnD1xwV97oMTKYDK1SafZJgQrPeFUTYrsg?)
---
[Villian](https://substack..OoXkB_AWDGHYOVxIecUuUPOXu7siaJAAnYD7Cgw353c?)
[It's a grey area](https://substack..bdeJNygBREjTs8JmQAMOoWRZvwrTFQ9QPIVqDEhx5Fc?)
[I don't know...](https://substack..lbWGyehBwC1Qj5Zduzxr5-foDaLUbrik4yUqwx0reys?)
* * *
# _**Never Forget:**_**They try to cancel the National Anthem... Trump TAKES ACTION!!**
Watch _**[Trump take action](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff0108c-653e-4a12-820c-b1ba82cc0645?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ when a venue for one of his rallies tries to say theres no time to sing the National Anthem.
"Guess what, we're gonna do the National Anthem," Trump promised the crowd. What happened next is unbelievable...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff0108c-653e-4a12-820c-b1ba82cc0645?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

_**Peter,

Did you see this?**_ Trump is already walking back his promises to lower the price of groceries.

In Congress, April will do as much as she can to deliver for working families in Maryland and across the country. April ran on a common sense, common ground platform, and she’ll work with anyone invested in their communities over divisive partisan rhetoric.

name: POMPEO
subject: We've got the keys, now let's drive Communist China out

body:
Sign your name and join the petition!

| |
---
| | |
**A new era of American greatness has dawned, but our work is far from over.**

As we celebrate President Donald J. Trump's historic re-election victory and the Republican Party's sweeping wins across the nation, we must remain vigilant against threats to our sovereignty.

Communist China's covert campaign to buy up strategic U.S. land, often near our most critical military bases, poses a grave risk to our national security.

But with a Republican-led government, we have a unique opportunity to take decisive action. **That is why I've just launched an official GOP petition asking Congress to BAN Communist China from buying American farmland, and I urge you to join the fight.**

Friend, with a strong show of grassroots support, we can ensure that our elected leaders prioritize America's interests and protect our land from Beijing's influence. **[So please, I'm respectfully asking you to sign the petition right here, RIGHT NOW, and join the chorus of Patriots demanding action.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2fc7dab4e35743709d8e6fccf12b3064&_e=mL0Lekrqe1zEKb_YadYJBdH3Sdb-iQo80-7GbC97er9rvLEoVFomnoCKUHt12-dXA_w1Xo5EH-wOWzawE_vhBQ-H2bdhrfZ8UWeKDJMTaz8S3Ek1ajVNoCJ-eGxe_p705lBUy2FE3pl8gmqb4jCxCvBnRov4nqXQbN6lMHED2qgjPbgXMIbhoZO1ANSFd41t-UxdznDMZLufBFxnVMpXoUl6kqLgXiPTsponrJBro5ZprS9I_w2JEKCqvZRMhMmgIApPD1bM1vK0L3O3srZ5ttCHfPmEJJolA2hJBO0Epq-tTn6RZUW6_hlXMTmA35EuDF-Q5IZeGggzzgI6wzGGCftgZO-JZzgf3zD1Sa9dH_K9DCPQB6ddAzUPKeuj2deO4gAWrgn3hSFZHNwDpkwGBT41nZgpEydOE3xhc1ZP8gs%3D "So please, I’m respectfully asking you to sign the petition right here, RIGHT NOW, and join the chorus of Patriots demanding action.")**

name: Sign the Card
subject: Thank postal workers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please, sign the card right away >>
| | | **U.S. postal workers are the _HEROES_ of our holiday season!**

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/20836?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241213-SigntheCard-ThankPostalWorkers24-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241213-SigntheCard-ThankPostalWorkers24-ETG-sl1&akid=19157%2E9716520%2E0BoJsl)
**[Sign the card to thank our nation's postal workers for working tirelessly to deliver _millions_ of packages this season >>](http://go.dscc.org/go/20836?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241213-SigntheCard-ThankPostalWorkers24-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241213-SigntheCard-ThankPostalWorkers24-ETG-sl1&akid=19157%2E9716520%2E0BoJsl)**
| | [Sign the Card](http://go.dscc.org/go/20836?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241213-SigntheCard-ThankPostalWorkers24-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241213-SigntheCard-ThankPostalWorkers24-ETG-sl1&akid=19157%2E9716520%2E0BoJsl)
---

Team, for centuries -- come snow, rain, heat, or gloom of night -- the USPS has ensured that Americans receive the mail they need. **Our postal workers _always_ get the job done.**

That's why this holiday season, we're putting together a _MASSIVE_ thank you card for these dedicated public servants to show them how much the American people appreciate their hard work.

**We need to gather 200,000 signatures before we can send it, and our records show that you still haven't signed!**

body:

| | | Merry Christmas, Friend!

You have been selected to receive the House Republicans **[Golden Gavel Award!](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=7380cf3e12414d7a86ced16583583b6d&_e=-G3-8uuxTcUu67wues532ya1XcG-IFXM45BrbZjDPDoBDmZNO6H9Lq0pYCs93J8kcFJKLHdE58NI8IQdlJkX_JhBDJ6bFIJPCUMAUyGCsIeow3fOMs4QlBLfqM746ZXc8G4A3AU66Q0aPIksqPbCxnW9GgkcyEcVyXKPvscOffc-EbaYJnbYQooui5rr0usnhzJGw5Rd6DH0u51sUKPDKPrbtwW8cxlCDC2I3AiMBNAeqT2WmY_Njod66u1fDWYCSX79MDvgZlZ5Sp3pzgL854Na99mFaKaH_1RGf93k7EfQART57t60sKkb1YeZPyZOfCyf6qtu6NjTVCNfifLeZfh5KtZP799RgGXIpFMzjlumWQ311Nt3iPG16ae5qAc58YD0oRNUmgwMxasXQBNd_0WYWO76edUo3V0ldfJXqM0%3D "Golden Gavel Award! ")**
Your dedication to our conservative mission has not gone unnoticed. You were a huge part of firing Joe Biden and keeping our majority. Which is why we selected you to receive our _**MOST**_ prestigious award:

Which is why we selected you to receive our MOST prestigious award: | "Christmas Golden Gavel " If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant. That's why we're so proud to present you with House Republicans' Golden Gavel Award. | | "CLAIM YOUR GOLDEN GAVEL REWARD" "Will you accept the ultra-rare Golden Gavel Award before it expires in 24 hours?" name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium:
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241213_symposium&n=1)
---
| Friend – While serving time on trumped up charges in federal prison, Lyndon LaRouche wrote an essay entitled _In Defense of Common Sense_ about the difference between momentary survival, as in a swimmer being saved from drowning, versus long term survival of a society as a whole, from one generation to the next. We are currently closer to thermonuclear annihilation of our species than we have been at any time in history, and if we manage to survive the next few weeks, what ensures that we won't find ourselves in the same danger in the future? We must change the way we think, so we stop repeating the same mistakes. Poetry can help! Tune in Friday night at 8:00 pm for a discussion with myself and long-time LaRouche associate guest William Ferguson which will inspire your creativity.
* * *
### [ Friday Symposium, December 13, 2024, 8:00 PM](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFswag-hLPve8--OSJFxyfMeV-T_nBgCP6Bjhvj7mnUWL&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241213_symposium&n=2)
[Why Poetry Supersedes Information](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFswag-hLPve8--OSJFxyfMeV-T_nBgCP6Bjhvj7mnUWL&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241213_symposium&n=3)
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFswag-hLPve8--OSJFxyfMeV-T_nBgCP6Bjhvj7mnUWL&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241213_symposium&n=4)
* * *
Diane Sare President, The LaRouche Organization
* * *
| [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=MeaOPDdKHeXHoXMo8SdPMf1VjA1KyRWnKuo9UWgoL0GB_Xr2W5EJMtLpVQGlb-k9&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241213_symposium&n=5) | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iBUqNN5QxZbZpy8oXl3a1f4SrO5ITeWevYBWApG_21U&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241213_symposium&n=6) | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=I0ROecgJMR22guD7PNioffU_dgRI7v0LrjR1AYsr3CY17x_6ALTqKUG0HXeQgjgR&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241213_symposium&n=7)
---|---|---

body:

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98666023/517406784/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241213_f_2024Accomplishments_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhmNmUzMi1hNmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNkiMf9TnRW6pSqLrWeXYcX9HgIpFAIxMHFCz3tF38s=&emci=1c8f6e32-a6b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=1f8f6e32-a6b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277)

| | This year, activists like you showed up to support our right to vote, putting your energy towards ensuring every person has a voice in our democracy. And because of your efforts, we achieved some exciting wins this year. We wanted to take a moment to share the progress we made together, knowing that we’ll face new challenges in 2025: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98666024/517406785/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241213_f_2024Accomplishments_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhmNmUzMi1hNmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNkiMf9TnRW6pSqLrWeXYcX9HgIpFAIxMHFCz3tF38s=)
---
This work would not have been possible without you.
We’re now shifting into resistance preparation mode as we look ahead to another four years of Trump and an administration that is bent on rolling back freedoms and attacking our democracy.
Fair Fight needs to be ready to fight voter suppression wherever and whenever it occurs — and we need this team with us every step of the way.
[**The work ahead will be powered by this grassroots movement, so please make a donation today for the fights to come.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98666025/517406786/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241213_f_2024Accomplishments_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhmNmUzMi1hNmI5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNkiMf9TnRW6pSqLrWeXYcX9HgIpFAIxMHFCz3tF38s=)
Thank you for fighting with us.
Fair Fight

clean_body: Support the fights for voting rights to come | | | This year, activists like you showed up to support our right to vote, putting your energy towards ensuring every person has a voice in our democracy. And because of your efforts, we achieved some exciting wins this year. We wanted to take a moment to share the progress we made together, knowing that we’ll face new challenges in 2025: | = This work would not have been possible without you. We’re now shifting into resistance preparation mode as we look ahead to another four years of Trump and an administration that is bent on rolling back freedoms and attacking our democracy. Fair Fight needs to be ready to fight voter suppression wherever and whenever it occurs — and we need this team with us every step of the way. = Thank you for fighting with us. | We’re still working because I believe in what we fought for here in Michigan's 3rd District. We fought for an economy that works for everyone, to restore reproductive rights nationwide, to protect access to healthcare, and so much more.

That work continues in spite of the national results, and we’re working harder than ever. In 2022, we flipped a 50-year Republican stronghold; this year, we held it, and now it’s up to us to keep the momentum going.

[_**I’m ready to fight back against extremist policies that harm Michiganders and take back the House in 2026, but I need your support to do it. # **[HELP US DECIDE THE WINNER!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=61afc26e5c&e=5bd167f239)**

|
### WHAT WAS YOUR
BEST & WORST POLITICAL MOMENTS
OF 2024?
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=4115d914da&e=5bd167f239)
---
| Next week, **on the final episode of the Latino Vote Podcast this year** , Chuck Rocha & Mike Madrid will hold a contest for the 'Best & Worst Moments in Politics of 2024. '🏆

But we need your help:
👉 What are your picks for the best and worst moments of the year?
👉 Got ideas for what to name our annual awards?

Rules:
❌ No Donald Trump or Kamala Harris—think outside the box!
✅ Hot takes welcome: standout races, Latino voting trends, surprises in Congress?
To submit your answers, either click the button below or [tweet us ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=551616f010&e=5bd167f239)[@TheLatino_Vote](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=70c08a4e09&e=5bd167f239)
We might just use your idea. Let’s wrap up the year in style!
---
| [CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT YOUR ANSWERS!]( "CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT YOUR ANSWERS!")
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[Opinion: Why California’s Latino voters are shifting toward Trump and Republicans](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=215d5c9409&e=5bd167f239) By: The Los Angeles Times

[2024 House Vote Tracker](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=ee6acb8a12&e=5bd167f239) By: The Cook Political Report

[New piece in The Atlantic suggests Team Blue misread Latino voters](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=ad870c0004&e=5bd167f239) By: Daily Kos

[Here’s what the Democratic Party needs to do to win back voters like me](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=26b386a3e8&e=5bd167f239) By: The Boston Globe

[‘The Great Transformation’: Mike Madrid Talks Shifts in Politics, Institutions & Latino Influence at Helen Edison Lecture](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=77a21bc37b&e=5bd167f239) By: UC San Diego Today

[Ex GOP Strategist Explains Why California Latinos Are Shifting Toward Trump And The Republican Party](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=aeb0a57053&e=5bd167f239) By: The Latin Times

[Latino Voters Transform Political Landscape Ahead Of 2024 Election](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=8c21977f9e&e=5bd167f239) By: The Pinnacle Gazette

[Why Democrats Got the Politics of Immigration So Wrong for So Long](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=4a0e36acc0&e=5bd167f239) By: The Atlantic

[Trump's Second Term Revolutionizes Latino Voting Dynamics](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7b431d2b2b&e=5bd167f239) By: The Pinnacle Gazette

[National Exit Polls](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=6c9d238fe3&e=5bd167f239) By: MSNBC

# [**ORDER
THE LATINO CENTURY**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=c0bf23b5fa&e=5bd167f239)

An insightful investigation of how and why the two major political parties have failed to appeal to the Latino vote—the second largest ethnic voting group in the country—and the impact it will have on American democracy and politics for decades to come.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The next DNC chair needs to focus on rebuilding the Party.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats Rep. Pramila Jayapal and Rep. Greg Casar are leading the
call to transform the Democratic Party and recenter its focus on
working-class people.

Pramila, the current chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC),
and her successor Greg are urging Democratic members running for DNC chair
to embrace bold changes, including banning corporate PAC donations and
super PAC spending in Democratic primaries.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241213?refcode=em20241213-36233&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36233_1203867_r8rPBe&akid=36233%2E1203867%2Er8rPBe ]Tweet from Max Cohen: News: Top Progressive Caucus lawmakers - Jayapal,
Casar, Frost, Delusion - are calling for DNC chair candidates to endorse
reforms aimed at winning back working class voters, including banning
super PACs from spending in Dem primaries and refusing corporate PAC
donations to the DNC

Their letter also calls for prioritizing “rebuilding our multiracial poor
and working-class base” and employing more consultants with “a
demonstrated understanding of populist policies.”

These progressive leaders recognize how badly the Party has become
entrenched in the corporate and billionaire bad actors profiting at the
expense of working-class voters. As Greg said, “Our caucus will make sure
the Democratic Party stands up to corporate interests for working people."

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241213?refcode=em20241213-36233&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36233_1203867_r8rPBe&akid=36233%2E1203867%2Er8rPBe ]In 2025, we’ll be working alongside Greg and Pramila to put pressure on
the Party to do just that. Will you fuel our work with a grassroots
contribution today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241213?refcode=em20241213-36233&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36233_1203867_r8rPBe&akid=36233%2E1203867%2Er8rPBe ]Tweet from Pramila Jayapal: Trying to be “Republican lite” is a losing
strategy. The path forward for Democrats is clear: Defend our democracy
from Big Money. Empower grassroots leaders. Invest in state parties. We
win by fighting for working families and poor people.

Pramila is right. The next DNC chair needs to focus on rebuilding the
Party. That means a 50-state organizing strategy, embracing grassroots
donors and rejecting corporate PAC money, and showing a clear vision of
how we will fight – and WIN – for working people.

Justice Democrats is prepared to go full speed ahead with that mission.
Together, we will ensure the Party stands up to corporate interests while
we recruit a new generation of working-class leaders to run against
corporate Democrats who’ve lost touch with their constituents next cycle.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241213?refcode=em20241213-36233&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36233_1203867_r8rPBe&akid=36233%2E1203867%2Er8rPBe ]Let’s fight to end corporate influence in our elections and put power
back where it belongs — with the people. If you’re with us, rush any
amount now →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241213?refcode=em20241213-36233&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36233_1203867_r8rPBe&akid=36233%2E1203867%2Er8rPBe ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241213-36233-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36233_1203867_r8rPBe&akid=36233%2E1203867%2Er8rPBe

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36233%2E1203867%2Er8rPBe

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: WHOA - Democrats can FLIP two Senate seats?!?
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:

| | **Alabama's U.S. Senator Katie Britt receives Salvation Army's "Fight for Good" award**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=109ff116a5f64b94a2217912d02be0a7&_e=GhCWY3AkQcQgLwg3fudfbrE-LlFyuk-VS_LcDXiPfyX3sghmV6HN1oIrlxYZKkKEqk8v1yk-6hLEaozQT--ZTeljZeFtVVjLZsaf4c_zWy43lidNsD--gQEAHnpkSwrPspDQVw181zKeHzdjeO6J3Q_V4qaoi8ZW-eTjxbnuvVnyXXSEEfEEzVbaAYs44ifzExFgJucGoB9tbJHd4ERS_A0qRavbjEP4764NN-1o5ga9hjdsKUQG6BvA_gubQNI-ENMaAyRqAjieJ2JvlEpbmmOMSQNIZmlwTAC486SPFvVeFrmvdDW8xjDuf5o_JIE6t2kKroZUh_XP3OVCXzEKcz7xa2dqeUzuef-pqoL5Bx7QWRcO8oVUp_n5Kczlz04ezW7Szc0UgcLs3koYDoMrEw%3D%3D)
---
U.S. Senator Katie Britt, a Republican from Alabama, accepted the “Fight for Good” award from The Salvation Army on Wednesday.

The award recognizes national leaders who back legislation that supports the Salvation Army’s mission to help the most vulnerable people across the United States.

“I am honored to receive the ‘Fight for Good’ award from the Salvation Army, one of many outstanding faith-based organizations across our state and nation dedicated to serving those in need. Their mission goes hand in hand with my commitment to be a voice for the voiceless and a champion for vulnerable Americans. I’m especially grateful for Alabama’s local Salvation Army units for their tireless efforts and impactful work within our communities,” said Senator Britt.
---

| | **Trump FBI Director Kash Patel: Alabama ‘lucky to have Sen. Britt representing them’**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=109ff116a5f64b94a2217912d02be0a7&_e=GhCWY3AkQcQgLwg3fudfbvc_PsVl43wQfPmtsDO1iT6Y-NDr2NRZ4I1fSuHu5CzMRtLkfxCNsN_vDZijqlXReLa0CAyjo9JWinczrd3_ofA2HTXf1LEy2iCUE95ouS4wUWePq9tDSHhvTaBVY-_xvZyc4qg8OupGgW64b-zhMiTQuidfw3lvLNLd2Ua52ILbLiCEs24LPMEYQ4xRadNxmEH0HCAJwokt96gY8ux2thhBXW4-IEaVvi38zoUwi2QGzhnHlvZN2z6Jq2CsfywfvaKUXoqO8gVFnCm4Pccw5CZKaNZ3NR9WGOa_23iZPo84)
---
President-elect Donald Trump’s nominees to his cabinet, currently before the U.S. Senate for confirmation, are making the rounds with Alabama Sen. Katie Britt — including his nominee to lead the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), Kash Patel.

With a sizable legacy project at Redstone Arsenal in Huntsville, the Bureau views the state as a key resource in both in the strength of domestic law enforcement as well as the ability to defend the homeland from foreign threats. Britt met with Patel in Washington on Thursday.

“It was amazing meeting with Senator Katie Britt this morning. As a former Congressional staffer, it’s inspiring seeing a former Congressional staffer serving as a senator. Alabamans are lucky to have Sen. Britt representing them in the Senate,” Patel said after their meeting.
---

| | **Sen. Katie Britt: What we can accomplish in the new Trump administration**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=109ff116a5f64b94a2217912d02be0a7&_e=GhCWY3AkQcQgLwg3fudfbvc_PsVl43wQfPmtsDO1iT4KPPPTG79zlEdhXUcd79iNLc3VKycVIVksXQP-2cMhGJznJS28fm9sLKS1n444OUZChXImrIjvLIEH1AxH3CD9t18eesXY41syOw-aKWfmkpCvG7UmcycMLRG8LOkNCyirXK4lbuPv8_2MY6Q81KReInDfyk9xYDNt15H60bsWOpZ4yRxFj8v_KVSUgu_XXjyOqXfWXjp0_CdC2IghTAmawzEaqtNoX6w-acWSgOnHhs_pTqEKdCorZthw_NOZ83pgpmma3fgn_s9DIon09GUu)
---
The American people have spoken loud and clear. They delivered the Republican Party majorities in the United States Senate and the House of Representatives and sent President Donald J. Trump back to the White House. With this electoral triumph achieved, it is time to unite as a nation and get America back on track.

The sweeping results at the ballot box confirm the American people want conservative, commonsense solutions to the challenges we all face. President Trump has proven time and again that he can and he will deliver results for the people of Alabama and our nation. I have great confidence he will act on day one to begin securing our southern border, unleashing American energy dominance, slashing the red tape strangling our economy, and return to a proven doctrine of peace through strength. He did that during his first term, and he’ll do it again.

I will take a backseat to no one in fighting alongside him and advancing the agenda that Alabamians overwhelmingly support.
---

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Alabama's U.S. Senator Katie Britt receives Salvation Army's "Fight for Good" award U.S. Senator Katie Britt, a Republican from Alabama, accepted the “Fight for Good” award from The Salvation Army on Wednesday. The award recognizes national leaders who back legislation that supports the Salvation Army’s mission to help the most vulnerable people across the United States. “I am honored to receive the ‘Fight for Good’ award from the Salvation Army, one of many outstanding faith-based organizations across our state and nation dedicated to serving those in need. Their mission goes hand in hand with my commitment to be a voice for the voiceless and a champion for vulnerable Americans. I’m especially grateful for Alabama’s local Salvation Army units for their tireless efforts and impactful work within our communities,” said Senator Britt. | | Trump FBI Director Kash Patel: Alabama ‘lucky to have Sen. Britt representing them’ President-elect Donald Trump’s nominees to his cabinet, currently before the U.S. Senate for confirmation, are making the rounds with Alabama Sen. Katie Britt — including his nominee to lead the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), Kash Patel. With a sizable legacy project at Redstone Arsenal in Huntsville, the Bureau views the state as a key resource in both in the strength of domestic law enforcement as well as the ability to defend the homeland from foreign threats. Britt met with Patel in Washington on Thursday. “It was amazing meeting with Senator Katie Britt this morning. As a former Congressional staffer, it’s inspiring seeing a former Congressional staffer serving as a senator. Alabamans are lucky to have Sen. Britt representing them in the Senate,” Patel said after their meeting. | | Sen. Katie Britt: What we can accomplish in the new Trump administration The American people have spoken loud and clear. They delivered the Republican Party majorities in the United States Senate and the House of Representatives and sent President Donald J. Trump back to the White House. With this electoral triumph achieved, it is time to unite as a nation and get America back on track. The sweeping results at the ballot box confirm the American people want conservative, commonsense solutions to the challenges we all face. President Trump has proven time and again that he can and he will deliver results for the people of Alabama and our nation. I have great confidence he will act on day one to begin securing our southern border, unleashing American energy dominance, slashing the red tape strangling our economy, and return to a proven doctrine of peace through strength. He did that during his first term, and he’ll do it again. I will take a backseat to no one in fighting alongside him and advancing the agenda that Alabamians overwhelmingly support. | | | | | | | Katie Britt Holiday Truck White Coffee Mug Claim your EXCLUSIVE Christmas coffee mug to show your Yellowhammer State Christmas spirit! | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 By texting KATIE, you consent to join a recurring SMS/MMS text messaging program that will provide alerts, donation requests, updates, and other important information. _My cup runneth over!_

**You are truly a blessing from heaven and I can 't express how grateful I am for you.**

When the going got tough, you were my rock.
And now we can enjoy the fruits of our labor together.

_**This is Monica De La Cruz. I 'm the Pro-Trump, Pro-America Conservative Congresswoman who won the most competitive House race in America.**_

The Democrats held my seat in South Texas for over 100 years and NO ONE thought I had a chance of winning.

But with your help, we proved them wrong TOGETHER!

And now we have a strong GOP House Majority ready to deliver on YOUR vision for America.

body:
Your signature needed

|
---
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98666952/517409458/-625024737?refcode=DOTL_20241213_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmMmM1MTUzLWFjYjktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YGb7H4V3xXjB-3vnhIVsi9ThguvoYrcAOH0VmTlqQs4=&emci=e4f4fc8c-ddb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=af2c5153-acb9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14887570)****Peter, you have two options:**

**OPTION #1:** _Do nothing._ You’ll help Republicans by giving them no pushback, the MAGA Supreme Court will be legitimized, and Trump will act like a KING...

name: Powered By People
subject: Our commitment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
With your support, we built the infrastructure to contact millions of voters in Texas ahead of the 2024 election.
Even though the results weren’t what we hoped for, Beto and our whole team are determined and committed to fighting for the future of our state.
Powered by People is a grassroots organization fueled by thousands of volunteers and only possible because of donations from people like you. Since you are a key part of this effort, we want to give you an inside look at our fundraising progress for the month of December so far:
Right now, we’re $9,340.12 short of where we need to be for mid-December. [**So we’re reaching out to ask if you can make a contribution of $3 right now to help us reach our $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal by midnight on Sunday?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241213.65d3Vg&refcode=ema20241213-239920&t=1&akid=239920%2E444211%2E_FdQjE)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241213.65d3Vg&refcode=ema20241213-239920&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=239920%2E444211%2E_FdQjE)**
Any contribution you make today will help ensure we stay on track to meet our targets as we head into the new year.
We can’t do any of this work without grassroots support—so thank you for being in this fight with us.
— Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20241213-239920-footer&t=21&refcode2=239920_444211__FdQjE&akid=239920%2E444211%2E_FdQjE)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239920%2E444211%2E_FdQjE), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=239920%2E444211%2E_FdQjE).
